## Official Charged in Used Clothing Scheme
McAllen City Commissioner Rodolfo "Rudy" Castillo and his wife have been charged with money laundering, smuggling merchandise, and employing illegal immigrants at their used clothing business. Federal authorities [raided their home and business](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-O8yAQxJ8Gd0QL_l9QfI27fO2V1hoWeyVsIuCS-O1PvjzC1TOamd983ec7cuBj_Y87mfL2cT7olQOVQmneLYZAR_SeLWOwG6aVXMZl1qBbqUBCNzvkcM5N5cwCblQVGdW3Y98MLdTVZhw60AR9jai1cgrsMmALvSKvWnBjxeYKUwCdUqDq8TZ02DdqqDUMQNCAaIAcl5huZaNCb8w-nPFJ6WbjXgWzlfLIov4n9CT0tJ9pfV6K0FOIFoO8gISerhahJwVCT1Bfzg-dtHHfOWeOByX5Yk_So-VjlZ4cJQxySbxQOuWHP0s-ZIoPlN8ZHUqLmYSeqmTc48UhcO560cC6I4ffheVvvz6N_gkAAP__bUKLww) on Thursday, and the couple surrendered on Friday. Castillo, 55, was elected to office in 2022 and runs Oro Ropa Usada, a thrift store that sells used clothing, with his wife, Bertha, 57. Mexico [has strict rules](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3u4yAQxU9jd0QDJuAUFNu4-2-7pTWGIR4JmwhQHN9-5VVusOVI8z5-78_P_IOceH_-xo1c-8Q873TURK1RmTePKdGeY2TPmPyK5Umh4jIrUHchQYCZA3I6Z90Ht0B4yJ6ctPeH1eMdhn51ENFYHcgqQzjEEOxipA1KL9GMWi49u8tMAhgpQQ6P22jQajkOCkYg0NBpoMAtl1tbqdEHa0xnflO5-bz1ya2tvWo3_OrU1KnpOI7b-6p9etpbwXR9dWq6sDo1pewxie8RKVRR8RRfUOG5ncLnbeNaOe9UxFJ4oSA2-rDHXfj8uoR9ceF1cEpcje00PDfkf0F9-78R3079DQAA__98oIgh) regarding the importation of used clothes, and U.S. thrift store operators are frequently targeted by corrupt Mexican officials. In August, Castillo allegedly told an informant that he pays bribes to "facilitate uninterrupted transport" of goods into Mexico. He also [received over $20,000](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GO8wDUbGg2MZutt3SPOE5kqAYYMbx7zcz2T_Y_ubknvNzm27og9_v37iRKa8lTjudOVAplKbNYgi0x2Xx1mOwK6Y7uYzzJEG2XACHbnLowzWpypkZ3CAqMqJvh17pFppqNU412vWoWw3WIc5DgzMSoW2VGroBKm_eMAHQCQGiGWrdYa-EbiRoIFDAFJDzJaa6rFTohXkJV3xSqm3cqmDWUo7Mmi8mRybH8zzr7cq4417i7uN7xOT4tmJyzPFRVv6BMDliKt4GYnL8M-U2bpvP2cedEk8Pd3GLufgQIseUKBdyXArQsh36-liPKhl3nD4En7ueKbhv6MPnV_lfzaeRvwEAAP__Y7mK-Q) from an undercover agent who indicated "his job was to collect money from Houston and transport it south," according to a complaint. Last Thursday's raids appear to have been part of a larger operation targeting multiple similar businesses in McAllen. Authorities [arrested 22 people](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQRp_G7ozGxvwVLm5Dl9tuiQbPECwZiGxvSN5-xSpvsOVIR0dzvq_bdMMQw37_jxu78lqOaeczRy6F07R5jJH3Y1mCDxj9iunOlHGeDJhGaVDQToQhvicryc1Ag5bsdNcMne0bqOXqCJploMH3BNaS7rVdmrYmpJraGWaWwV0yDdBqDboeqr7Fzuq-NtADgwVhgSmUI1Vl5cIvzEt8H09OlT82Gd1ayiOL-p8wozDjeZ7V83r77XkvCeNFCTNeWcKM8fAY1ecwRn2aVNjVp1bN3znsnLNKGOjCZHL0OEOMIbedsHDfMPxqZfnbZE9nfgIAAP__jxCAiQ), most of whom were charged with visa fraud or unlawful employment.
## Pastor Barred From Entering Service at DFW
Two GOP candidates running to replace Ken Paxton as Texas attorney general are [looking for answers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ_GZI1s82cCB5OQzV54IWrsBloyGNneZeftTzOvcFlJJZXq-_4-5ydy4HP7woNs-V3jfNKdA5VCaT4chkBnXFd2jMHtmDbyGZdZS92BkiD72SOH19xW3i7Sj6oiq4ZuHFrTyabarTfGtVL1jVFu7UYzoKNBDXoh1_jGUMX2Paak7JWSqhlr0-PQKtNoaSTJVopWkucSU112KvSLeQ2v-EOpdvGogt1LubJoHkJPQk_3fddHPt-d0BOd8J2Fnt5QQk-f_A0ZEl3gdr4gxRd4cokpw4W5xAQL8bmBp5PJAzpHOUOJ4NcbkNMVUwG340VB6AkTPB7q68-z81Wy_ro5BM79IFq5Hcjhc7H8n9gfq_8FAAD__65DjNg) about a Florida pastor's claim that he was denied entry to a Muslim prayer service at one of five interfaith chapels at DFW International Airport on Sept. 26. In a social media [post](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQQOGnwV2iYQBjCorbuMttt7TGMMRIOESGzc_br7KvsO0pvuJ8XZYL5ZJv1_-0s--vVJcbP1vh3vlY9kCl8K2mlEOmEjY6rhwbrQsCmpOEE4xLpFzeix6iXyE6ObCX1jirJwNq2PxK5FLQaUXGJA2mlHRcRxXMaEHKdcj-g0mAUUqQyp2nkayWk0KYgEGD0MAx93qc-8adX9RSedcHH-dQ96H4rfe7UP8EzgLn1ycKnHvdqYVaBM6tU_9uAmfprNLaGeNQgZ3UBDgcPt6fuZTcRis0XHfK5dftf7vx8PgTAAD__8P_cDY), Tom Ascol, pastor of Grace Baptist Church in Cape Coral, Florida, said he visited the chapel in response to a public announcement about a "prayer service" where "all are welcome." He said he was denied access. The executive director of DFW's Interfaith Chaplaincy said in a statement that the Muslim cleric who organized the service was "shocked and saddened at this claim," adding that it is [the chapel's policy](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GuonGxoFQUGyT7m27JZrYY7B2jJHthMffr9hfeMWt7tHR1f3zNX9RkLAtvynyVL99mjc-inCtnOdoSYS35H2wgcSulBd2hV6zRn0HhYD97CjIOZvWTS90o2p5UsN9HMzjjl27Tuit7Xu0VvHLOW86pM4NI7IlbUbj2jBdMoXYK4WqG2-PngajHp3GBzIabAyyCzXlW1258jcVL2f6cL7ZFFuZ1lr30nS_Gv1s9PMT-PA5xbryEbblYhr9fEmyf9nB1cCe6eQMO5WaMhQ6C6wMBxUo67tCuuLB-QPsSjsLuDdDTRDfRUKEwvkTLEMJy1YuugTHlwZIBCgzHCw2RW70s82T248gEko_NAaXSEH-764_e_sz6X8BAAD__8IYmFY) not to restrict entry to services. In social media posts, U.S. Rep Chip Roy of Austin [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uwyAQgPGnwVui48CHGRiqSt7SIUtHi8A5RsLBMjR_3r5KX6HrN_yG7_s0nXzK6Xb98iu79pzLdONHzdwa79MafM58K_OcQvI5LH6_cqz-MiFgf5BwAJqiT_k16S66C0QrO3bS9NbooQfVLY5ZEWiMaGNPxIq0RVI69iaEGKXqkntjEoCkBKnscSBvtBwUwgAMGoQGjqmV_dgWbvz0dc6vcuf9GMraZbe0tlWhPgSOAsfnuwocz7x9Lmk7l5fAsTbffqrAUVqjLBCpgQAGMtbabndxe6ScUyUjNFxXn_If3f435O7wNwAA__8UqHAv), "_Taxpayers deserve to know whether their dollars are subsidizing exclusion_ ," while State Sen. Mayes Middleton of Galveston [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQQOGnMV2i8fgPChe3octtt7SMPQRLBiI8m4S3X2VfYdtTfMX5uoVbLLVs9_9xJc_veQ8bvVolZjrCmmKttO3zXFKJNS3xuFNucQoIaC4SLmBDjqWeQXfZT5AH2ZGXzgxO9wZUt_iEFtWkHQ0TGZDK9FOSas7aph7drLviP5gEsFKCVMO1t9Fp2SuEHgg0CA2UC-_HlRdiesc213N_0nFN-9pVvzA_mlD_BI4Cx_enChzXeFILa8m5Eu-bwLFx5O8mcJSDU8YgSrDaWW0NmO7w-fEqtZZmndBwX2Opvz7_7crT408AAAD__8MYcpY), "_We aren't letting Texas turn into Dearborn, Michigan_."
## Hunter Who Fell 15 Feet Rescued
A hunter who [fell 15 feet](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOpTAURFdjMqPrD7_AwSRkPemEyNjXD_cYjOxL02_3I2YLnVWppKPS-fOxfNiY4vH6bXc09B3ycuBdExJhWXZnU8IjhxBdtMlttrzQV7suEmTHBXDoF29jei-68WYFP4kGjRi6adBjB6rZjBBOYghqHJTXSihA5SxMulNqVZ1Ym2gemADohQChpnbs7aDFqCSMgKCBaUAfKZeWNiT8tjWkd_7C0rq8N8lsRGdl6heTM5Pzfd_tXyr4jEzOD5vJWQCTM2gm5xBLJV6wnvnwWOoT3YV8uw7CwuPxeRX03IanBZseOTxfxKkg8k9bTyzc5eugN5NzU4w_75hSrP3ANLx2G9P_X_Qzm19G_gsAAP__yWaIhA) from a portable tree stand in Jasper County's Sandy Creek Park was rescued by members of the Beech Grove Volunteer Fire Department on Saturday. The unnamed hunter lay on the ground for about 45 minutes before he could reach his phone and call for help. When first responders arrived, they transported him in an all-terrain stretcher and a UTV through a mile of thick woods, using chainsaws to [clear a path](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO7CAQRL8GZ4wabPwICG7ibG66odU2zRhtY0bAvP5-5f2FDUslleqcr-tyxcDhuP3HSLa-fVoOehWmWikvcUNmOpL3YQvI2475Rq7gumjQRiqQ0C8OA3-WrnF2BTephqwazDR0o4G22e06jcPkaDSoQU0OFKyGwA9mbNFPZm2CPccUQK8UqHa6jD0OnRpbDSMQdCA6IBdqype6U6U3Fs-f9KR82VJs2O613oto_wk9Cz1_exfPQuj5JBF65rQhCz3vj6NSlpnK9iAn0Z9JGelTqtIjs_Q5RVkzkSwVDyfDITPFVEm-UnKlydbdX4E5lH4QHdwiBv49Uf-m7mn1TwAAAP___BuDHA). The man was transported to Christus St. Elizabeth Hospital in Beaumont by helicopter. He is reported to be [in stable condition](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOtCubYwpXPwNXf72Smuxl-C7JURgheTtTzndG1w5GmlG3_dxCRfKkm_X_7SyL895Czc-D-FSeA9rJBG-bfOcYyaJC-1XTgdNQYHqGoQGbEiU5RVMnfwEacCaPfbd0BvXga4XD53urcVu6JJ1pHF2EJWKyVoNwMbV2b_HEMAiAuqhdZZ6g04rcMBgoDLAKZdtb8vChZ90zPLaHry3cVtr8Usp96PS_yo1Vmo8z7P9-qTjXVZqfNNUapQtkoTfQHvJUThQSr1hVM1gJ2wMEjXDxLFxmnvQRKjm1C5llXr36X5mkXzYvjJwXSnLz3v5m7OHV98BAAD__1qSfNg). "_This was a great example of excellent teamwork_ ," [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpiAQhJ8Gb5imAZWDh714m73u0bTQ_JKgTJAZ53_7jfsKe6xKpVL1_flYPyjldL5-08Fz-4llPfm-MrfGdT085cxniTH5RNnvVF8cLtpWBLRSgYRhDZTyezVdmDcITnU8q9G60UwWdLfPmqyy2zSNPjhL3ls1ObRutIPxmq3r0vyUKYBBKVDa9dNAo1GTRpiAwYAwwCG1Uvu2c-MfumJ-l2-uvS9Hl-e9tc9L6F8CF4HLfd-9wufEWe4nIXCh2pLPLHB5fIFLLp6ywGX_OhtXWfnyXxwkxUdFyg8RGWs55NXoDPJkqjLQITeBiwWUfvDI0XkZbEBpBnCSlFYSotv0FvXAhro6h8875ZyuYRQGXgel_G9z-z_S3zP-DQAA__9-rY92) Beech Grove Fire Chief Jamie Gunter, who praised the actions of 911 operators, sheriff's deputies, game wardens, and park personnel. body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Oct 06, 2025 06:45 am
The U.S. Treasury Department announced Friday that it is considering minting new $1 coins bearing President Donald Trump’s image with his raised-fist after surviving an assassination attempt, as part of plans to commemorate America’s 250th birthday. The story, first reported by Fox News and later confirmed by U.S. Treasurer Brandon Beach, was quickly shared by [...]

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: 121,000+ reasons to be hopeful
body:
#

Patriot,

We knew Charlie’s mission would live on.

_But we didn’t expect this..._

In just two weeks, more than 121,000 students have reached out to
start or join a Turning Point USA chapter at their college or high
school.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

Young Americans — from high schools to college campuses — are
raising their hands and saying: _“I’M READY TO LEAD.”_

And thanks to you — many of them already are.

Friend, your prayers... your generosity...

You’ve helped us meet this moment with activism kits, leadership
resources, and boldness.

Charlie dreamed of a Turning Point USA chapter in every college and
high school in America.

Now, it’s within reach.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

Our movement was already strong, but no one has ever seen anything
like this before...

And it’s moving faster than anyone expected.

From high school students launching Club America chapters to college
students organizing with urgency...

THE YOUTH MOVEMENT CHARLIE BUILT IS GAINING UNSTOPPABLE MOMENTUM.

AND FRIEND, BEHIND EVERY NEW CHAPTER... IS SOMEONE LIKE YOU — MAKING
SURE STUDENTS HAVE WHAT THEY NEED TO LEAD.

We are _deeply grateful_ for you.

And we promise — we’re not slowing down.

FOR CHARLIE,

Andrew Sypher
Vice President of Field Operations

Turning Point USA

#

SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

P.S. If you’ve already helped — by sponsoring an activism kit
or becoming a monthly donor — THANK YOU.

Your generosity is equipping students, launching chapters, and
honoring Charlie’s mission in the most tangible way possible.

We couldn’t do this without you.

But if you haven’t had the chance yet — _and you feel called to
act..._

HERE IS A POWERFUL WAY YOU CAN HELP:

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT —
INCLUDING LEADERSHIP TOOLS, CONSTITUTIONS, FLAGS, AND CHAPTER GEAR —
FOR A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER...
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

AGAIN, IF YOU’VE ALREADY STEPPED FORWARD TO HELP — _THANK YOU._

Your impact is already being felt on campuses and in high schools
across America.

For Charlie. For the next generation. For America.

1 KIT = $25
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

2 KITS = $50
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

10 KITS = $250
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

100 KITS = $2,500
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

1,000 KITS = $25,000
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

Sponsor an Activism Kit
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO72041&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO72041]

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=324658&trkid=983282426&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

For the first time, I'm sharing the official flyer for the **[Seed& Roots Summit -- ](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Faith, Family& The Future of Work in America](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_, happening **Saturday, October 25** , in the birthplace of freedom: across from Liberty Bell / Philadelphia, PA.
🎟️ **[Tickets are now available!](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This isn't just another event.
It's a call to rebuild the moral, cultural, and economic foundations of our country -- **together**.
The _Seed & Roots Summit_ will bring voices from across America to speak honestly about what it takes to build strong families, thriving communities, and meaningful work in an age of division, distractions and opportunities.
I couldn't be more honored to stand alongside such an extraordinary lineup -- **leaders, builders, and believers** who are planting seeds that will shape generations to come.
🎟️ **[Tickets are now available!](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Click below to reserve your seat and take part in a day that will inspire, challenge, and awaken what's best in us.
👉 **[Purchase Tickets Here](https://substack.com/redirect/60bfcb3d-90a8-4c5a-abea-fe6d61831b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
_The seeds we plant today will either offer shade for the next generation -- or a stump they'll be forced to uproot tomorrow._
_Let 's plant wisely. _
* * *
[@JoeFromTexas](https://substack.com/redirect/b053fabb-edc4-437e-a9a6-6cf7a3c87a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Annie Andrews
subject: this guy is failing us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The difference couldn’t be more clear, and that's exactly why I’m running.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61a741a4-1c52-49a3-a17d-593a674a7d60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Lindsey Graham is getting chauffeured around in cars that cost more than most families make in a year. I drive around town in an SUV that needs to be vacuumed and is full of kids’ sports equipment. Lindsey Graham is eating fancy dinners with lobbyists and selling out our Democracy to the highest bidder. I cook dinner for my three kids every night. Lindsey Graham is a career politician and corporate sellout. I’m a pediatrician who got mad enough to run because someone had to step up and fight for a better South Carolina and a better America.
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4b0b1c0-0ee8-43c4-8cd8-67285cabe68d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The difference couldn’t be clearer, and that's exactly why I’m running. This campaign isn’t powered by insiders. It’s powered by people who are sick and tired of being told to wait their turn while politicians like Lindsey Graham mortgage their future. [So I’m asking: Will you make a split donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to help us meet this moment and prove that a grassroots campaign can take on one of the most powerful Republicans in the country?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9015885b-5a82-4f41-ab7a-ea9dd9c7dc60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thanks for being a part of our team, Dr. Annie Andrews [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b2124c6-3436-44d1-937a-b25ff6c60168/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251006_andrews-clear_b1_f1_s2_c2_warmup_rs-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43ba0c1e-a4f5-434d-b7cd-5fe02a67f85f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Passion and Money
body:
"Non-profits run on two things: passion and money."

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..oZyBNdh0GIh1gumsselaZvIq53CzNdMG5Ps-_0P41wo?) for more
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d8e3131-630e-4536-aaa7-38d93c319a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# [Passion and Money](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175391955&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MzkxOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTMzMTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0NTMxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Z7Chur4PAx-kl2SDy05EdNrVYmz2ajgg8OldZpoUE_Q)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Oct 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175391955&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MzkxOTU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTc1MzMxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzYyMzQ1MzE0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Toj2UBS2olsr0lbtrVQeKe1YYbrtGxVZLVt8tIkvQ6o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175391955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MzkxOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTMzMTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0NTMxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Z7Chur4PAx-kl2SDy05EdNrVYmz2ajgg8OldZpoUE_Q&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=175391955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1MzkxOTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTMzMTQsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0NTMxNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Z7Chur4PAx-kl2SDy05EdNrVYmz2ajgg8OldZpoUE_Q)
---
| | [](https://substack..PlSJg7ANgHaBGKOxyFZVr6ynq9mGKo5wpqaSmAWTwBY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/passion-and-money?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

"Non-profits run on two things: passion and money."
A friend said that to me years ago, when I was the CEO of Venture for America, an entrepreneurship training org. I was continuously fundraising, which is perhaps your main job when you start and run a non-profit. I was very impassioned that our work could reshape both our economy and culture.
How to fundraise? Another aphorism I was told during that period: "If you want advice, ask for money. If you want money, ask for advice."
This turned out to be entirely accurate. The best way to fundraise from someone was often to get them involved, ask them their opinion, have them volunteer or consult on something, join the Board, etc. When they got excited about the work, they'd give. So you led with the work.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c92d1164-fa39-4832-b12d-872a73d2e572?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Relationships matter. What do you do when someone asks you for money for a good cause? You typically react based on how close you are to that person and how they ask you. If a friend calls you or gets together with you and then hits you up for a wholesome org, it's very difficult to say, "Yeah . . . no thanks" without coming across as a bit of a bad friend. An email or social media appeal, on the other hand is a lot easier to ignore.
By the way, when I get an email I'll often just bang out a donation immediately. I've been the sender of fundraising appeals so many times, I'm super grateful when someone just does the thing and I don't have to call them!
One way to build relationships and collective buy-in is events. I tried to avoid having a gala at first; I thought "this is a waste of time. How about everyone just sends the money and we all stay at home?" That totally did not work. When we hosted our first benefit, many new people came out and got excited about the cause. The events were a lot of work but they were integral to galvanizing support. I tried to make them less stodgy and more fun.
Venture for America over the years raised money from dozens of foundations, companies, individuals, and even the state of Ohio. Eventually though, I started to believe that our little non-profit wouldn't be able to address the problem I'd set out to solve, which was to restore America's culture and economy. I know, I had very ambitious goals. Most of you know what happened next - I left my org to run for President.
I told my Board members individually. The reactions varied. A couple tried to talk me out of it. One offered to invest in a company and have me run it. But my mind was made up. I left VFA in mid-2017 to write "[The War on Normal People](https://substack.com/redirect/b1a00e0c-39e5-421b-a0cf-d4c82b2f05bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and then spent the Fall drafting a policy platform to announce with my presidential run in 2018.
I joke that I can prove that I didn't have politics in mind before 2016 because Venture for America didn't have any operations in Iowa, New Hampshire or South Carolina, and we totally could have.
What are you passionate about? It doesn't need to be your job. I sometimes ask in a group, "Who here has a non-profit that they volunteer for or donate to?" And when someone doesn't raise their hand, I joke, "You must not be a very good person."
"Passion and money." You might not have one or the other. But if you find yourself with either, put it to work.
This week on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/8e50983c-4ee0-4d5b-af6b-cca3e8dfc404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I interview Steven Kuhn, the founder of Sportspredict.com, a new way to have fun on sports predictions without having to gamble actual money. [Offlineparty.com](https://substack.com/redirect/9eaea5c8-d49c-4c7c-aa2e-5af59efd2308?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is coming to Philly, Brooklyn, Chicago, SF and LA - you can check the dates and sign up [here](https://substack.com/redirect/264ce63a-7e66-48a1-a41f-fcb083b19b2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/ed025bf5-2d56-4e82-b35f-3b29216fd719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is growing all of the time as people discover us - please do spread the word!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d8e3131-630e-4536-aaa7-38d93c319a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: I am starting to get concerned, Peter…
body:
I've been trying to reach you for weeks!

| | | | Peter,
I've been trying to reach you for weeks, and I'm starting to get concerned...
As part of the Team Marsha GOP HQ team, it's my job to collect one million responses to our Support Audit, yet I’m STILL missing your response!
[Your zip code (34223) is one of the most critical areas in the country, and right now, we're falling behind. name: With Honor Action
subject: Shutdown Fallout, Poll Results, and Stories From Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
Shutdown consequences, public opinion trends, and stories of resilience from Ukraine | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8c2bd01f1a56/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14054436?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=f003a33330&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

Six days into the government shutdown, the consequences are already clear: polarization in Washington is weakening our defense, straining families, and undermining America’s global leadership. Shutdowns are not acts of fate—they are a failure of unity.

At With Honor, we believe America is strongest when we rise above division to keep faith with those who serve and protect us.
---
| [📖 Read our full statement ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=039daa1955&e=33f53a5b1a "📖 Read our full statement ")
---
|
---
| New Gallup-With Honor Institute Poll:
Military Experience Tops Candidate Credentials
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4d036677d8&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| A new Gallup survey, conducted in partnership with the With Honor Institute, finds that Americans place greater value on military service than any other credential when evaluating candidates for public office.
* **55%** of Americans say military service makes them more likely to vote for a candidate.
* **82%** say veterans have strong leadership skills.
* **Majorities** trust veterans to put country before self, work across differences, and understand global security.

“At a time when Americans are searching for leaders they can trust, this research underscores a powerful truth: veterans continue to embody service above self,” said Rye Barcott, Founder and President of With Honor Institute.

---
| [📖 Read the full Gallup report ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1d03c5ed99&e=33f53a5b1a "📖 Read the full Gallup report ")
---
|
---
| With Honor Hosts Snake Island Institute in Washington
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=1f55722c83&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| This week, With Honor was delighted to host a reception for the Snake Island Institute (SII), an independent Ukrainian organization working directly with frontline units to strengthen U.S.–Ukraine defense cooperation.

>From September 29 to October 4, SII is briefing policymakers, military leaders, and partners on Ukraine’s tactical innovations—from Black Sea asymmetric warfare to unmanned systems supply chains.

SSI's mission is to ensure that U.S. and allied support aligns with real battlefield needs and amplifies the voices of Ukrainian soldiers, shaping transatlantic security.

---
| [Learn more about their work at Snake Island Institute](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=a4d9054fae&e=33f53a5b1a "Learn more about their work at Snake Island Institute")
---
|
---
| Stars & Stripes: How the Shutdown Affects the Military
---
| Stars & Stripes is tracking the real-world effects of the shutdown on military families, readiness, and national defense. We encourage you to read and share this reporting widely—because the burdens of dysfunction should never fall on those who serve.

---
| [📖 Read Stars & Stripes coverage here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=404255e155&e=33f53a5b1a "📖 Read Stars & Stripes coverage here")
---
|
---
| ICYMI: For Country Caucus Leaders Call to End Political Violence
---
| In a recent op-ed, Representatives August Pfluger and Don Davis—both U.S. Air Force Academy graduates and members of the For Country Caucus—make a clear case: political violence has no place in America.

They remind us that our founders envisioned a democracy rooted in respectful debate, not threats or intimidation. "Political violence is an assault on American values," they write, "and has no place in our country."

---
| [📖 Read the full op-ed here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=a0dc9a6d8a&e=33f53a5b1a "📖 Read the full op-ed here")
---
|
---
| | | | Please follow With Honor Action on Twitter via this [link](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4c412180d8&e=33f53a5b1a),
and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.
---
| | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=da36d25c12&e=33f53a5b1a)

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Trump speech suggests Democrats must be killed like bugs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The dehumanization of political opponents is one of the most important steps for manufacturing consent for violence and it doesn’t get more on the nose than this.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76pVhXnFHlkJG_e08wRpcB-qi3lZZhyNtYcR7Ci5ZLvIfQbGYOL8Mm-umWxaHG9GRJL_MbrFhzbgeUeetg6fXp2s3Zrn8WEf6Q3mpCInHmSO9SmRSdmiEeTlIgyvAOHkmbPWyw6aLvpzGQIf2nG_kmu6JL54C-apI-iXMIam7u5LK4wt-mSZsul4Mq0KXy3tjGkbM55recv0RDVsz3vEwVo2kOAkDR7&c=fo4gCSE5ZoeG5mR3hHu00ymmun4gu-VdDGxM6OIyB5fng1Vm1ntZ0g==&ch=x5khqHCl-GUvSmrCJ5bnvk3MN_efvZrBgiD9dsf70D7Q2iQuPYakRQ==)
---
| Peter,
In a violent and deeply politicized speech that Trump delivered to the US Navy this past weekend he made an analogy suggesting that Democrats are bugs that need to be killed.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76pVhXnFHlkJG_e08wRpcB-qi3lZZhyNtYcR7Ci5ZLvIfQbGYOL8Mm-umWxaHG9GRJL_MbrFhzbgeUeetg6fXp2s3Zrn8WEf6Q3mpCInHmSO9SmRSdmiEeTlIgyvAOHkmbPWyw6aLvpzGQIf2nG_kmu6JL54C-apI-iXMIam7u5LK4wt-mSZsul4Mq0KXy3tjGkbM55recv0RDVsz3vE8g0qJLenXtP&c=fo4gCSE5ZoeG5mR3hHu00ymmun4gu-VdDGxM6OIyB5fng1Vm1ntZ0g==&ch=x5khqHCl-GUvSmrCJ5bnvk3MN_efvZrBgiD9dsf70D7Q2iQuPYakRQ==)
---
The dehumanization of political opponents is one of the most important steps for manufacturing consent for violence and it doesn't get more on the nose than this.
This comes on the heels of Trump's declaration of a war against American citizens where the US military will use American cities as "training grounds."
The only thing standing in the way of Trump acting out his most violent and authoritarian impulses are our courts and MAGA is weeks away from seizing one of the most critical courts in the American political system--The Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
If MAGA successfully removes the courts Democratic justices in their upcoming November reelection it will be catastrophic. The GOP will carry Pennsylvania in the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential election where Trump suggests he will cross the Rubicon and run for a third term to cement permanent control.
Opportunities to pull our nation back from the brink are running out and this is one of them. If the election were held today Democrats would lose but we have 29 days until election day to mount a comeback.
[We are not being facetious when we say this is life or death, a loss here could be the end of Democratic power as we know it. ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76pVhXnFHlkJG_e08wRpcB-qi3lZZhyNtYcR7Ci5ZLvIfQbGYOL8Mm-umWxaHG9-IcPMa4s_dxGGbQ5PuDST5OtPPiYwqYwKLruiK6-JkOZutSFrKjiYOHdyBFe7MmguzlCOWrX--Ti2h01htermnv-7KX6px01wJFaXUB8Ph1uhzEAX8lQWeTB93ogXPoeffS0HjDUvR7_ey1xKYbzEM4ZDq4UKcboL1bJXl0RAdCJte0gKZB3RA==&c=fo4gCSE5ZoeG5mR3hHu00ymmun4gu-VdDGxM6OIyB5fng1Vm1ntZ0g==&ch=x5khqHCl-GUvSmrCJ5bnvk3MN_efvZrBgiD9dsf70D7Q2iQuPYakRQ==)[However if millions of Democrats rally around this race we can still win. Can we count on you to do your own small part and rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b76pVhXnFHlkJG_e08wRpcB-qi3lZZhyNtYcR7Ci5ZLvIfQbGYOL8Mm-umWxaHG9-IcPMa4s_dxGGbQ5PuDST5OtPPiYwqYwKLruiK6-JkOZutSFrKjiYOHdyBFe7MmguzlCOWrX--Ti2h01htermnv-7KX6px01wJFaXUB8Ph1uhzEAX8lQWeTB93ogXPoeffS0HjDUvR7_ey1xKYbzEM4ZDq4UKcboe19QJ3fFY3L3Ca65zX3I3g==&c=fo4gCSE5ZoeG5mR3hHu00ymmun4gu-VdDGxM6OIyB5fng1Vm1ntZ0g==&ch=x5khqHCl-GUvSmrCJ5bnvk3MN_efvZrBgiD9dsf70D7Q2iQuPYakRQ==)

This comes on the heels of Trump's declaration of a war against American citizens where the US military will use American cities as "training grounds." The only thing standing in the way of Trump acting out his most violent and authoritarian impulses are our courts and MAGA is weeks away from seizing one of the most critical courts in the American political system--The Pennsylvania Supreme Court. The GOP will carry Pennsylvania in the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential election where Trump suggests he will cross the Rubicon and run for a third term to cement permanent control. # [We Gotta Stop Buying So Much Broadcast TV ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5156566&post_id=170833956&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODMzOTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTYxMzMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0ODEzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTUxNTY1NjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c-A1ek4OvsIqcufVUhGf_Upcs5evHxtHIo92MBkEoWU)
### Time to roll with the changes.
| | [Matt Royer](https://substack.com/@bytheballot)
---
| Oct 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bytheballot)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5156566&post_id=170833956&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODMzOTU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTc1NjEzMywiZXhwIjoxNzYyMzQ4MTMzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNTE1NjU2NiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tZU6wKVsDYJtIvXGP78L0qUnHSVX-eSg2ORVQLf4sXU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5156566&post_id=170833956&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODMzOTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTYxMzMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0ODEzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTUxNTY1NjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c-A1ek4OvsIqcufVUhGf_Upcs5evHxtHIo92MBkEoWU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5156566&post_id=170833956&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODMzOTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTYxMzMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0ODEzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTUxNTY1NjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c-A1ek4OvsIqcufVUhGf_Upcs5evHxtHIo92MBkEoWU)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bytheballot/p/we-gotta-stop-buying-so-much-broadcast?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[Listen to post * 12:40](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=5156566&post_id=170833956&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-play-on-substack&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODMzOTU2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3NTYxMzMsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM0ODEzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTUxNTY1NjYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c-A1ek4OvsIqcufVUhGf_Upcs5evHxtHIo92MBkEoWU&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17dea3ed-8b00-4c5d-92e3-9a78f14fa6ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For decades, the television political ad was king. Not since the mailpiece had candidates been able to beam their faces -- and now their voices -- directly into voters' homes.
Dwight D. Eisenhower was the first candidate to broadcast a TV ad for political office: a 60-second cartoon spot set to his campaign song _[We Like Ike](https://substack.com/redirect/c6f46cdb-f658-4f5a-8559-319a32ab86e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[, produced by Roy O. Disney and Disney volunteers](https://substack.com/redirect/c6f46cdb-f658-4f5a-8559-319a32ab86e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). At the time, just 40% of Americans owned a TV. Compared to Adlai Stevenson's 30-minute televised speeches, Eisenhower's ad was catchier, shorter, and far more appealing, helping him win with 55.2% of the vote and a 353-vote Electoral College margin.
Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ieXRoZWJhbGxvdC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MDgzMzk1NiwicyI6NTE1NjU2NiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1OTc1NjEzMywiZXhwIjoyMDc1MzMyMTMzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.dBfsVe2bv-NU6iI-M038ELykkzTZNt5AbtL56A-ZMHk?)
And thus, the political TV ad war began. For 15, 30, or 60 seconds, candidates could speak directly to voters through their TV sets -- a practice we've kept alive for 72 years.
That's 72 years of the same tactic -- which is still younger than 19 sitting members of Congress. Democrats, in particular, cling to an "if it ain't broke, don't fix it" mindset. But in the past 25 years, the media environment has been shifting under our feet. Using a tactic from 1952 in 2025 isn't just stale -- it's a liability.
I've spent about a decade working in digital paid media for Democratic and progressive campaigns, and I can tell you: we are still having the same internal fights we had years ago.
We've seen proof that new media works:
* Obama's 2008 and 2012 campaigns used Facebook and other social media to activate young voters in unprecedented numbers.
* Trump weaponized Twitter and fringe platforms to mobilize a nontraditional coalition of Republicans and alt-right activists.
* Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez raised millions in small-dollar donations through email and digital ads alone.

And yet, Democrats -- and some of their most trusted consultants -- still hesitate to put real money into digital.
They talk about "meeting people where they are," but increasingly put resources into spaces where voters _aren 't_.
Instead of podcasts and streaming shows, they're on Sunday political talk shows.
Instead of short-form video, they post Notes App screenshots.
Instead of targeted digital ads, they keep buying bulk broadcast TV.
**Cord Cutting and the Need for the Youth Vote**
Back in 2018,[ I co-wrote a piece at Revolution Messaging](https://substack.com/redirect/49125c7b-9a2e-4f63-89d9-8f80a2602490?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about how outdated tactics were excluding Millennials and Gen Z.
[At the time](https://substack.com/redirect/19a27bf6-2584-46a8-9d57-d651dfd05e86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), streaming represented 44.8% of TV viewership -- roughly equal to cable and broadcast's 44.1%.
[Today, it's not even close](https://substack.com/redirect/cb8b8602-a9fc-46d9-8fe7-4d72f3461b16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): 82% of Americans use streaming services, and only 36% have cable or satellite TV. Of that 36%, just 8% watch cable/satellite _without_ streaming.
For younger voters, broadcast is irrelevant:
* 88% of 18-29-year-olds use streaming.
* 92% of 30-49-year-olds do.
* Only 16% of 18-29-year-olds and 23% of 30-49-year-olds have cable or satellite.

Streaming has nearly doubled its share of TV viewership in just 7 years. So why doesn't our media buying reflect that?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dad47151-fa11-470f-94b8-cdd403c4985f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The 2024 campaign cycle was seen as the highest spending in any campaign cycle to date. [Across Presidential and Congressional elections](https://substack.com/redirect/1126004f-711f-4ca8-a01b-f0eac8587e1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Democrats spent $6.7 billion, Republicans spent $7.6 billion, and third-party candidates spent a little more than $500 million.
Between 2023 - 2024, Broadcast Television ads still accounted for the lion's share of the ad buying. Broadcast TV accounted for 48% of Paid Media budgets, compared to 21% to CTV and 15% to Social Media, [according to a report from Tech for Campaigns.](https://substack.com/redirect/6bd993f6-dfdd-463f-ac3d-c3bd3a23164f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When compared to the commercial space, political advertising falls to only half of what commercial advertisers will spend on digital ads. Commercial ads spend 78% of their media budgets on Digital ads, where Political only spends 36%.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b7ee31c-4a70-46a6-a1c7-b1c24a995a03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Towards the end of the 2024 cycle,](https://substack.com/redirect/4423a073-d0f0-42c9-ad63-8f6c79de0d99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) campaigns began to increase their spending on Connected TV with video accounting for 76% of digital spending, but it only accounted for 24% of their total ad spend and by then it was too little too late.
The age old argument is that Democrats' primary voting audience are older and therefore are consuming media by traditional means. But today, even older Americans are consuming content via streaming:
* 83% of Adults 50-64 watch streaming services
* 65% of Adults 65+ watch streaming services.

We can actually "reach people where they are" if we put the money to get our ads where more than 80% of people _actually_ are.
We can actually "reach people where they are" if we put the money to get our ads where 80% of people _actually_ are.
### **Wasted Spend and "District Leak"**
In the DC-Maryland-Virginia market, TV ads bleed across two states, one federal territory, 8 congressional districts, 41 state senate districts, and 70 state house districts. That means at least two-thirds of a broadcast buy is wasted on people who can't vote for you.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b74c200c-2f25-4859-92d9-3cb305cbe252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 2024, I saw ads at my gym (in VA-11) for races in VA-7, VA-10, MD-6, and Maryland's U.S. Senate seat -- all irrelevant to nearly everyone there.
State legislative and local candidates have it even worse. A delegate running in Arlington can end up buying ads that reach people in Hagerstown, Maryland -- 72 miles away.
CTV and OTT eliminate this waste. You can target exact geographies, use voter file data, and frequency-cap so you're not oversaturating. The Trade Desk estimates CTV campaigns reach households [36% more efficiently than linear TV.](https://substack.com/redirect/5547d18b-f43d-4492-9304-2cd9098cbf90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Utilizing Programmatic CTV will not only get you onto people's TV's, but in a world where media is consumed on all sorts of devices, you can just as easily reach voters on their desktops, their tablets, and even their phones without having to guess when people are most likely to going to be watching TV. Your ads run when your targeted audience is online and consuming content making it so much more effective in knowing you are reaching active users rather than paying for a primetime slot and hoping people will be watching.
If campaigns insist on doing something broader than 1:1 targeting, then you know what is in more households than cable, satellite, and streaming combined? **YouTube.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c30bf84-95b9-4549-996e-0da84dfb57ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[85% of all US adults use YouTube](https://substack.com/redirect/3160c156-2efd-4bec-9877-1b6f9fe122d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More US adults today use YouTube than any other digital platform out there. That is true across all age ranges, even 65% of adults 65 and older use the video platform. [62% of all daily internet users are on YouTube.](https://substack.com/redirect/7b5b52a1-6a4e-4f19-883c-baf86e244d5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Now, a large portion of those people do not use YouTube for politics. However, the vast majority of them also do not pay for Ad Free Premium YouTube, whereas the majority of users on Netflix, Hulu, Peacock, and other streaming services pay for the ad free version. If you want to mimic linear TV buying, just do it on YouTube. Your reach will be farther. Your geo will be smaller than the actual DMA so very few wasted impressions outside of your targeted area. You will actually be reaching people when they're online.
### **The Old Guard Problem**
This would all be fine if we weren't still letting yesterday's playbook dictate today's campaigns. The Democratic consulting class is dominated by firms founded in the early 2000s, still run by strategists who built their reputations after the Clinton years -- and still advising from the same toolkit.
It's why you still see CNN panels stacked with James Carville and Paul Begala to "diagnose" our electoral woes, even though their last big wins were decades ago. In their day, they were the risk-takers -- the ones who convinced campaigns to throw out the rules. Axelrod and Plouffe were told in 2008 that relying heavily on the internet to elect a first-term senator from Illinois was political suicide. They proved the doubters wrong.
But now, those very pioneers have become the gatekeepers. They're risk-averse, protective of broadcast-heavy budgets, and quick to warn candidates away from untested digital tactics. And because they've built decades-long trust with party leadership, their opinions carry outsized weight -- even when they're out of step with how voters actually consume media in 2025.
It's a vicious cycle:
* Veteran strategists recommend broadcast because it's what they know.
* Big-money candidates follow their lead to "play it safe."
* The results are underwhelming, and instead of rethinking the approach, the lesson drawn is "we need _more_ of the same."

Meanwhile, Republicans have been far more willing to test and adopt new channels -- even ugly ones -- if it means reaching their voters where they actually are. They've turned Facebook groups, YouTube channels, TikTok influencers, and meme pages into political infrastructure, while Democrats are still arguing about whether an ad on Hulu counts as "real TV."
And that's the other problem -- by sticking with slow, traditional buys, we've ceded the agenda to the fringes of the internet. The right pushes "trans kids in sports" as the nation's biggest issue, and instead of flooding feeds with our own priorities, too many Democratic campaigns either engage on their terms or ignore it entirely.
For instance, the fact that we let the Sydney Sweeney American Eagle ad campaign spin into a week-long fight over nothing is a symptom of a deeper problem in our media ecosystem. We often find ourselves asking, "Why does this even matter?" by the time the outrage cycle winds down. We're so headstrong about being morally right and factually correct that we let fringe talking points dictate what we're debating. That cedes ground to conservative influencers who can mock us one day for being "too sensitive" over a brand and championing the same sorority recruitment videos that they were once slutshaming "to own the Libs." And still, we get pulled back into their outrage cycle -- arguing with people who have no interest in being convinced.
By the time, we finally shift to our own agenda, it's too late. In 2024, Democrats didn't truly move serious resources into digital until Kamala Harris became the presumptive nominee. Down-ballot campaigns threw late money into Facebook and programmatic video in October, after months of letting the other side define the conversation.
You can't keep letting everyone else dictate where the goalposts are. You can't keep allowing others to bring you off the messaging track you are trying to set. You have to adapt to the new media environment. You have to start dominating the conversations.
There are bright spots -- new firms, young strategists, and adaptive veterans who experiment constantly and treat digital as a first-tier tactic. But until we break broadcast's grip and stop letting consultants from the 1990s steer 21st-century campaigns, we'll keep fighting uphill battles in a media war we should be winning.
Democrats, Democratic strategists, and progressive consultants need to be bolder and braver when it comes to taking the leap to do new things. We cannot continue to rely on the playbook of Clinton Era politics to dictate how we can win, because just because something was successful a few years ago doesn't mean it still will work. We have to adapt.
**What Democrats Must Do**
1. **Lead with digital** -- not as an afterthought. 82% of Americans consume media this way.
2. **Adapt to survive** -- the playbook from 30 years ago won't work forever.
3. **Be bold** -- take risks, test ideas, learn from failures.
4. **Dominate the conversation** -- use digital to set the agenda, not react to it.

## TL;DR
Democrats are still overspending on broadcast TV ads -- a 72-year-old tactic -- while voters, especially young ones, have long moved to streaming, YouTube, and other digital platforms. This outdated approach wastes money on audiences outside target districts and cedes the online conversation to the right, who dominate through faster, more nimble digital strategies. The "old guard" of Democratic consultants, stuck in Clinton-era playbooks, continues to resist bold digital investment, letting fringe outrage cycles (like the American Eagle ad drama) dictate what we talk about instead of driving our own priorities.
**Bottom line:** To win, Democrats must make digital the centerpiece of their media plans, target precisely, move faster, take risks, and seize control of the conversation -- or risk falling even further behind.

clean_body: Time to roll with the changes. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Time to roll with the changes. | | | Oct 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- For decades, the television political ad was king. Not since the mailpiece had candidates been able to beam their faces -- and now their voices -- directly into voters' homes. Dwight D. Eisenhower was the first candidate to broadcast a TV ad for political office: a 60-second cartoon spot set to his campaign song . At the time, just 40% of Americans owned a TV. Compared to Adlai Stevenson's 30-minute televised speeches, Eisenhower's ad was catchier, shorter, and far more appealing, helping him win with 55.2% of the vote and a 353-vote Electoral College margin. Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? And thus, the political TV ad war began. For 15, 30, or 60 seconds, candidates could speak directly to voters through their TV sets -- a practice we've kept alive for 72 years. That's 72 years of the same tactic -- which is still younger than 19 sitting members of Congress. Democrats, in particular, cling to an "if it ain't broke, don't fix it" mindset. But in the past 25 years, the media environment has been shifting under our feet. Using a tactic from 1952 in 2025 isn't just stale -- it's a liability. I've spent about a decade working in digital paid media for Democratic and progressive campaigns, and I can tell you: we are still having the same internal fights we had years ago. We've seen proof that new media works: Obama's 2008 and 2012 campaigns used Facebook and other social media to activate young voters in unprecedented numbers. Trump weaponized Twitter and fringe platforms to mobilize a nontraditional coalition of Republicans and alt-right activists. Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez raised millions in small-dollar donations through email and digital ads alone. And yet, Democrats -- and some of their most trusted consultants -- still hesitate to put real money into digital. They talk about "meeting people where they are," but increasingly put resources into spaces where voters aren 't. Instead of podcasts and streaming shows, they're on Sunday political talk shows. Instead of short-form video, they post Notes App screenshots. Instead of targeted digital ads, they keep buying bulk broadcast TV. Cord Cutting and the Need for the Youth Vote Back in 2018, about how outdated tactics were excluding Millennials and Gen Z. , streaming represented 44.8% of TV viewership -- roughly equal to cable and broadcast's 44.1%. : 82% of Americans use streaming services, and only 36% have cable or satellite TV. Of that 36%, just 8% watch cable/satellite without streaming. For younger voters, broadcast is irrelevant: 88% of 18-29-year-olds use streaming. 92% of 30-49-year-olds do. Only 16% of 18-29-year-olds and 23% of 30-49-year-olds have cable or satellite. Streaming has nearly doubled its share of TV viewership in just 7 years. So why doesn't our media buying reflect that? | | ---|---|--- The 2024 campaign cycle was seen as the highest spending in any campaign cycle to date. , Democrats spent $6.7 billion, Republicans spent $7.6 billion, and third-party candidates spent a little more than $500 million. Between 2023 - 2024, Broadcast Television ads still accounted for the lion's share of the ad buying. Broadcast TV accounted for 48% of Paid Media budgets, compared to 21% to CTV and 15% to Social Media, When compared to the commercial space, political advertising falls to only half of what commercial advertisers will spend on digital ads. Commercial ads spend 78% of their media budgets on Digital ads, where Political only spends 36%. | | ---|---|--- campaigns began to increase their spending on Connected TV with video accounting for 76% of digital spending, but it only accounted for 24% of their total ad spend and by then it was too little too late. The age old argument is that Democrats' primary voting audience are older and therefore are consuming media by traditional means. But today, even older Americans are consuming content via streaming: 83% of Adults 50-64 watch streaming services 65% of Adults 65+ watch streaming services. We can actually "reach people where they are" if we put the money to get our ads where more than 80% of people actually are. We can actually "reach people where they are" if we put the money to get our ads where 80% of people actually are. Wasted Spend and "District Leak" In the DC-Maryland-Virginia market, TV ads bleed across two states, one federal territory, 8 congressional districts, 41 state senate districts, and 70 state house districts. That means at least two-thirds of a broadcast buy is wasted on people who can't vote for you. | | ---|---|--- In 2024, I saw ads at my gym (in VA-11) for races in VA-7, VA-10, MD-6, and Maryland's U.S. Senate seat -- all irrelevant to nearly everyone there. State legislative and local candidates have it even worse. A delegate running in Arlington can end up buying ads that reach people in Hagerstown, Maryland -- 72 miles away. CTV and OTT eliminate this waste. You can target exact geographies, use voter file data, and frequency-cap so you're not oversaturating. The Trade Desk estimates CTV campaigns reach households Utilizing Programmatic CTV will not only get you onto people's TV's, but in a world where media is consumed on all sorts of devices, you can just as easily reach voters on their desktops, their tablets, and even their phones without having to guess when people are most likely to going to be watching TV. Your ads run when your targeted audience is online and consuming content making it so much more effective in knowing you are reaching active users rather than paying for a primetime slot and hoping people will be watching. If campaigns insist on doing something broader than 1:1 targeting, then you know what is in more households than cable, satellite, and streaming combined? YouTube. | | ---|---|--- . More US adults today use YouTube than any other digital platform out there. That is true across all age ranges, even 65% of adults 65 and older use the video platform. Now, a large portion of those people do not use YouTube for politics. However, the vast majority of them also do not pay for Ad Free Premium YouTube, whereas the majority of users on Netflix, Hulu, Peacock, and other streaming services pay for the ad free version. If you want to mimic linear TV buying, just do it on YouTube. Your reach will be farther. Your geo will be smaller than the actual DMA so very few wasted impressions outside of your targeted area. You will actually be reaching people when they're online. The Old Guard Problem This would all be fine if we weren't still letting yesterday's playbook dictate today's campaigns. GOP Sen. Shelley Moore Capito **[fired back at Democrat Sen. Elizabeth Warren](https://substack.com/redirect/76a75306-45ea-4f99-9a9c-c3f93787e3dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for blaming President Donald Trump and the Republicans for causing the government shutdown.
"People are being hurt because Sen. Schumer and his followers will not reopen the government!" Capito told Warren and the other listening Democrats. "This is avoidable!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/76a75306-45ea-4f99-9a9c-c3f93787e3dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/76a75306-45ea-4f99-9a9c-c3f93787e3dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump to deploy 400 Texas National Guard troops to Illinois and other states amid "war zone" conditions
President Donald Trump is **[deploying 400 Texas National Guard troops](https://substack.com/redirect/df835dae-95ed-492e-818b-7e39f6e64ba1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to Illinois and other states, along with 300 California National Guard members to Portland, to address ongoing anti-ICE protests that have persisted for over 100 consecutive days in Portland and since September in Chicago.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/df835dae-95ed-492e-818b-7e39f6e64ba1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Governor Pritzker 's strong opposition**: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker condemned the deployment as "Trump's Invasion," stating federal officials haven't coordinated with state leadership and calling on Texas Gov. Greg Abbott to withdraw support, accusing Trump of using the National Guard as "political props" in a sovereign state without permission.
* **Escalating violence in Chicago** : Anti-ICE protests intensified following ICE's "Operation Midway Blitz" targeting criminal illegal immigrants, with protesters using vehicles to attack ICE agents twice in one day, and Border Patrol agents opening fire on an armed woman after an angry mob attempted to ambush federal officers 15 miles from a Broadview ICE facility.
* **DHS calls situation a "war zone"**: DHS Secretary Kristi Noem described Chicago as a "war zone" and alleged the city has been blocking federal law enforcement from using public restrooms, with Noem herself denied entry to a Broadview government building when requesting restroom access, while more than a dozen protesters have been arrested near the ICE facility since Friday.

### WATCH: Federal agents clash with protesters in Portland
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2e384062-09c6-4fea-b7e5-88451c42620a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/76a75306-45ea-4f99-9a9c-c3f93787e3dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Shocking New Report](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## **Shines A Light On Possible Threats To The U.S. Dollar**
If you have at least $50,000 saved for retirement you can't afford to ignore this warning.
A shocking new report uncovers the 4 possible threats facing the U.S. Dollar and what you may be able to do to help protect and diversify your savings before it's too late.
**[Get your FREE Report today!](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* The **mounting threats** that the U.S. Dollar faces today.
* What a **possible collapse** could mean for you and your family.
* Some **little known strategies** Billionaire investors are using today.
* Plus, a **[SPECIAL OFFER](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** you can't afford to ignore that can put YOU in the driver's seat!

**Don 't wait until it's too late:**
[Get Special Report](https://substack.com/redirect/37f4ffc9-7bf9-4596-895a-f2dc4f608685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Some congressman choosing to forgo their pay during shutdown
A bipartisan group of lawmakers including Republicans Chip Roy, Ashley Hinson, Tom Barrett, and Democrats Josh Gottheimer and Lou Correa **[have requested their salaries be withheld](https://substack.com/redirect/3efdaf44-8789-4514-bb0b-af11c3eb6e12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during the government shutdown, though federal law requires they eventually receive backpay due to Constitutional requirements.
* **Constitutional pay requirements** : Article I of the Constitution mandates that members of Congress receive compensation, and the 27th Amendment prevents changes to congressional pay until after the next election, meaning lawmakers cannot legally forgo their $174,000 annual salaries permanently--only have them temporarily withheld in a separate account.
* **Donations as alternative** : Some lawmakers like Sens. Ashley Moody and Lindsey Graham are donating their paychecks to charity during the shutdown, with Moody directing hers to the Crisis Center of Tampa Bay, while congressional staffers automatically miss paychecks during shutdowns but also receive backpay when funding resumes.

* * *
# BUSTED: Mamdani photographed smiling with Uganda politician notorious for harsh anti-gay beliefs
NYC mayoral frontrunner Zohran Mamdani was photographed smiling with Rebecca Kadaga, Uganda's First Deputy Prime Minister, during a July trip to celebrate his wedding in Uganda, **[with Kadaga infamously calling a 2012 anti-gay law](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8311ef-17fe-4e3b-9c17-aa1f4087c668?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** imposing severe penalties a "Christmas gift" for supporters.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f8311ef-17fe-4e3b-9c17-aa1f4087c668?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Uganda 's harsh anti-LGBT laws**: Kadaga championed legislation that criminalizes consensual same-sex conduct with life imprisonment, attempted homosexual acts with 14 years for first offenses, and originally included the death penalty for "aggravated homosexuality" before international criticism led to life imprisonment instead.
* **Campaign damage control** : Mamdani's campaign claimed he was "unaware" of Kadaga's anti-LGBT crusade and "ran into" her at the airport, though critics including rival Andrew Cuomo called this "laughable" given Kadaga's globally condemned decade-long anti-LGBTQ campaign and questioned how a progressive candidate could maintain dual citizenship in a country criminalizing gay people.
* **Mixed reactions from LGBT activists** : Some gay rights leaders like Chris Lynn of the Stonewall Democratic Club called Mamdani either "a liar or incredibly ill-informed," while others like Allen Roskoff defended him, citing his strong pro-LGBT legislative record in the New York State Assembly and participation in Pride events.

* * *
# DHS offers unaccompanied minors $2,500 to self deport
The Department of Homeland Security **[is offering unaccompanied minors aged 14 and older $2,500 to voluntarily self-deport](https://substack.com/redirect/79c2321f-b21b-4b19-9e50-9dacd9e64700?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and return to their home countries, with payment provided after an immigration judge approves the request and the individual arrives in their country of origin.
* **24-hour response window** : ICE informed migrant shelters via email that teenagers could claim the financial incentive if they respond within 24 hours, with no indicated consequences for those who decline the offer, while over 2,000 migrant children remain in HHS custody as of October 2.
* **Builds on existing self-deportation program** : The offer expands Trump administration efforts to incentivize illegal migrants to leave voluntarily, which previously included $1,000 stipends and flight assistance, as part of the administration's broader crackdown that has resulted in over 2 million illegal migrants self-deporting or being removed in the first 250 days of Trump's second term.
* **Shutdown won 't affect operations**: DHS confirmed the ongoing federal government shutdown will not impede deportation efforts, with ICE continuing to remove criminal illegal aliens including "rapists, pedophiles, murderers, gang members and terrorists," funded through the "One Big Beautiful Bill" legislation.

body:

I know I've reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they've texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages?

name: Tim Walz
subject: Our responsibility to Minnesotans
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Minnesotans have expectations of their leaders that they will fight for common-sense gun legislation that will save lives, and I’m committed to doing just that.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116709197/574176859/191855934?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWVlMWM4Zi1iOGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hy2k3Gk4_ZybzEtBcln1bJOgFdVOqJC685YZ5C3GE2I=)
---
Peter,
I’m not going to allow the conversation around gun violence go away. Minnesotans have expectations of their leaders that they will fight for common-sense gun legislation that will save lives, and I’m committed to doing just that.

Meanwhile, the GOP is making it clear that they’re going to do everything in their power to block common-sense legislation like an assault weapons ban.

**But I’m not backing down.**

Minnesotans deserve to see where their legislators stand on an issue as simple as saving lives. Minnesotans are watching us, and they will not accept more thoughts and prayers without action.

This isn’t going to be an easy fight, but I know together we can make a difference and save lives in Minnesota.

**[Will you chip in whatever you’re able today to help show that Minnesota is ready to take the lead and pass common sense gun legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116709200/574176862/520374288?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWVlMWM4Zi1iOGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hy2k3Gk4_ZybzEtBcln1bJOgFdVOqJC685YZ5C3GE2I=)**

| **_LOOK! LOOK! LOOK!_
THIS IS HUGE!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94481?t=6&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw) [**We’re calling on our 10,000 MOST LOYAL Democrats to sign our letter THANKING and standing with Gov. Newsom! Signature spots are running out, so sign NOW before Trump can silence him »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94482?t=7&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94481?t=8&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_I am THRILLED about your redistricting plan to CRUSH the MAGA House majority and end Trump’s presidency as we know it!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN in 2026 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94481?t=9&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94481?t=10&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw)

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21395%2E878179%2Eg1gNBw).**

name: Diana Bula
subject: Fwd: the 46th state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
Primary on TUESDAY!!!| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116711502/574182637/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251006Behn_DB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwMGZmN2FlLWJhYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EcB3VqehYvMjvJm_AVUddLsTwL3Y_4LXvtSYTgL-j24=)
---
Hi Peter,

Aftyn Behn’s primary election is TOMORROW, and she needs our support to win so she can deliver the women of Tennessee the representation they deserve (and desperately need).

Tennessee ranks among the lowest for maternal care outcomes AND female representation in government. **We know we need women in the rooms where decisions are being made about OUR bodies – and Tennessee is a perfect example of what happens when men are the ones making all the laws.**

Tennessee has a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. However, in her role as State Representative, Aftyn Behn has bravely and successfully blocked dangerous legislation about abortion access from getting passed. By sending a fiercely pro-choice and pro-women WOMAN to Congress, we will have a fighting chance of protecting and defending the women of Tennessee from the whims of a sexist, “pro-life”, majority-male government.

Click here to make a quick $10 split donation between HBM and Aftyn Behn: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006Behn_DB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=10)**

You can join this historic and important movement to change the situation for women in the South.

For ALL women,

Diana Bula
Political Manager, Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Peter –

Aftyn Behn will be the __only__ __woman__ on the ballot out of 16 candidates. The rest are men. She also has the most experience advocating for the women of Tennessee – and winning important fights that have protected thousands of Tennessee women.

** Her primary is _this_ _TUESDAY._ We can help advance the only proven pro-choice champion through the primary in this critical opportunity for Democrats to secure another seat in the U.S. Congress. **

In the official ranking of states based on women in government, Tennessee ranks 46th out of 50 states. Tennessee has nine House seats in Washington – only one is occupied by a woman.

Additionally, in Tennessee, Black women are nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women — most of them preventable. **TN ranks among the bottom nationally for maternal health outcomes,** and the women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest.

[**It’s dangerous to be a woman in Tennessee, and Aftyn has been doing everything she possibly can to change that. She needs to raise an additional $10,000 before her primary election on Tuesday to reach as many voters as possible and advance to the General Election later this year. Rush a split $20.25 contribution between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006Behn_DB_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25)

Before serving in the TN legislature, Aftyn organized with reproductive justice and healthcare access advocates across Tennessee and the South. She has worked closely with groups on the ground to expand access to healthcare, combat stigma, and defend reproductive freedom in some of the toughest turf in the country. But earlier this week, she told us that **she has been able to accomplish more in her time as an elected lawmaker than she ever could have imagined as a rural organizer.** We NEED her voice and her tireless determination in **_government_** , where it belongs.

This seat is in a red district in Tennessee, but recent polling indicates that of all the Democrats vying for the seat, **Aftyn would be the candidate with the best chances of winning against the Republican** in the General Election. If you were looking for a chance to elect a phenomenal woman _and_ flip a federal seat.... **This is it. Your support could make all the difference.**

[**Join Aftyn’s deeply needed movement in Tennessee by splitting $20.25 or more between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign RIGHT NOW.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_251006Behn_DB_90DO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25)

Together,

Diana Bula
Political Manager, Her Bold Move
