_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: My opponent isn’t responsible. He’s reckless.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116712158/574185233/-727799932?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HashmiSplit_251006_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDg2NWM4Ny1iYmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-vTtzWb6ARKJP9nz9Wr6YU_4wEFKgNyTyT-Zef2LjI=) Hi, it’s Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic nominee for Virginia Lieutenant Governor.

My opponent, John Reid, claims he will lead in a manner that is “responsible and reasonable.”

But let’s be clear about what that really means:
* He’s called for SHUTTING DOWN public schools.
* He’s compared abortion to SLAVERY.
* He DENIED that 300,000 Virginians would lose health care due to Medicaid cuts.
* He’s embraced the FAR-RIGHT’S most extreme positions time and again.

**That’s not responsible. That’s reckless.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116712159/574185234/-727799932?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HashmiSplit_251006_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDg2NWM4Ny1iYmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-vTtzWb6ARKJP9nz9Wr6YU_4wEFKgNyTyT-Zef2LjI=) And here’s the part that should alarm every one of us: **_despite his long record of extreme rhetoric, the latest poll shows this race is TIED._**

We cannot afford to let John Reid sneak into the Lieutenant Governor’s office by pretending to be something he’s not.

[_**That’s why I’m asking: will you split $20 or more between my campaign and Mark Warner to help us expose Reid’s extremism, reach more Virginians, and win this toss-up clean_body: | | | = Hi, it’s Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic nominee for Virginia Lieutenant Governor. My opponent, John Reid, claims he will lead in a manner that is “responsible and reasonable.” But let’s be clear about what that really means: He’s called for SHUTTING DOWN public schools. He’s compared abortion to SLAVERY. He DENIED that 300,000 Virginians would lose health care due to Medicaid cuts. He’s embraced the FAR-RIGHT’S most extreme positions time and again. That’s not responsible. That’s reckless. = And here’s the part that should alarm every one of us: despite his long record of extreme rhetoric, the latest poll shows this race is TIED. We cannot afford to let John Reid sneak into the Lieutenant Governor’s office by pretending to be something he’s not. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Ghazala Hashmi and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Republicans know this race will come down to the wire, and they’re already preparing to flood Virginia with special interest money to prop Reid up. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A long email, but important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Here is goes...

We have sent a number of fundraising emails to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. More than I would have hoped ... believe me. So I thought it important to take a moment to explain why these requests -- including this one -- are so important.
Here is the truth:
This campaign is going to cost around $100 million to win. It's a staggering amount of money, but when you consider the impact of the outcome, it makes sense.
We are talking about flipping 5 House seats in California, and making three previously competitive Democratic seats a bit more safe.
When you think about what these House seats cost to win and defend it over the next three cycles through 2030, it makes sense. Plus, we are talking about control of the House... that's a big deal!
And there is no greater source of donations to our campaign than emails like this one. None.
Now, we're not going to raise $100 million or even $1 million from a single email -- so it takes sending a number of them over the campaign to reach the goals we need in order to fund a winning campaign.
The hope is that when people can give, they will. And there is no more important time to give than today. Right now. In response to THIS email.
Voting is underway. As you read this, people are filling out ballots and returning them. Meanwhile, polls show us at just below, or just above 50%. In other words, this election is CLOSE.
And if we're going to persuade the voters we need, and turnout out the voters we know support us, we need the resources. And it goes back to why the response to these emails -- and hopefully your response today -- is so important.
[**So if stopping Donald Trump from rigging the next election is worth $3 to you, and if you can afford to give it, I am asking you to contribute that in response to this email and using this link.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?express_lane=true&refcode=em251006-1&refcode2=2644_4767699_PlR10D&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D)**
---
****
Thank you for reading. And hopefully, thank you for donating. We'll be tracking the response to this email specifically.
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2644%2E4767699%2EPlR10D).
Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: Fund for Policy Reform, HMP for Prop 50, National Education Association.

Hi Friend,
Morris County is one of the safest places to live in New Jersey — and that’s not by accident. From day one, I’ve made public safety my absolute priority. As your Commissioner, I’ve worked closely with our law enforcement, firefighters, and EMTs to ensure they have the resources needed to protect our families.
We’ve invested in cutting-edge training and equipment for police, fire, and EMS. We’ve supported innovative programs like Hope One to fight the opioid crisis. We’ve modernized emergency communications and expanded life support services. The result? Record-low crime rates and first responders who are ready for any challenge.
I will never defund or disrespect the brave men and women who keep us safe. They deserve our gratitude — and our full support.
If you believe in standing with our first responders and keeping Morris County safe, I need your help. A donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can give will ensure we can spread this message in the critical weeks ahead.
Together, we can keep Morris County strong, secure, and thriving.

— Doug

Pelosi and the liberals are beside themselves knowing that President Trump and House Republicans have delivered _RECORD tax cuts, a SECURED southern border, and an END to woke DEI regulations across the federal government_ in just **8 months** holding the supermajority. | | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.
---
| | [ ](https://links.rob4pa.com/els/v4/me-oj-4yaqhah2vyom5td/Y9SDnjOdRltlo6ZbRVhoUehncpKHY4THWMKbthTyRzXwPGpnK5Phs5hHxJktGUHJjgQL/qQORam7x6cwQWygDzwNVoLZHYc2cQiiOtFgUdRJfnINuvAa5yNnNi9cZaOkbJXTfZ7ZKILSEa9wqLawJD9fsjzu0yPv3EIow8--aHkNrdCzDgCIg2y-dq1sOmar5x5f03I6xMFXBodS6kAqfdub6fyqRJaYiGRDx5UkqD_ZHKrxwrw9AjKSUqwZfqTKbzynncAZ4zsWjmzMt1a9aOCDMAoB2sIJiSMGh8gK_gXszG5cMgxDMjSxD9LIfvLXx)
---
| | **_A personal message from Rob:_** Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. _Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital?_
---

name: Senator Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: Fighting for moms and families in Richmond
disclaimer_text:
Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
body:
Hi Peter,

I’m Jennifer Carroll Foy, and I’m proud to support Leslie Mehta, who is running for the House of Delegates in District 73. Leslie and I share a deep commitment to improving maternal health in Virginia, because we know firsthand how high the stakes are for moms and families.

But here’s the truth: Real change in maternal healthcare won’t happen without strong partners in both the Senate and the House. That’s why I’m asking you to split a contribution between Leslie Mehta and me today. Leslie is a champion for reproductive and maternal healthcare rights, and her race is one of the must-wins to build a working majority in the House.

Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfclmjcf?refcode2=btn&refcode=20251006CarrollFoySplit_B]

We know what needs to be done. Together, we can:
* Close the maternal health gap in Virginia, especially for Black women who are dying at 3x the rate of white women during pregnancy and childbirth
* Ensure affordable access to reproductive and maternal healthcare for all families
* Pass common-sense reforms that provide support to mothers before, during, and after pregnancy

But none of that happens if we fall short in the House.

Will you split a contribution right now so we can reach more voters, counter the attacks, and build the coalition needed to pass these life-saving policies?

Donate Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tfclmjcf?refcode2=btn&refcode=20251006CarrollFoySplit_B]

When we win together, we can deliver together. Thank you for stepping up.

With gratitude,
Jennifer Carroll Foy
Virginia State Senator, District 33

https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/ [https://www.facebook.com/leslie4delegate/]
https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate [https://www.instagram.com/leslie4delegate]
https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava [https://twitter.com/lesliemehtava]

Paid For By
Leslie Mehta for Delegate
PO Box 1721
Midlothian, VA 23113
United States

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Is there ANYTHING I can say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate ANY amount to my campaign right now?
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_1_anything?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4826&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)
**Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to[donate ANY amount to my campaign before midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_1_anything?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4826&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)**
[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_1_anything?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4826&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)
What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government?
And what if you knew that one of our self-funder opponents just launched the first TV ads of this race — raising the stakes and making it clear that we can’t afford to fall behind?
**And what if I told you that after tonight, I will publicly report our fundraising totals for the last time this year — and everyone, including National Republicans eyeing this race, will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win.**
Or what if I said that we have just a few hours left until our deadline, and I’m worried because we aren’t on track to hit our fundraising goal?
**We can’t let that happen — and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why, with time running out, I have to ask:**
**[Will you step up with a donation of $5 or anything at all to help post the strongest fundraising report possible?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_1_anything?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4826&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_1_anything?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4826&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)**
Thank you,
Deb
P.S. I know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, I completely understand.
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251006-1&t=2&refcode2=4826_400544_uV7MpJ&akid=4826%2E400544%2EuV7MpJ)**

clean_body: The 13X IMPACT plan is live. They never saw it coming... Friend, The screams from Democrat headquarters are so loud that we can almost hear them here at House GOP HQ. We've identified the 13 most vulnerable Red-District Democrats -- Democrats who won in districts that voted RED for President last November. These races are the Left's weakest links, their Achilles heel. And we're not targeting them one by one. This means every single dollar you donate today is not just a donation. It's a political bunker buster. This is the they were warned about, and they are caught without a lifeboat. If we succeed, we don't just win a few seats. We OBLITERATE their power base. If we fail? They will unleash: ❌ OPEN BORDERS & millions of illegal Democrat voters! ❌ DESTROY the DOGE reforms! ❌ The DEEP STATE rebuilt stronger than EVER before! Their only hope is that you do nothing. name: Defend our Courts
subject: Trump speech suggests Democrats must be killed like bugs
body:
The dehumanization of political opponents is one of the most important steps for manufacturing consent for violence and it doesn’t get more on the nose than this.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vnPpcMi3GgpPbqNLvGmsqwD8wze29rdNYLFU_Nh69WdpEGo1PC6JIq6DgtakQ74gS070BE_Ap_KT0Br8778snB1hT4Oq2w2o_jpTqROkKFuU33Fl64nivZ64bM2pn_wXYKeea1IwfgbMXpJRu_nxlRG93lupHXIV1HBI3NfiCZCoyLQdDEQQlQbtZC_9JAeQDQ2zw2ntKRgq_eQFvYdFKx7K1Vj5GDl_vcZedNGwW7I=&c=JzURcnGrCWeTON0D3BdNLyXTz26zazDyHQtalJk5H1uo_F5ZsHc3yw==&ch=yIaihXPM5vkXhQO_HS4h0P0A4_FAetEaXdxuBH5Uzce9XKIoYXm4zg==)

| Friend,
In a violent and deeply politicized speech that Trump delivered to the US Navy this past weekend he made an analogy suggesting that Democrats are bugs that need to be killed.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vnPpcMi3GgpPbqNLvGmsqwD8wze29rdNYLFU_Nh69WdpEGo1PC6JIq6DgtakQ74gS070BE_Ap_KT0Br8778snB1hT4Oq2w2o_jpTqROkKFuU33Fl64nivZ64bM2pn_wXYKeea1IwfgbMXpJRu_nxlRG93lupHXIV1HBI3NfiCZCoyLQdDEQQlQbtZC_9JAeQDQ2zw2ntKRgq_eQFvYdFKxd1MtmEarh9ZfsBdOVCPk4=&c=JzURcnGrCWeTON0D3BdNLyXTz26zazDyHQtalJk5H1uo_F5ZsHc3yw==&ch=yIaihXPM5vkXhQO_HS4h0P0A4_FAetEaXdxuBH5Uzce9XKIoYXm4zg==)

| The dehumanization of political opponents is one of the most important steps for manufacturing consent for violence and it doesn't get more on the nose than this.
This comes on the heels of Trump's declaration of a war against American citizens where the US military will use American cities as "training grounds."
The only thing standing in the way of Trump acting out his most violent and authoritarian impulses are our courts and MAGA is weeks away from seizing one of the most critical courts in the American political system--The Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
If MAGA successfully removes the courts Democratic justices in their upcoming November reelection it will be catastrophic. The GOP will carry Pennsylvania in the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential election where Trump suggests he will cross the Rubicon and run for a third term to cement permanent control.
Opportunities to pull our nation back from the brink are running out and this is one of them. If the election were held today Democrats would lose but we have 29 days until election day to mount a comeback.
[We are not being facetious when we say this is life or death, a loss here could be the end of Democratic power as we know it. However if millions of Democrats rally around this race we can still win. Can we count on you to do your own small part and rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vnPpcMi3GgpPbqNLvGmsqwD8wze29rdNYLFU_Nh69WdpEGo1PC6JIq6DgtakQ74gS070BE_Ap_KT0Br8778snB1hT4Oq2w2o_jpTqROkKFuU33Fl64nivZ64bM2pn_wXYKeea1IwfgbMXpJRu_nxlRG93lupHXIV1HBI3NfiCZCoyLQdDEQQlQbtZC_9JAeQDQ2zw2ntKRgq_eQFvYdFK6DqJK_hwVzCoM_UCZ8fQMs=&c=JzURcnGrCWeTON0D3BdNLyXTz26zazDyHQtalJk5H1uo_F5ZsHc3yw==&ch=yIaihXPM5vkXhQO_HS4h0P0A4_FAetEaXdxuBH5Uzce9XKIoYXm4zg==)

subject: A request for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate ANY amount to my campaign right now?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96331?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ)
**Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to[split a donation of ANY amount between my campaign and Heartland Patriots right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96331?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96331?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ)**
What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government?
And what if you knew that one of our self-funder opponents just launched the first TV ads of this race — raising the stakes and making it clear that we can’t afford to fall behind?
And what if I told you, I’m gearing up to publicly report our fundraising totals for the last time this year — and everyone, including National Republicans eyeing this race, will be watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win.
Or what if I said that our October fundraising deadline is just hours away and I’m worried because we aren’t on track to hit our fundraising goal?
**We can’t let that happen – and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why I have to ask:**
**[Will you step up with a split donation of $10 or anything at all to help us raise the $50,000 we need to keep us on track to post the strongest fundraising report possible?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96331?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96332?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96331?refcode=em20251006-9524&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9524%2E614464%2ERlmyaZ)

Deb

name: NEGOP
subject: 📣 You're Invited! Campaign and Candidate Virtual Bootcamp Series
body:
You don't want to miss this!
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're Invited!
---
| We're excited to invite you to the 2025 Campaign and Candidate Virtual Bootcamp Series, hosted in partnership with the Republican National Committee (RNC).
This series of training sessions are designed to equip you with the tools, strategies, and confidence to run a successful campaign and win. These trainings are designed for candidates running for office, campaign staff and volunteers who are involved or want to be involved in campaigns at any level, or those just wanting to learn the basics of running a political campaign. The [Virtual Bootcamp series](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YXyUowLJXaKPrk-h5IjHfR3B8yR1fm7ULFqDrwPJm8PQ5UDepQr-lB7DBoaFmghO0yaV-P5pFUjo1_G_8NveKC0Qm3RfUvTk4TVmJGv6ErxUtFalKuG7HRbsHZ7wnrED0EtC0RPjuZl2Uj2bXBxJy3rSpu0HeFx6GtBTTW-d4lH9v_85nlHlQG1LUJ4KJ9MIFiRPbCgyfkc=&c=OSeumTD7KqmPcW32rKD7t0IJUUu9Qc8vcogz27GqyeZjnoPzgzl3Ug==&ch=NUgqt2VbNCqUgAXJ02Ag9sHGoi9R7ZnkhbwYJHM7qMTaKEbR22O3EA==) will take place over four weeks. Each session will have its own registration link, so be sure to sign up for the ones you plan to attend:

October 23, 2025 at 6pm \- Training 1: Finance - Raising the Money
* Develop a finance plan, diversify revenue streams, host effective events, and learn techniques for asking for donations.
* Register Here: [https://secure.anedot.com/negop/virtual-bootcamp1](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YXyUowLJXaKPrk-h5IjHfR3B8yR1fm7ULFqDrwPJm8PQ5UDepQr-lNdXYdYj44lIcQe_i1E1hfv4g_3V0efT4J42OaBuXbpQoX5TcUo9EvysRPCzQEwblSLgpdnnUVrS1W79lYXOXmY5vZ900KOl-6EIx0DgiKX9aqrl1en5aKGMQwAA8rVE607QflbuMO-4&c=OSeumTD7KqmPcW32rKD7t0IJUUu9Qc8vcogz27GqyeZjnoPzgzl3Ug==&ch=NUgqt2VbNCqUgAXJ02Ag9sHGoi9R7ZnkhbwYJHM7qMTaKEbR22O3EA==)

October 30, 2025 at 6pm - Training 2: Communications - The Messaging Workshop
* Master best practices, craft compelling campaign messages, understand earned vs. paid media, and implement rapid response tactics.
* Register Here:[ https://secure.anedot.com/negop/virtual-bootcamp-2](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YXyUowLJXaKPrk-h5IjHfR3B8yR1fm7ULFqDrwPJm8PQ5UDepQr-lNdXYdYj44lItjKYDNtVoGpu-6FLS7Hy7u-tucRmK_-TBhzAZZ6cr4c9emGgXU08mj8gufxzXJeHICEujuJJhNIMYt562W7SNaSp4mF6xlYviH93G3RfC5QBCmRgnuwhp_X4vVDdbbK8&c=OSeumTD7KqmPcW32rKD7t0IJUUu9Qc8vcogz27GqyeZjnoPzgzl3Ug==&ch=NUgqt2VbNCqUgAXJ02Ag9sHGoi9R7ZnkhbwYJHM7qMTaKEbR22O3EA==)

November 3, 2025 at 6pm \- Training 3: Data - Talking to the Right Voters
* Gain insights into RNC data, follow data best practices, use data for voter targeting, and receive data center training.
* Register Here: [https://secure.anedot.com/negop/virtual-bootcamp-3](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YXyUowLJXaKPrk-h5IjHfR3B8yR1fm7ULFqDrwPJm8PQ5UDepQr-lNdXYdYj44lIXLF5QvzfFWgaNaHpv_uNbY1UMP72VDjDOv3trl-b72QA9MiR_KUn8LcDtO_ZyCvt23Os7v1MQUdggek624mKpHC-BfN7ktFqHsOItUjH0exa7WbJBFk9kT4YGEsAV2bg&c=OSeumTD7KqmPcW32rKD7t0IJUUu9Qc8vcogz27GqyeZjnoPzgzl3Ug==&ch=NUgqt2VbNCqUgAXJ02Ag9sHGoi9R7ZnkhbwYJHM7qMTaKEbR22O3EA==)

November 13, 2025 at 6pm - Training 4: Political - The Ground Game and Putting it All Together
* Build grassroots infrastructure, execute voter contact strategies, manage mail campaigns, implement absentee voting, early voting, and Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts to mobilize voters, along with election integrity.
* Register Here:[ https://secure.anedot.com/negop/virtual-bootcamp-4](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YXyUowLJXaKPrk-h5IjHfR3B8yR1fm7ULFqDrwPJm8PQ5UDepQr-lNdXYdYj44lIkKIW7SvqpF72nVKWPBe8TOBZoIBaWjoVm0dTByTOr1VDwrzEABU1KNJugWs9BYAAKk0sf93KT9AjkwGUHGu9WPSWf_vBA5hgYLuktDAIMbt0_5krmomXTHe8rb9pVJgq&c=OSeumTD7KqmPcW32rKD7t0IJUUu9Qc8vcogz27GqyeZjnoPzgzl3Ug==&ch=NUgqt2VbNCqUgAXJ02Ag9sHGoi9R7ZnkhbwYJHM7qMTaKEbR22O3EA==)

If you want to win, skip the guesswork - this is where it starts. Training, tools, and the roadmap to victory.
If you have questions, please reach out to Joe Hagerty at [political@ne.gop](mailto:political@ne.gop)
Sincerely, Joe Hagerty Political Director Nebraska Republican Party
---

| | | | NEGOP | 1610 N St. | Lincoln, NE 68508 US
---

name: Andy Kim
subject: Working for the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I believe we can do better. In fact, we must.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116717782/574202285/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlM2ExMi1jM2EyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K0axVgzBkeDNxnq1zhstsAhZFPrg2Nl6nPPHM1GkvVA=&emci=d1a840b6-b9a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=52de3a12-c3a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I ran for office because I believe government should be about one simple thing: **working for the people.** Too often, though, what folks see in Washington are politicians working for themselves, their donors, or their party leaders — and it erodes trust in our democracy. That trust is fragile right now. We've seen Republicans willing to shut down the government over healthcare, put personal gain over public service, and even undermine the Constitution itself. It's no wonder so many Americans feel like government doesn't care about them. But I believe we can do better. In fact, we must. Democracy is about good governance. It's about showing up every day to listen, to solve problems, and to put service above self. That's the only way we can restore trust and heal the divisions that threaten to tear us apart. I've tried to lead with that principle, and I'm grateful that people across New Jersey see that kind of leadership as valuable. Recent polling shows I've earned some of the strongest approval numbers of any statewide figure — not because of flashy politics, but because people want integrity, honesty, and results. **That's what I'll keep fighting for: a democracy that works for working families, not the wealthy and well-connected.** At the end of the day, democracy only works if we do. And I'm committed to doing the work. More soon, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
---

clean_body: I believe we can do better. In fact, we must. | | | | I ran for office because I believe government should be about one simple thing: working for the people. Too often, though, what folks see in Washington are politicians working for themselves, their donors, or their party leaders — and it erodes trust in our democracy. That trust is fragile right now. We've seen Republicans willing to shut down the government over healthcare, put personal gain over public service, and even undermine the Constitution itself. It's no wonder so many Americans feel like government doesn't care about them. But I believe we can do better. In fact, we must. Democracy is about good governance. It's about showing up every day to listen, to solve problems, and to put service above self. That's the only way we can restore trust and heal the divisions that threaten to tear us apart. I've tried to lead with that principle, and I'm grateful that people across New Jersey see that kind of leadership as valuable. Recent polling shows I've earned some of the strongest approval numbers of any statewide figure — not because of flashy politics, but because people want integrity, honesty, and results. That's what I'll keep fighting for: a democracy that works for working families, not the wealthy and well-connected. At the end of the day, democracy only works if we do. And I'm committed to doing the work. More soon, Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Congressman Mike Collins here.

And I've got something _**BIG**_ for you today.

🚨 President Trump just rolled out a plan to **ABOLISH** the IRS and **END** the income tax.

That's right, **NO MORE** seeing your paycheck gutted by Swamp bureaucrats.

No more watching Washington rob **YOU** to **_fund their pet projects, illegal immigrants, and foreign nations.

_** It's about time somebody gave the IRS the pink slip.

But guess who's panicking?

❌ The Socialist Democrats

❌ The RINOs in Congress

❌ Every Deep State pencil-pusher who's made a living off your back

They're **furious** because Trump's plan puts **YOU** , the American worker, the forgotten middle class, back on top.

Patriot, this is why I'm running for U.S. Senate.

Because if Chuck Schumer flips just **FOUR SEATS** , he **KILLS** Trump's plan dead in its tracks.

He'll pack the Court, kill the filibuster, and use the IRS like his personal attack dog against conservatives.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The mission is simple:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
We're gearing up to engage voters across the country ahead of next year's crucial midterm elections. That means meeting voters where they are , from young voters to voters of color to disabled voters who need mail-in ballots to cast a ballot.
With the ongoing threats to our right to vote and efforts to restrict access to the ballot, our work to mobilize these voters is more important than ever. That’s why we’re making it a priority to help potential new voters make a lifelong habit of voting, return lapsed voters to the process, and make sure long-term voters can still participate.
This work doesn't happen overnight , and getting people in every corner of the nation excited to vote requires a lot of resources. We're starting now, a year ahead of these elections, in order to make a worthwhile investment to reach voters however we can.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like what we, the people, want it to be. But to reach these voters and get them involved, we need your help .
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us reach every voter we can ahead of theses midterm elections? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100625_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100625_1&amount=35]
There's a lot we've started doing, but your support will give us the resources we need to keep it going from today through next year's critical mid-terms.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Turnout Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100625_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100625_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: A regular guy called to an extraordinary challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
“They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f050132bc654d64813a7c07782c1bd2&_e=V7bGufGxTt49_GEYnADBft7ZRORRkPE3g2nGnBm_moSefqZ5GMN3TRol5ZSaD0Le8u57-q0Nq77nBSvuR1Y7-pxK9seaD6vfxXQzoa74tzKecEzKmJE-Jw554_qVeCLLF48V2giNFXVuRgt06ITFTU6NJsw6VS1VGIlCP1CC2t2bD4K1DNzS4_ctAgi9L3qK3jyv_COTxkVakm3ZAiANnOEKCh2qMnhsucnXP-WeoiUB7LzEFynL_CeAquu_gNUJCIitJ_EcIVqZ_U4TREL4C5MQ3kwgAC0eE1JDuiERnE74iWEnF3xQKtm6kYnGn4zN3kIH4hRXt_dgaYu8_L31RobDSGATXYXGbYDbrBauhMnZ4u-O8r2RWjTAQyEfImfbPrw24lgv4-vvQ4hFqe_rFAf9L2mbXiM_a7eXzp6tkWvLAb2e28S21MFMW_Yl9FPdDd61jEW4FFRow3GvQ_YnYM7QTc23ZtzfBo5-ej6AzZnkLMYnXtjuewP60swV13RvGwXpEo-n2ld1tWBMHBq1zTSwgkteGjFZH1YhPH69aDMlSIpeEbrsQTiGUy5FwDqXqLzo5pkhqHESvI-FDKOXOSmbkU7BzSYmvRKwjmAcAoj-4Tbr__UKcMGdzun_DcuQM-nLjXbwfQ5M2pklP0NQUEbgV6NezSzPGtzsMdeZjL4ipTPdwrygF6JeIY_td2SEzGqT6WAQ003w6biLgE994GlhImGK59RGZgNDdRs-3X_m3XTqKDZHJ7kxDyoNa2iO7CZscxEMisUlKYweKVEEw77xTF0qmZ8HOBqBF41oYaw%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9f050132bc654d64813a7c07782c1bd2&_e=V7bGufGxTt49_GEYnADBft7ZRORRkPE3g2nGnBm_moSefqZ5GMN3TRol5ZSaD0Le8u57-q0Nq77nBSvuR1Y7-pxK9seaD6vfxXQzoa74tzKecEzKmJE-Jw554_qVeCLLF48V2giNFXVuRgt06ITFTU6NJsw6VS1VGIlCP1CC2t2bD4K1DNzS4_ctAgi9L3qK3jyv_COTxkVakm3ZAiANnOEKCh2qMnhsucnXP-WeoiUB7LzEFynL_CeAquu_gNUJCIitJ_EcIVqZ_U4TREL4C5MQ3kwgAC0eE1JDuiERnE6ehbxhCZTgG09v4nqBbf8IwHoGZSzzzRfOZ054DI7f9lUwbCMncBrm5vJsWltIADs-3UaSSzXppq_0M54rms2FPY-HswfwpGsI_tCRT2LKdKzkCQI1hNIjQ90vcuufZT8HvbFR8vBTMm3zdar44pK0zNGpMl69K9GwR40SZXfCvLLKZKtO1Hs1-3mLSamakWvwc3RzjtTYl5I4zfaUycRCEP6_o9MiCQkS_YaiZLhK5ysC7d3i_X5By3MvIWJvc5zOAHQGrUOQxHN7WaI5V25JW5g7nMqQE_fg7a6FnzG8KkZGDxiUuPReHEI1GrBgfKGMhD_HND_rtN40kDuJ5-rmgjuwAZoWWzU6NLWab9W2dK3mMuo5ki3JHJPnkgm_OEwSdBn-MrdizsDTnI1LmYFgHGqt_-ey3i_EOatkEzEN7wBspwWFhux5Oxa-nK_tkOZqPU1WVBHjnbHmVDoE9nB-ZWHYQC3p2Ec8pwkmxgcy3QqWpIEvSZQwVogNcVz3R_o%3D)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

clean_body: “They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | Fellow Conservative, They’re calling us “backward,” “extreme,” and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right. They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment. I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.** I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high. Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. . You have a choice. You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Never expected to get the cold shoulder from YOU
body:
Peter, is everything OK?

| | | | Peter, why have you been giving us the cold shoulder?
I know I’ve reached out this week about this issue.My team tells me they’ve texted and emailed at least twice too!
Is everything ok? Should we take the hint and assume you aren’t interested in these messages?
That would be truly shocking to me since you’ve always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump’s mission to save America, so I’m giving you one more chance!
[My ONLY request right now is that you complete the Official Trump Voter Profile before the end of the week.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.) Really, that’s it! I just need your feedback, nothing more! | [ SUBMIT MY TRUMP VOTER PROFILE ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

subject: Trump illegally deploys troops in Chicago and Portland.

body:
Trump is daring the nation to let him get away with it. Let’s prove that we won’t. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsOQ3qZrfmMeDv-5XRw6rCWZR_dB1eYwg8OvJtpUguCWn3bw6ja8crxAmylxL8ilC-PRu76nj6pOHObqbslm_yH-nv2hc3mLzO1KfH_GBtpphNBCjUSn_K9UdEVuhbml8rm5yCqxSQFn5aan8EutHQynjS-izDecv0kcIqvYJnhUbVSG2g-8wbJwpNPsJCaPfMk4H7z860GyN1a3mltYPzJ9QQnfKU87D-byau-qy8CJ7QK67AkG9Ebbtr9BDhkZCMXLZcFMfTEZtdsXuaE2WaL8Zw_SZ0JBv1tqIO8U2QisBhMcEj-L_YCxyFw3h7nJORIByQ-XgD5VCaW_wFrzfouDCI_00wzc0ZWRFZj41pCHL/4ki/-sar87uqSdya03ljFrEpEw/h0/h001.dCynaNiqRiQWzmPkQHKMAiQI6w-Efrxklu1bwrTB4Pg)
---
Trump's move to federalize state troops and deploy them in places like Portland and Chicago is a direct violation of the Constitution, which forbids using the military to police American civilians except for in times of invasion or rebellion. **He 's doing it anyway, breaking the law, trampling norms, and daring the courts to stop him.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsOQ3qZrfmMeDv-5XRw6rCWahswSu4LHzKHhpQkVVtB6BPY4_LtbRwSUQDi182gnT_NtqZhbbuNBkPn7ZPaDXpGxRLxTEezjI-gZgPwN3GKZSaX1-wwHUDcooWalJSQu9itb4iA8EqNf-TKWt6hV8OojYy_Vvg94iEfrilFNK1biHXr-FjTQr7l2LywFe0wFIBT17kCIODc0TCn2nNsr0k95y72xNx4qfAvaCh5_XxPHPDcft_KKPf5wEUW1_d-kal7WHUhKrbiwH7p-wrTt14enm_gCn1LeIlLrcgLPFCdE7HsFHfNJHvl6_HZIbDPET5diiwr57bTVfDQAp8yWQcPICrvoUWIwTlzChNnlvoH_E/4ki/-sar87uqSdya03ljFrEpEw/h1/h001.Rjozgw76vygj5nJ-LM5vsEux3uAFJq163e_dy9YOZS8)
---
The only good news? A federal judge has **_blocked_ **Trump's attempt to deploy National Guard troops from Texas and California into Portland, an illegal maneuver to send other states' troops into Democratic-led cities without consent. But the Trump administration is appealing this ruling as we speak, getting ready to set _**a dangerous precedent for the future of our democracy.**_ Governors like JB Pritzker and Gavin Newsom have called Trump's deployments what they are: **_invasions_.** These are not security measures. **They are power grabs, designed to create chaos, justify crackdowns, and crush resistance.** We can't stand by while Trump tears down every American norm and replaces our democracy with his personal rule. We need to fight back. **_In the courts, in the streets, and at the ballot box._** **[Chip in now to help us expose this authoritarian takeover and defend our democracy from Trump's illegal abuse of power. Every dollar goes to organizing, legal defense, and mobilizing the grassroots movement to stop this before it's too late.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DBeU2X_hC7i-AB5ypRc2qsOQ3qZrfmMeDv-5XRw6rCWboa-E2tvfdcasS1VkVZ46aqcj33X_3knrzjjTbLDA0pigHp3aeTl2GH1H_TiN8l9VXFst-OcgATN0LNroDBj1UfTdwZ-BNNrvzJTx5OQV2UhSUZYhey2_2D6dvDkWxvgMy78R0WgwLGC55DmdBP9ndDEsZVMSooKrJykJ89bGUWerGVndD-GynofV3oxiHKumZCtG1mvuISgIv1m53ISoY-luIKVFbSb5C1-EII1faVSQj0ldv_z4z5VzQhzL-qjI6QRyJI5WJPjsQZO-ad-BtL5HiDbQsDKn8xx9WPl-JyEUjg3nzAAXM3j1TAhCmsNtyAFJvqffSUoZff6JIqXS6/4ki/-sar87uqSdya03ljFrEpEw/h2/h001.AhA1hmmEkejsWtGSjZlsiE5U1a58NQIGzq9hKkI7F7k)**

clean_body: Trump is daring the nation to let him get away with it. Let’s prove that we won’t. | | Trump's move to federalize state troops and deploy them in places like Portland and Chicago is a direct violation of the Constitution, which forbids using the military to police American civilians except for in times of invasion or rebellion. He 's doing it anyway, breaking the law, trampling norms, and daring the courts to stop him. | The only good news? A federal judge has blocked Trump's attempt to deploy National Guard troops from Texas and California into Portland, an illegal maneuver to send other states' troops into Democratic-led cities without consent. But the Trump administration is appealing this ruling as we speak, getting ready to set a dangerous precedent for the future of our democracy. Governors like JB Pritzker and Gavin Newsom have called Trump's deployments what they are: invasions. These are not security measures. They are power grabs, designed to create chaos, justify crackdowns, and crush resistance. We can't stand by while Trump tears down every American norm and replaces our democracy with his personal rule. We need to fight back. In the courts, in the streets, and at the ballot box. Thank you, together we can stop these attacks on American cities. -Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind 1030 15th St NW #404 Washington, DC 20005 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . The fact is, if his criminal record weren’t exposed, Jones would continue LYING to your face about gaming our justice system. Jay Jones thinks the rules don't apply to him. body:
Three critical U.S. Senate elections in 2026 are one step away from TOSS UP
#
Peter,
Do you know what **Maine, New Hampshire,** and **Ohio** have in common?
**All of these states have battleground U.S. Senate races happening _right now_ — and they’re all one step away from being classified as TOSS UPS!**
**[ELECT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96367?refcode=em20251006-9530&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9530%2E614464%2E6XrV8f)**

subject: The Cinderella comeback for Dems in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
We’re up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch. But he didn’t see this coming.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e8VaFcFyCZ_G8sDqWIbrgqy7d_4XxQZqzxL6tyUdVIdSzvusVxbfr98-NC-IYq2cLNVytNhIpoxRgews3lQSjdzjvoDGex410pgCJn0w3hJeSrofNj389yuSGKNm8X9Qmd--JIpirSBqrhT0RQSms6sPACOi3clO46AejhVlZlQX4s2z-_HtfpKsNbBjoSDm3W5ems0QOQpNNOG0aEPQgamQu0LGxSIA2qmCOxu-6E8=&c=JH2FiiJcDoQhCEypQhhULqX8YCnrtQs3Wu9qSVBSp79P86vuepPs0Q==&ch=lCqQb2msBzojw_qWDbyBoD-Ri3Bo2onEq6tMyhNriwsAnVGFK0MOYg==)
---
| Peter,
With MAGA control of the White House, House, Senate, and Supreme Court, MAGA has backed Democrats into the corner--delivering one cheap shot after another.
The Supreme Court is giving Trump free reign. Soldiers are in our streets. Mass arrests. Suppression of freedom of speech. Corporations and news networks bending their knee to the administration.
We're up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch.
On November 4th, the fate of our Democracy will be decided in an obscure State Supreme Court election in Pennsylvania.
If Trump topples the court's three vote liberal majority next month, he takes control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state for the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democratic ballots from being counted, and may even ban Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e8VaFcFyCZ_G8sDqWIbrgqy7d_4XxQZqzxL6tyUdVIdSzvusVxbfr98-NC-IYq2cLNVytNhIpoxRgews3lQSjdzjvoDGex410pgCJn0w3hJeSrofNj389yuSGKNm8X9Qmd--JIpirSBqrhT0RQSms6sPACOi3clO46AejhVlZlQX4s2z-_HtfpKsNbBjoSDm3W5ems0QOQpNNOG0aEPQgamQu0LGxSIAoPvRDldxsOY=&c=JH2FiiJcDoQhCEypQhhULqX8YCnrtQs3Wu9qSVBSp79P86vuepPs0Q==&ch=lCqQb2msBzojw_qWDbyBoD-Ri3Bo2onEq6tMyhNriwsAnVGFK0MOYg==)
---
Trump has MAGA billionaires in his corner for this fight. Only days ago, MAGA dark money PAC's appeared seemingly out of nowhere in PA, suddenly flooding the airwaves and mailboxes with tens of millions of dollars in advertisements.
And these billionaires aren't fighting fair either. They are sending PA Democrats intentionally deceptive mailers to try and trick them into voting to oust the Democratic justices by saying that voting no (the MAGA position) will "protect women's rights" and that the Justices "protect pedophiles."
Trump and MAGA billionaires are throwing their haymaker, fully expecting it to land and Democracy to fall. But they didn't see this coming.
Defend Our Courts has rallied democrats from across the nation to come to PA's aid. Having now raised nearly 2.5 million dollars via 100,000 small dollar contributions from 50,000 unique donors, we have caught MAGA completely off-guard and are delivering crushing counterpunches in PA--proving that Democrats aren't out of the fight yet.
But with only 29 days left in the election, there are only a few rounds left and we're down on the scorecards. If the election were held today, Trump would win. But with you in our corner, we can make a historic comeback:
[Can I count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even $10 to help Defend Our Courts save Democracy and win this critical Supreme Court fight?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e8VaFcFyCZ_G8sDqWIbrgqy7d_4XxQZqzxL6tyUdVIdSzvusVxbfr98-NC-IYq2cm0xoDI_tgt-v8OFSaFMXwfSynUop1XIUWFSIwrMrZ79tfdcp3Nr-KPgVAYYeBY-C-iG7uFX5t2uKZD-B62SdtXViZDmNCTxwQAsr-IQeyHpGFPM9CYnViqL5WjM31yVDbDO1DRJmL0wPkMf3XvFlUfsCihTiyt_fmMTw4QIvWViPEkaTYV31AzXM0PoD8e6K&c=JH2FiiJcDoQhCEypQhhULqX8YCnrtQs3Wu9qSVBSp79P86vuepPs0Q==&ch=lCqQb2msBzojw_qWDbyBoD-Ri3Bo2onEq6tMyhNriwsAnVGFK0MOYg==)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Buckle up… Challenge accepted.
body:

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: We’re calling on Republicans to work with us to reopen the government
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
House Republicans cancelled votes and skipped town just before last night’s funding deadline.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116723632/574221440/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDExYmViYy1jYWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-gsJMnux1DhQ5ABRn4bn9fGFbuD0BETC77iLvTVgSo=) I’ll keep this quick: It’s day six of Trump and Republicans’ government shutdown — and there’s still no sign of them coming back to the table to fix the mess they’ve made. So I’m calling on Republicans — who hold the majority in both chambers (!!!) — to come back to work, and negotiate a deal that reopens the government _**AND**_ prevents your health care premiums from doubling. **[Donald Trump and Republicans think they can get away with SHUTTING DOWN our government and putting politics above the American people. I won’t let that happen. That’s why I’m calling on 1,500 supporters to join my fight and confirm their opposition to Republicans' latest scheme by adding your name to the petition below. Can I count on seeing your name on the list? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116723633/574221441/-1753458613?refcode=email_100625_shutdownday6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDExYmViYy1jYWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-gsJMnux1DhQ5ABRn4bn9fGFbuD0BETC77iLvTVgSo=&emci=c3ebd580-78a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d011bebc-caa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116723634/574221442/-1753458613?refcode=email_100625_shutdownday6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDExYmViYy1jYWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-gsJMnux1DhQ5ABRn4bn9fGFbuD0BETC77iLvTVgSo=&emci=c3ebd580-78a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d011bebc-caa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**
---
Here’s the deal:
If Republicans refuse to take action, it could mean the difference between hundreds of thousands of Americans having health care coverage or going through life uninsured.
_That’s simply unacceptable. _
Look, Democrats aren’t asking for a lot. But health care is a matter of life and death for many, and this issue must be taken seriously.
**[If you agree that Republicans should stop playing politics, and should work with Democrats to pass a spending plan that reopens the federal government – while also keeping your health care costs low – then I’m asking you to join my fight today! I’m calling on 1,500 supporters to add their name before midnight tonight, and I would love to see your name on the list of supporters. Can I count on your signature? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116723635/574221443/-1753458613?refcode=email_100625_shutdownday6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDExYmViYy1jYWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-gsJMnux1DhQ5ABRn4bn9fGFbuD0BETC77iLvTVgSo=&emci=c3ebd580-78a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d011bebc-caa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=5643047)**

name: Rob Bonta
subject: News: Trump-appointed judge granted emergency relief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Breaking news for you: the U.S. District Court has blocked the Trump administration from unlawfully deploying federalized California National Guard troops to Oregon.
We filed a lawsuit seeking this emergency relief yesterday afternoon — and within hours, the court granted it.
When we fight, with the law on our side, we can win.
This is a major step in the right direction in our fight against Trump and Hegseth’s abuses of military power — but the fight goes on. Will you chip in any amount to help us hold this lawless administration accountable to the law? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Trump’s move to deploy California National Guard troops to Portland — over the objection of our governor *and* over the objection of Oregon’s governor — is well outside the norms or practices of ANY president in recent memory.
But as we’ve seen before, and we’ll undoubtedly see again: Trump is determined to take as much power as the courts will let him.
That’s why this work is so important.
I am fully committed to making sure Trump and Hegseth don’t turn our cities into their military training grounds and weaponize our troops for their political gains.
But I need your support to keep this work up. Will you contribute today so we can continue securing critical wins for our cities, our states, our people, and our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for your support — I can’t do this without you.
—Rob

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f97dae11ca43412d99eaa10331286dee&_e=dqwtqCUlnDsaR3avfAUHX8NlZ2ro4uCprip-p8kCI_VfT5EaMZl3O4E5kDNRyNuLKUDVFwWrflFLymjj93xJoH72XyE5g2shEeNf59AcAhMJw8MctsObXIwDh8Z9kD5Yp5s2WjarjipDQOwWZIc-gRi91xojbnYvpTjnERPYLi9vtWqbTl03pxgJ6F-4iFri6cEboOKRs5w3-sDxIH1q9hAXAlrw9-LjqOEVKUw4MbMJ1CRoe4S6-6ZXkw0WjUON9ycMrJ7-5NABtiWBSAESrBojQWIFPqeWLJx7yGzkHbXOfs9TQfXK4e8NWUKzu5EQgfpEey_yxWWQE7_y2rJxe06KGcP63wh5LKYfI4jfUJO4fVfaf_klkUJMMpN5jQk7FEvtxEXkPtdY7JrjuvF646UUDo6pErwiTmqRjZpoEMI0fO3TI84hn7TTccOdVuhuiyuZnKF1niw_RNLHjrUNDcTc3oiX7bd6-Wc8azWm10OiOLWdndl--mozNTUD7Vh3mUBCAQBpgOCHczSuWP2Voglej1cTmXixIIx3O9X0Ssv0qmnbXj0YRIc3mPPWsdKb6B024HfAPrOhtzA818lYA0ztvZ1OPj2er9S_U_eiIBNNq2mvaVxBVdtMpHJVjCDzIhT3ELIRXLzKszKA3VbYsIA9RUouugkJGe8RIQ0NmoE%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f97dae11ca43412d99eaa10331286dee&_e=dqwtqCUlnDsaR3avfAUHX8NlZ2ro4uCprip-p8kCI_VfT5EaMZl3O4E5kDNRyNuLKUDVFwWrflFLymjj93xJoH72XyE5g2shEeNf59AcAhMJw8MctsObXIwDh8Z9kD5Yp5s2WjarjipDQOwWZIc-gRi91xojbnYvpTjnERPYLi9vtWqbTl03pxgJ6F-4iFri6cEboOKRs5w3-sDxIH1q9hAXAlrw9-LjqOEVKUw4MbMBhx6YP0Tw98o441kPMTVi2ySQUyIQKt7ayppjDj4dwctnSXmf711MTgU5Tf1QLiOeZK_DJi7PXgpk7YyPnu1nVHXoT08tFqQqwW0tM7f1EgOcIZrY8EiYcSt-yga5ZhK2Y6GTjsAC-Rl5h2e25eYz2F2HIW2QLEAQUiDDSV1ubu8bq62PPEueTHfMUOvKA0WZwWAx7GZvwS2OqvRwG4C14rPF4dsdntx0Mv8cRd2fUdTixcvYeELrqQLS7i4dHO_LSfsWvTXljbJ8qF4kS0frEjI__Kxu974dPOqKTqNZPWOMmsh4NbWVvOcKFSW5EQvnb7K1Hp3jZzzFJLBIYZM28ZHptqOYxUWcBbHEPQg7NV3ZeFcZK3KADxYzRLd2dELO_hLxOOd-__kd1sSWN4neqYsBZIskscVJYNDpoGv03YWH9PBgzBm1qaIkl_aeK-g%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9044%2E5257348%2EGLiL_3 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

As I write this, Donald Trump and Russ Vought — architect of Project 2025
and current director of the Office of Management and Budget — are slashing
government programs and eliminating federal jobs to punish Trump’s
enemies.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251006_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9044%2E5257348%2EGLiL_3 ]Donald Trump on Truth Social: I have a meeting today with Russ Vought,
he of PROJECT 2025 Fame, to determine which of the many Democrat Agencies,
most of which are a political SCAM, he recommends to be cut, and whether
or not those cuts will be temporary or permanent. I can't believe the
Radical Left Democrats gave me this unprecedented opportunity. They are
not stupid people, so maybe this is their way of wanting to, quietly and
quickly, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! President DJT

It demonstrates just how broken our democracy is.

They’ve already announced cuts: $8 billion lost for green energy programs,
including over a dozen in California, and $18 billion dedicated to
infrastructure projects in NYC is gone.

Even more cuts are on the way — in blue states, only. These ‘Democrat
Agencies,’ as Trump calls them, are not scams or fraud or waste or abuse.
They are vital programs to modernize our economy, support families
struggling to get by, and so much more.

But Trump doesn’t care. In fact, he wants to hurt you. He is once again
abusing the powers of the president to go after his political opponents.

The pain is massive. To our economy, our planet, our families, our
democracy. And Trump just doesn’t care, and in fact, he is reveling in it.

Derek, we
absolutely cannot back down from fighting this blatant corruption. We
cannot let Trump and Vought slash programs at will to go after their
opponents.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20251006_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9044%2E5257348%2EGLiL_3 ]Pitch in to help strengthen our efforts as we fight this corruption.

They are vital programs to modernize our economy, support families struggling to get by, and so much more. But Trump doesn’t care. In fact, he wants to hurt you. He is once again abusing the powers of the president to go after his political opponents. The pain is massive. To our economy, our planet, our families, our democracy. And Trump just doesn’t care, and in fact, he is reveling in it. Derek, we absolutely cannot back down from fighting this blatant corruption. We cannot let Trump and Vought slash programs at will to go after their opponents. [ ]Pitch in to help strengthen our efforts as we fight this corruption. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Something is terribly wrong when a president can illegally suspend projects for blue states to punish his political enemies. But if Trump and his admin think we will sit back while they break the law, they’re sorely mistaken. It will only harden our resolve. More soon as we fight this corruption, Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: This shutdown is a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
We’re now days into a government shutdown — all because Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress would rather burn the whole thing down than work with Democrats to make health care affordable.
Unless Congress acts, millions of Americans will see their health insurance premiums more than double next year. Certain Affordable Care Act subsidies that Democrats expanded in 2021 are set to expire — but when we fought to renew them, the White House’s response was literally — and I’m not joking — “go f*ck yourself.”
Earlier this week, after refusing to swear in Congresswoman-elect Grijalva and shutting down the House, Speaker Mike Johnson said he “quite literally [has] nothing to negotiate” with Democrats.
That tells you everything you need to know about whether they’re negotiating in good faith.
Meanwhile, Trump is threatening mass firings and promising to cut so-called “Democrat agencies” — which seems to mean any agency that actually helps people??
So instead of making health care more affordable and keeping the government open, here’s what Trump chose instead:
— No food safety checks on what’s in your fridge
— Longer TSA lines and fewer air traffic controllers on duty
— National parks locked up or piling up trash
— Passports and visas stuck in limbo
— Farmers and small businesses cut off from federal loans
— Cancer trials and disease research on hold
— Disaster relief delayed when Americans need it most
— Service members, FBI agents, and border patrol working without pay
— Outbreak monitoring slowed
All because Trump and Republicans would rather shut down the government than do their jobs working for the American people. Republicans would rather sabotage basic services than support working families. And while they walk away from the negotiating table and hide from their constituents, Democrats are still fighting — to protect your care, your benefits, and Congress’ constitutional power of the purse.
It might seem like there’s not much you can do right now, but the truth is there’s actually a lot! We need to turn up the pressure and make it impossible for Republicans and this administration to ignore us.
So, call your elected officials and keep calling until this shutdown ends. If your representative is a Democrat, tell them you support what they’re doing. If your representative is a Republican, demand they come to the negotiating table. Join a peaceful protest near you. Volunteer your time in your community. Help a local candidate knock on doors in your community before Election Day.
And if you’re able, chip in to my campaign so I can continue my work holding Trump and Republicans accountable, and flip the House next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
The louder our voices, the harder it will be for Trump and his allies to keep putting extremist politics over people’s lives.
Thanks for speaking out.
—Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Katie Porter
subject: EMILY’s List endorsed our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
As a single mom of three, I’ve seen firsthand how hard it can be to get by.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)
Peter,
I am proud to share that EMILY’s List — the nation’s largest resource for women in politics — just endorsed our campaign.
I’m so grateful to have them on our side. **[Can you join them by chipping in $5 to our campaign for governor today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251006_1_ak?refcode=em20251006-40246&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40246_3422442_MCESv_&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251006_1_ak?refcode=em20251006-40246&refcode2=40246_3422442_MCESv_&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)
Supporting women and families is one of the reasons I got into politics. As a single mom of three, I’ve seen firsthand how hard it can be to get by. Fighting for women’s rights means more than protecting reproductive freedom — it means taking bold action to lower costs and making sure California women don't just get by, but get ahead.
I’m running for governor to make sure we tackle these issues with the urgency they deserve — investing in child care, lowering housing costs, expanding health care, and fighting back against Trump’s efforts to take away our rights. That’s how we make sure all women have the freedom to pursue the American dream right here in California.
Running in a state as large as California takes serious resources. EMILY’s List is with us — but to build the broad coalition we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you.
**[Will you donate $5 today to help us build a California that protects and invests in women? Each dollar helps us reach more voters, fight back against attacks, and grow the support we need to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251006_1_ak?refcode=em20251006-40246&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40246_3422442_MCESv_&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251006_1_ak?refcode=em20251006-40246&refcode2=40246_3422442_MCESv_&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251006-40246&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40246_3422442_MCESv_&akid=40246%2E3422442%2EMCESv_)**
