name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: MAGA shut down our government. Now we fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | Friend — Right now, thousands of Virginians are being forced out of work because **Trump and MAGA extremists in Washington decided to shut down our government.** They’re holding our economy hostage with reckless demands, playing political games while families here in Virginia are left without paychecks. Federal workers, military families, small businesses — **_our neighbors_** — are all suffering because they do not care about our jobs, our government, or our economic health. _This shutdown is proof of what’s at stake in every election._ If they can grind the federal government to a halt, imagine what else they’ll do if we don’t stop them at the ballot box. **Our next chance to show Trump and MAGA extremists that we’re fighting back is November’s elections, right here in Virginia ... and I’m running in a toss-up, red to blue race to expand our 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates.** We need leaders who will fight for working families, not tear our government apart for political theater. We need leaders who understand that when government shuts down, people get hurt. _The best way to fight back is to organize, to mobilize, and to win this election._ **[I’m a mom, social worker, and union leader running to flip VA-HD21. Chip in today to send a message loud and clear: Virginia won’t be bullied by MAGA extremists.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JT2e6-gM7kf7A7fsl5ASH3iXLT6DTWZ-vDkC8lqP1kRUG36-b8hagNrTK36vpkgyG8K8fEl6VWVFD1vkKCF4nOAmpUY7lkPyrpr2UaBNrYqE7GEhR4jrwErKVdt8ab-9QopBTvQkFBjTSz6ZQ-AWJ3Akt9RvXrj7QjToGeelJAcSa02MRqy9k6L15tH_v6KjTpZz3yByH9fwJXr1MZ09tpzU3MYjHT9WyxQMUMa4Tb3XMt4bQXVcqF6VNKIN2U7E-2-6ZNFGx3rM9ja9aeyH4Q/4ki/2K_Y8IlLQg2cJ1drsTS2dg/h0/h001.kH4XWjVEAwAIQaC6bPNTW_FzQEZO32kJGtryQJgJJVM)** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Friend — Right now, thousands of Virginians are being forced out of work because Trump and MAGA extremists in Washington decided to shut down our government. They’re holding our economy hostage with reckless demands, playing political games while families here in Virginia are left without paychecks. Federal workers, military families, small businesses — our neighbors — are all suffering because they do not care about our jobs, our government, or our economic health. This shutdown is proof of what’s at stake in every election. If they can grind the federal government to a halt, imagine what else they’ll do if we don’t stop them at the ballot box. Our next chance to show Trump and MAGA extremists that we’re fighting back is November’s elections, right here in Virginia ... and I’m running in a toss-up, red to blue race to expand our 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. We need leaders who will fight for working families, not tear our government apart for political theater. We need leaders who understand that when government shuts down, people get hurt. The best way to fight back is to organize, to mobilize, and to win this election. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We deserve a government that works — for all of us. Let’s fight back and build it together. With resolve, Elizabeth Guzman P.S. ** | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Government shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su)

Friend -
As you likely know, the federal government is currently in a shutdown. The reason for that is because President Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill” has placed Michigan into a health care crisis. The cost of health care was bad before, and now, starting this month, everyone reading this is about to get a notice of a rise in health care costs for January 1, 2026. Trump is making us poorer and sicker in the nine months he has been in office.
**I did not support the Republican Continuing Resolution on the floor of the U.S. Senate.** Republicans need 60 votes to pass a bipartisan budget, and this funding bill had no input from Democrats. They didn’t come and talk to us, but somehow hoped we’d vote to support their plan. Since July, I have been very clear: any conversation about my vote needs to start with health care.
Look, Republicans control the White House, Senate, and the House – so I understand that negotiations won’t result in Democrats getting everything we want. But serious adults can sit down, negotiate in good faith, and pass a budget. We saw this happen with the Michigan State Budget just the other day.
To be clear, we don’t know how President Trump is going to handle a government shutdown. Right now, his Administration is illegally cancelling federal funding to major infrastructure projects. But as Democrats, now is the time to stand up and use our voices. And there are few more important fights to have than lowering costs for health care.
I have gotten many questions about the practical effects of the shutdown on Michigan. While the shutdown is taking place, Social Security benefits will still go out, Medicare and Medicaid benefits will continue, veterans’ benefits will continue, and U.S. Passport Agency and U.S.-Canada border crossings will be staffed. But as the shutdown goes on, certainly things can change.
**More personally, I have made the decision to withhold my salary for the duration of the shutdown.** Passing a bipartisan budget is a core function of Congress, and until that happens, I will join our troops and federal workers in not accepting a salary until the shutdown is over – hopefully soon.
We all know that this is uncharted territory. But as Michigan’s Senator, I feel that it is my responsibility and obligation to make life better for our middle class. And right now that means doing everything in my power to lower health care costs.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content – like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 – so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-oct25.AEuu71&refcode=em251006-1&t=2&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-oct25.MR79jx&refcode=em251006-1&t=3&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-oct25.AEuu71&refcode=em251006-1&t=4&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su)**
---
****

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=2358%2E135344%2ERZ_5su)

As a Federal candidate and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She is not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

name: John Kasich
subject: A new way to communicate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Join today - I believe we need more spaces where people can come together, slow down, listen to others and think about what really matters.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/DApimzG8yz1TBN-XX0dOiM_ysimjMlgZhTk3qch80ozoRtFE2LthKIDKUBoNaoihBC8J2wt6uBSsuRKEwUbqCxWxnXoRvKIc6DDKWNBHh9VG7Mqk3USUQ5jF6OD7DVL9dd9s8vubplyKvtZ5Nc2ICnG-_lAeZYArK_GnZEXXyTbNm8jTTolE583FeuX5o2b1yjwmzPCHF7EDBjdRJ_nYnqSLkfI4Ta63ozsaSZo4zZerkZzB_DlVal8_c4JmiBZZfoDwTazYza8j6trwLefg7POpBpJ4-XCxONsA3soM4jup4OekYeMy6OxEgOTUqyRuZRyUW_puy6o5FQo27IwGgwUxvROAXse3kLtTM_L313-Gx5xYf-Gzpujw-aRo/logrYa6J-sSQD9WryWbO2ph0dwRyfcQA/13)
---
Peter, In my life of public service, I’ve tried to do one thing: **Keep the Faith**. Faith in our country. Faith in one another. Faith that even in unsettled times, we can look past what pulls us apart and focus instead on the principles that unite us, and maybe improve lives and provide hope in these fractious times.

I don’t claim to have all the answers, but I’ve been blessed with experiences that range from the Ohio Senate and Congress to the Governor’s office and two runs for president. Rising from humble beginnings to those roles has given me a perspective on life that few get to see, and my time as an author, commentator, and in the financial industry has helped round it out. Through it all, I’ve tried to speak honestly, listen carefully, and look for ways to bring people together. And I keep searching for new ways to share a message of hope and common purpose.

[**That’s why I’ve joined Substack**](http://links.johnkasich.com/s/c/e9SLdUBZL9hSHcqVbgY1kxTeTQHMOLzM3KB4ORDC5kjMpzV7vJRtkRsXnS1jkdU314Iz9tWpfkq0RC_6ITwRiujxP2txvAfS1N7E7lJbsKKfq1mf44GKWRl2d4SZKCGzXFbmXilg236HHVB2fULVBlB-Fho2gytNt1_qn4bReZYROA7P5OIDDlOC2VaUvanMT4ui33m5vuK7lgFg6vUVz1aXZywbaz60SzUUlHKhTG45OP3XRC5UUKMHkxzM4juYMsjF3srY0z3jIPcp_hZD2A1zOwr9hQ9gw9D6qdDzbm6zHLdWdejKJxsASsRd8XARDSuSrpE_7rPytev8pMxv35RPPTyXaHSZeSQMr6gmdTQBNCS4JAyeKTj7hqpk/Xj4c4XFtN00a-6_dJb7d2ii3WGdCprK5/13). I believe we need more spaces where people can come together, slow down, listen to others and think about what really matters.
I will use this tool to share reflections on the issues facing our country - sometimes politics, sometimes faith, sometimes just the human side of life. I want to explore how we can move forward with hope, fairness, and decency in these divided times.

**You’ll hear directly from me without the noise, the spin, or the endless back-and-forth that too often dominates public debate**. My hope is that it feels like a real conversation, one where it’s okay to say, “I hadn’t thought about it that way” or even, “You may be right.” At its best, it will lift you up, challenge you, and help us all remember what we share in common.
---

clean_body: Join today - I believe we need more spaces where people can come together, slow down, listen to others and think about what really matters.| | | Peter, In my life of public service, I’ve tried to do one thing: Keep the Faith. Faith in our country. Faith in one another. Faith that even in unsettled times, we can look past what pulls us apart and focus instead on the principles that unite us, and maybe improve lives and provide hope in these fractious times. I don’t claim to have all the answers, but I’ve been blessed with experiences that range from the Ohio Senate and Congress to the Governor’s office and two runs for president. Rising from humble beginnings to those roles has given me a perspective on life that few get to see, and my time as an author, commentator, and in the financial industry has helped round it out. Through it all, I’ve tried to speak honestly, listen carefully, and look for ways to bring people together. And I keep searching for new ways to share a message of hope and common purpose. . I believe we need more spaces where people can come together, slow down, listen to others and think about what really matters. I will use this tool to share reflections on the issues facing our country - sometimes politics, sometimes faith, sometimes just the human side of life. I want to explore how we can move forward with hope, fairness, and decency in these divided times. You’ll hear directly from me without the noise, the spin, or the endless back-and-forth that too often dominates public debate. My hope is that it feels like a real conversation, one where it’s okay to say, “I hadn’t thought about it that way” or even, “You may be right.” At its best, it will lift you up, challenge you, and help us all remember what we share in common. My faith has always reminded me to look for light, even in the darkest places, as a way forward. I hope this opportunity will do the same for you. Let’s keep the faith together! -John | | | Get the Latest Updates: | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

name: Scott P. Brown
subject: It’s not always easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc
body:
and that made me a target.
I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream.
| | Peter, It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up. **_I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream._** I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything.
---
| [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5040b91e12f74eef85255e241314842f&_e=_Ikc6NNVH0VE8PjWNMhDSKy7hupL_hf5sHTEKYgbxhSot9Ev4s0BeLl2yysAJVHQwKzZj-MO5UJCNLDIbwylX2TFLj-5dIW-QnbgExq_yoO6EH0IB2EMG569s8t9aHyiJMypMwBSq9pT7HphWADzQPOS8A8Ym2jN8UE7oHnmfvOGXfYagcQ7rr88dW4QZCpIMj75aJkTC-8vrf0Dub7kvC0VzAyqm-AauffIIAJHeMqtBsk7p9B187l6UBxS92zge1xHVCg1LBa03IXGViDZ1c0KAYwDJonhC8ieE4uaUD0Tc_nNKm168FTn0zpsXfMbKt7PBl9gJlXjFMRYM2nMyoF4gUW6ZJLUY99qKP8hGG64jB9Aj5ZqCGxrKfQrHHWYu5hJ1_snhj8MZm65qIvXnBOgwPk4l9LDFvPiNOkA38ErzuNILM7VLALrSrwjjwxE46Bs50rJuxsRXKwC2WR_Fd9a7-50Qlh4ZHfy5eYaBNThTEu64DZLeMQk4sEr9Yaf-bOgtQ3Fvf_va2RUWkXQIQPXIRTJhDi_v9i90oZnPXZlKWxxsSnHM60Gvnu3N2cu1U18PfFWexK3MdmaGN84nq8h03V843UeH462r6MdzeIieCzx99f0u-y0CzzHIqNOBQUWR74zDTA9qd0ypR-eWX577nkRbWjFb4k3A2QrVa6DmxHUyoAK9oDt3ckNVjL8nX3IzBnVux29n6mwvVNaAcB6C99_rV5qlqbWKlPlhVP5-uW_-2IDV0UawW6oRmWxC3sBEaAvQbVcro0RcJeNbFfPp01UOYtqzXxzpskn7FNjJq52zPYh23O3AIRDK8y1gKnqkf_90d7gvxFS1qJsPDTuEUkm-Oq_b6grK0Xh1R-DJK2V8ycPrHWAskhmBexBPyItb7YE5ZBH_4VqVMesnI-pkJHWVxajJxah6W5Qek0FsUYQz1t2xxKJDP-bXoh2)

It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work. **_Nothing was ever handed to me._** I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel.

In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. Democrats poured millions into defeating me, and eventually, they did.

clean_body: and that made me a target. I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream. | | Peter, It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up. I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream. I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything. | It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work. Nothing was ever handed to me. I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel. In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. Democrats poured millions into defeating me, and eventually, they did. But I never stopped serving. I became a grandfather, poured myself into my New Hampshire community, and later represented America as U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand and Samoa. If we’ve learned anything over the last few years, it’s this: when Democrats are in control, things fall apart FAST. > >Inflation spikes, our borders are left WIDE OPEN to criminals and terrorists, our standing on the world stage weakens, and hardworking families are left behind. >> That’s why I’m stepping back into the fight — because we must keep the Senate in Republican hands, and we must keep electing strong, conservative leaders who will stand up for American values. I know the value of a dollar, and how hard you and I have worked every day of our lives to create prosperity for ourselves and our families , so I wouldn’t be asking you today if your URGENT donation did not make a BIG difference in flipping this Senate seat. The New Hampshire Senate race could tip control of the entire U.S. Senate and finally halt the “lawfare” targeting President Trump, his team, and YOUR freedoms. If we win in New Hampshire, we can stop the Left’s agenda in its tracks. If we lose... they’ll have free rein for years to come. Every patriot’s support is critical. If we win, we keep President Trump’s majority. If we lose, the Democrats will seize the Senate and launch a relentless campaign to cripple his presidency – political lawfare, sham investigations, and a total blockade on his policies. We have no time to waste if we’re going to show the Radical Left they don’t stand a CHANCE of flipping the Senate majority. I understand money can be tight these days, Peter. That’s why I would not ask if it was not absolutely necessary to raise early funds NOW in order to win this seat. Your support means the world to me, and I’m so grateful. If you’re unable to give at this time, I understand. But if you can spare any amount, now is the time to do so. Thank you for your time, for reading my story, and for joining this fight for the future of America. Scott P. Brown Candidate for U.S. Senate New Hampshire Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc. Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Army or the Department of Defense. PO Box 606 Rye, NH 03870

name: Addison McDowell
subject: YOU deserve the praise on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McDowell for Congress _Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
| | | We did it, Friend! We hit our End-of-Quarter fundraising goal—** _and it’s all thanks to supporters like you._** 🫵 When I say you are the heartbeat of this movement—I mean it. Your support has ensured our campaign is strong, focused, and ready for the fight ahead in 2026. As I am sure you know, Democrats have shut down the government, all to push their reckless America-Last agenda—like demanding free healthcare for illegal immigrants and taxpayer funding for their woke media allies. **Let me be clear: Republicans will never bow to these demands. Our duty is to represent YOU, the American people—and American workers don’t support their wishlist of nonsense.** 🇺🇸 I will never back down.🇺🇸 I will keep driving our movement forward.🇺🇸 I will always put America FIRST. **_Your support, quite literally, makes this possible. _** Thank You & God Bless,
---
---
Addison McDowell **Congressman | NC-06**
---
| |

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Prices are up, the economy is down
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
My Republican colleagues, on the other hand, fled town and refused to come to the negotiating table.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116729411/574239077/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTg5MzE4Ni1kNGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yrAUOoZ0-HWletJzeexqe7mDsOStq0z4qTX0_szGdpo=&emci=4327d377-d09f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=41893186-d4a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Democrats were in D.C. until midnight on September 30 trying to get a deal to avoid the damage Trump and Republicans are doing and keep the government open.** My Republican colleagues, on the other hand, fled town and refused to come to the negotiating table. Their position is that we should do nothing to address the health care crisis and a struggling economy. Prices are up, the economy is down, and now Republicans in Congress have shut down the government to double down on the health care crisis they created. On the first day of the government shutdown, I met with Washington Health Benefit Exchange leaders and other state health care groups to hear about the local impacts of President Trump and my Republican colleagues gutting Medicaid and letting essential health care tax credits expire. Northwest Washington cannot afford skyrocketing health care costs. Because of the Trump administration, hard-working families are facing the prospect of having to choose between paying rent, buying groceries, or going to the doctor. I, alongside House Democrats, am holding fast and will continue to fight to lower the cost of health care and the cost of living. More soon, _Rick_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: My Republican colleagues, on the other hand, fled town and refused to come to the negotiating table. | | | | Democrats were in D.C. until midnight on September 30 trying to get a deal to avoid the damage Trump and Republicans are doing and keep the government open. My Republican colleagues, on the other hand, fled town and refused to come to the negotiating table. Their position is that we should do nothing to address the health care crisis and a struggling economy. Prices are up, the economy is down, and now Republicans in Congress have shut down the government to double down on the health care crisis they created. On the first day of the government shutdown, I met with Washington Health Benefit Exchange leaders and other state health care groups to hear about the local impacts of President Trump and my Republican colleagues gutting Medicaid and letting essential health care tax credits expire. Northwest Washington cannot afford skyrocketing health care costs. Because of the Trump administration, hard-working families are facing the prospect of having to choose between paying rent, buying groceries, or going to the doctor. I, alongside House Democrats, am holding fast and will continue to fight to lower the cost of health care and the cost of living. More soon, Rick | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Pritzker and Johnson Could Face Legal Fallout After ICE Officer Abandoned in Chicago (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/pritzker-and-johnson-could-face-legal-fallout-after-ice-officer-abandoned-in-chicago.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=af1d7a34ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/pritzker-and-johnson-could-face-legal-fallout-after-ice-officer-abandoned-in-chicago.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=af1d7a34ca-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Gov. J.B. Pritzker and Mayor Brandon Johnson talk to reporters on Aug. 30, 2023. (Antonio Perez/ Chicago Tribune)
By Illinois Review

Chicago’s sanctuary policies are under fire after reports revealed that police officers were ordered to “stand down” and not assist a federal Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent surrounded by a hostile crowd in Brighton Park.

What began as a dangerous breakdown in communication may now spiral into a full-scale legal crisis for both Mayor Brandon Johnson and Governor JB Pritzker.

Radio transmissions obtained by CWB Chicago captured multiple Chicago Police Department (CPD) officers asking for guidance after an ICE agent called for emergency assistance. “They were saying that they were being surrounded... we’re not sending?” one dispatcher asked. The chilling reply came: “Per the Chief of Patrol, all CPD resources are clear from the scene.” That order, allegedly issued under the direction of city leadership, meant a federal officer was left to face the threat alone.

Legal experts say both Mayor Johnson and Gov. Pritzker may have created or reinforced a policy environment that unlawfully interfered with federal law enforcement operations and endangered lives. Their sanctuary directives – each designed to block cooperation with ICE – could now serve as evidence in potential civil or criminal investigations.

subject: Holding corporations accountable for gun violence

body:
Peter,

As the People’s Lawyer, Keith Ellison is holding corporations accountable for harming public safety.

When Fleet Farm ignored numerous red flags, including employees’ concerns, and sold guns to straw purchasers who then sold these deadly weapons on the black market, Keith took action. On Friday, a court ruled that his lawsuit against Fleet Farm will move forward.

This means the case will go before a jury of 12 Minnesotans, where Keith will make the case that Fleet Farm must be held accountable for breaking the law and contributing to the gun violence epidemic.

Keith is taking on powerful corporations and working to improve public safety in Minnesota. Show you’re with him by adding your name today.

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: The government has shut down, but AI policy keeps moving.
body:
The latest on ARI's work on AI governance

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c8c05cd66a&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
Lawmakers may have hit pause on the federal government with this week’s shutdown, but the debate over AI policy is anything but quiet. From chip export rules to whistleblower protections and a debate over state preemption, the last month has seen key developments on AI policy. At every turn, ARI has worked to move the conversation forward with our brand of grounded, bipartisan advocacy.
---
| |
### UPCOMING: AI WHISTLEBLOWER VIRTUAL PANEL
**On October 16, ARI will host a virtual panel,** [_**AI Whistleblowers: Empowering Workers to Report AI Risks**_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=87aca6a4d8&e=a07d75591f) , with policy experts and whistleblowers from leading American tech companies. Following the introduction of Sen. Chuck Grassley’s bipartisan [AI Whistleblower Protection Act](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=aba667954c&e=a07d75591f), our upcoming panel will help to share human stories that speak to the importance of enacting federal rules.Currently, AI companies’ restrictive severance and NDAs create a chilling effect on current and former employees looking to make whistleblower disclosures to the federal government, including Congress. Featuring a moderated discussion followed by audience Q&A, this virtual panel will discuss the challenges whistleblowers face when sharing information on risky behavior from leading AI developers. We were excited to see California enshrine whistleblower protections for employees of California developers in the recently enacted SB53 and now need Congress to follow suit.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=9ba7ed500e&e=a07d75591f)
| |
📅 **AI Whistleblowers: Empowering Workers to Report AI Risks**
🕓 Thursday, October 16, 12:00 PM ET
---
| [Register Here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=13052fface&e=a07d75591f)
---
| |
### ECONOMISTS TO DOL: WE NEED BETTER AI LABOR DATA
In a [letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=438b312512&e=a07d75591f) organized by ARI, more than 40 of the nation’s top economists called on Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer to expand data collection on how AI is reshaping the workforce. The letter urged the Department of Labor to treat AI’s labor impact as a first-order economic challenge and to invest accordingly in tracking it.
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f7cd50b6cb&e=a07d75591f)
| | Signed by two former Fed chairs and several Nobel laureates, the effort drew coverage from [_Politico_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=013baa143b&e=a07d75591f) and [_Morning Brew_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=43eea2950d&e=a07d75591f). Earlier last month, ARI hosted a virtual panel discussion with renowned economists Erik Brynjolfsson and Bharat Chandar from Stanford’s Digital Economy Lab to discuss the emerging impact of AI on the workforce. [Watch the full panel here](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=7fe5a537c9&e=a07d75591f). ARI Policy Director John Soroushian also joined Notre Dame’s Keough School of Global Affairs for [events](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4c06060ef8&e=a07d75591f) in DC promoting the recent release of our joint [policy report](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a96b173db4&e=a07d75591f) on proactively developing and assisting the workforce in the age of AI.
---
| |
### ARI BIOSECURITY EVENT AMPLIFIES TRUSTED VOICES
Last week, ARI joined together with Texas A&M's Biosecurity and Pandemic Policy Center for a timely discussion with Dean Ball, formerly the Senior Policy Advisor for Artificial Intelligence and Emerging Technology at the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, on the new federal policies shaping the future of AI and biosecurity. Rapid advancements in synthetic biology present incredible opportunities for innovation, but also raise critical questions about biosecurity and the potential for misuse. Last week’s event discussed the Trump Administration’s Executive Order on the issue and next steps for policymakers to address gene synthesis screening, including expanding legislative authority, an idea that Dean Ball endorsed.
---
|
---
| |
### AI LAW PREEMPTION IS THE NEW SECTION 230
Last week, ARI launched a new campaign exposing how proposals for AI law preemption are the latest effort to shield Big Tech from accountability. The new campaign draws parallels between the infamous Section 230 and preemption, highlighting how the latest proposal would harm kids online, immunize the tech industry from accountability, undermine democracy, and amplify misinformation, just as Section 230 did over the past decade. Launching the campaign, ARI President Brad Carson published an op-ed in [Tech Policy Press](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=a16b6498f1&e=a07d75591f) and ARI launched a microsite at [NoAILawBan.org](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=3cc03c1ccc&e=a07d75591f).
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=13e1305622&e=a07d75591f)
| |
### AI LEGISLATION GAINS STEAM

Earlier this month, the Senate added the GAIN AI Act to its draft of the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), opening up the possibility of real legislative progress in the fight to secure America’s AI chips and keep the U.S. at the cutting edge of global innovation. The GAIN AI Act would require chip sellers to prioritize U.S.-based customers before selling advanced AI chips abroad, helping ensure U.S. startups, researchers, and national security agencies aren’t left behind. ARI is supporting the GAIN AI Act in the NDAA. In collaboration with the conservative labor economics think tank American Compass, we sent a [bipartisan letter](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5232c2ceee&e=a07d75591f) in support of the bill to leaders in Congress ([_Bloomberg_](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=c24fb8efe2&e=a07d75591f)).
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=74ad9f35fd&e=a07d75591f)
| |
### EXPANDING ARI’S TEAM
We’re hiring! We’re looking for talented candidates to join the team in the following roles:
* [**Communications Manager**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=0e45fcd35e&e=a07d75591f)
* [**Scheduler**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=66781ed33e&e=a07d75591f)
* [**Development Assistant**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=722c34af95&e=a07d75591f)

Thank you for being part of the growing ARI community. Your engagement enables us to meet this critical moment in AI policy—and to keep pushing for responsible innovation.
---
|
---

clean_body: The latest on ARI's work on AI governance | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Lawmakers may have hit pause on the federal government with this week’s shutdown, but the debate over AI policy is anything but quiet. From chip export rules to whistleblower protections and a debate over state preemption, the last month has seen key developments on AI policy. At every turn, ARI has worked to move the conversation forward with our brand of grounded, bipartisan advocacy. | | UPCOMING: AI WHISTLEBLOWER VIRTUAL PANEL On October 16, ARI will host a virtual panel, , with policy experts and whistleblowers from leading American tech companies. Following the introduction of Sen. Chuck Grassley’s bipartisan , our upcoming panel will help to share human stories that speak to the importance of enacting federal rules.Currently, AI companies’ restrictive severance and NDAs create a chilling effect on current and former employees looking to make whistleblower disclosures to the federal government, including Congress. Featuring a moderated discussion followed by audience Q&A, this virtual panel will discuss the challenges whistleblowers face when sharing information on risky behavior from leading AI developers. We were excited to see California enshrine whistleblower protections for employees of California developers in the recently enacted SB53 and now need Congress to follow suit. | | 📅 AI Whistleblowers: Empowering Workers to Report AI Risks 🕓 Thursday, October 16, 12:00 PM ET | | | ECONOMISTS TO DOL: WE NEED BETTER AI LABOR DATA In a organized by ARI, more than 40 of the nation’s top economists called on Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer to expand data collection on how AI is reshaping the workforce. # Build-A-Bear in damage control after vile woke employee humiliates 16 year old girl
In a shocking clash of politics and playtime, a Seattle Build-A-Bear manager on September 26 **[refused to name a teen fan's custom teddy bear](https://substack.com/redirect/1218c4b6-b3d6-42a7-9ada-e8cf3b846688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after slain conservative icon Charlie Kirk, reportedly crumpling the birth certificate in protest and leaving the 16-year-old customer stunned--sparking corporate apologies and vows for staff training.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1218c4b6-b3d6-42a7-9ada-e8cf3b846688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Teen Fan 's Tribute Denied:** Evi McCormick, 16, sought to honor admired role model Charlie Kirk--assassinated last month--via a personalized Build-A-Bear at the Southcenter Mall, citing his "elegant" speaking as inspiration amid a viral TikTok naming trend.
* **Manager 's Abrupt Rejection:** Unnamed employee declared "We're not doing this," discarded the certificate due to personal disagreement, forcing uncomfortable friend Kailie Lang to complete payment as McCormick fled the store, according to a report.
* **Mother 's Swift Intervention:** Amber McCormick confronted corporate headquarters for nearly an hour, securing a $20 gift card for subpar service and prompting deeper apologies for allowing politics to invade the family-friendly experience.
* **Corporate Vows Neutrality:** Build-A-Bear pledged Seattle-area employee training to bar political biases, emphasizing internal resolution while local managers stayed silent, highlighting risks of politicized retail spaces.

# Steak 'n Shake hoists the flag for pure American patriotism....literally!
Indianapolis-based diner chain Steak 'n Shake launched a bold patriotic push Saturday, erecting the nation's **[tallest and biggest American flags](https://substack.com/redirect/6b6f9b87-cc7f-46e6-a850-cb25cfa343d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at restaurants nationwide--from Texas to Ohio--celebrating heritage amid a surge of customer cheers for unapologetic American pride.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b6f9b87-cc7f-46e6-a850-cb25cfa343d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Flags Tower Impressively** : Each installation features American flags at maximum heights and sizes allowed by local governments, dwarfing typical displays to symbolize unyielding national devotion.
* **Installations Roll Nationwide** : Rollout targets all locations across states like Florida, Missouri, and Georgia, with initial setups already underway and employee photos capturing the dramatic unveilings.
* **Heritage Fuels Initiative** : Driven by the chain's 90-year legacy and recent critiques of rivals like Cracker Barrel, the move reinforces commitment to family traditions and core American values.
* **Customers Rally Enthusiastically** : Social media buzz explodes with over 650,000 views, sparking pledges for more visits and boosting brand loyalty through shared patriotic fervor.

# **AMD 's announces OpenAI deal, Ignites 35% Stock Explosion!**
Advanced Micro Devices shares skyrocketed more than 35% before market open Monday after announcing a multibillion-dollar deal to supply up to 6 gigawatts of AI GPUs to OpenAI starting in 2026, boosting the chipmaker's market position against Nvidia.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e5aa591f-5b56-4afe-86e6-7ca59f5c214c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Deal Fuels Revenue Surge** : The agreement projects tens of billions in AMD revenue, with OpenAI acquiring up to 160 million AMD shares--about a 10% stake--tied to deployment milestones.
* **Pre-Market Frenzy Peaks** : AMD stock leaped 32.69% to $218.50 at 9:32 a.m. EDT, erasing AMD's year-to-date lag after just 1% annual gain versus Nvidia's 52%.
* **AI Chip Rivalry Heats Up** : This deal positions AMD as a key OpenAI supplier amid Nvidia's $100 billion investment and OpenAI's recent $300 billion Oracle cloud pact, which drove OpenAI to a $500 billion-valuation.
* **Bubble Warnings Loom Large** : Amazon's Jeff Bezos cautions of an impending AI investment bubble, even as partnerships promise broad industry and consumer benefits.

# Trump will have Tres. Sec. Scott Bessent remain as IRS commissioner indefinitely
President Donald Trump has decided to retain Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as **[acting IRS commissioner indefinitely,](https://substack.com/redirect/c90c76b0-34e2-404c-9554-4d7d3f147e7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** extending his temporary takeover after ousting Billy Long in August.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c90c76b0-34e2-404c-9554-4d7d3f147e7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Bessent 's Dual Leadership Burden**: Bessent juggles Treasury oversight with IRS strategic direction, marking the first time a Secretary leads the tax agency permanently.
* **IRS Gets A New CEO** : Frank Bisignano, Social Security Administrator and ex-Fiserv CEO, steps in as new IRS CEO to manage daily functions while holding dual federal roles.
* **Long 's Swift Diplomatic Rebound**: Fired IRS head Billy Long, confirmed just months prior, rebounds, with Trump's nomination as U.S. ambassador to Iceland.
* **Fed Chair Hunt Accelerates** : Bessent is currently interviewing 11 candidates to replace Jerome Powell by May 2026, narrowing down to finalists for Trump's final pick.

# Debt crisis fears spark run to safety, Gold soars, Bitcoin hits new all time high
Gold and Bitcoin soared to record highs Monday as **[global debt fears](https://substack.com/redirect/ffa06a1a-b8b2-4b42-9469-04cd0b7ded54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the U.S., Japan and France sparked a "debasement trade," an investment strategy where traders and institutions allocate capital to hard assets perceived as hedges against the erosion of fiat currency value amid currency weakness and political turmoil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f2eea72d-88f0-4296-afc4-681ad58a776a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Debt Levels Escalate Globally** : Mounting fiscal burdens in major economies are undermining currencies like the Dollar, Yen and Euro. This is echoing patterns from the global financial crisis of 2008 and the quantitative easing eras that followed.
* **Japan 's Stimulus Shift Accelerates**: Lawmaker Sanae Takaichi's rise to prime minister fueled expectations of spending boosts, weakening the yen 1.6% against the dollar and lifting gold and Bitcoin to records versus the currency.
* **France 's Turmoil Widens Spreads**: Prime minister Sebastien Lecornu's resignation and budget gridlock in a fractured parliament caused the Euro to slip 0.6% versus dollar, heightening bond risks and investor flight to alternatives.
* **Momentum Trade Fuels Hedges** : Experts at Pepperstone and JPMorgan cite self-reinforcing sentiment in precious metals and crypto, with the US dollar down 30% against Bitcoin this year.

**Bitcoin rocketed** to a new **[All Time High of $125,689](https://substack.com/redirect/1509b91f-153f-4c2c-9e4a-6eb16f15a63c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the weekend in London, the first peak since mid-August. Demand for a safe-haven drove $3.2 billion in ETF inflows, and skyrocketing options bets amplified the frenzy.
* **Record ETF Inflows Surge** : Investor's $3.2 billion surge into U.S. Bitcoin ETFs was the second-highest since their 2024 debut, with BlackRock's iShares trust hitting $49.8 billion in open interest.
* **Options Market Explodes** : Combined open interest on Deribit and BlackRock's ETF neared $80 billion--tenfold from early 2024--fueled by bullish call options comprising over 60% of activity in the past six months.
* **Shutdown Sparks Debasement** : The October 1 U.S. shutdown disrupted payroll data, driving the "debasement trade" that lifted gold past $3,900/oz alongside Bitcoin's rally, while Ether held at $4,560 and XRP at $3.03.
* **Volatility Looms Ahead** : Experts eye $135,000 as Bitcoin's next resistance price level and $150,000 as its next potential price target, but FalconX analysts warn options dynamics could spark liquidation cascades if leverage-fueled momentum falters.

# Miami has big plans for the future as it gears up for World Cup 2026
Miami is buzzing with anticipation as **[city leaders vow flawless execution](https://substack.com/redirect/c5078973-92ff-4c25-9c24-3ddf4f77ee87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosting seven matches at Hard Rock Stadium from June 11 to July 19 building on lessons from recent mega-events to cement a global legacy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5078973-92ff-4c25-9c24-3ddf4f77ee87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Economic Boom Projected** : Officials forecast a staggering $1.5 billion infusion from direct spending and long-term tourism gains, positioning the event as a catalyst for attracting new businesses and residents to the booming metropolis.
* **Security Lessons Applied** : Drawing from Copa America experiences, preparations include Super Bowl-level enhancements in fire rescue and policing, backed by millions in city contributions to handle the unprecedented crowds safely. Up to one million people are expected to attend.
* **Housing Initiatives Launched** : An $880 million investment targets the neighborhood of West Little River for 2,500 affordable units aimed at providing essential workers like teachers, firefighters and law enforcement housing, addressing growth pains amid rapid urbanization.
* **Inclusivity Measures Ensured** : There are plans for FanFests and local pricing strategies, including $12 cocktails without covers, with the aim to connect everyday Miamians to the festivities, fostering community ties in a "Central Park"-style central hub.

Scott Bessent remain as IRS commissioner indefinitely President Donald Trump has decided to retain Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as extending his temporary takeover after ousting Billy Long in August. | | ---|---|--- Bessent 's Dual Leadership Burden: Bessent juggles Treasury oversight with IRS strategic direction, marking the first time a Secretary leads the tax agency permanently. IRS Gets A New CEO : Frank Bisignano, Social Security Administrator and ex-Fiserv CEO, steps in as new IRS CEO to manage daily functions while holding dual federal roles. Long 's Swift Diplomatic Rebound: Fired IRS head Billy Long, confirmed just months prior, rebounds, with Trump's nomination as U.S. ambassador to Iceland. Fed Chair Hunt Accelerates : Bessent is currently interviewing 11 candidates to replace Jerome Powell by May 2026, narrowing down to finalists for Trump's final pick. Debt crisis fears spark run to safety, Gold soars, Bitcoin hits new all time high Gold and Bitcoin soared to record highs Monday as in the U.S., Japan and France sparked a "debasement trade," an investment strategy where traders and institutions allocate capital to hard assets perceived as hedges against the erosion of fiat currency value amid currency weakness and political turmoil. | | ---|---|--- Debt Levels Escalate Globally : Mounting fiscal burdens in major economies are undermining currencies like the Dollar, Yen and Euro. This is echoing patterns from the global financial crisis of 2008 and the quantitative easing eras that followed. Japan 's Stimulus Shift Accelerates: Lawmaker Sanae Takaichi's rise to prime minister fueled expectations of spending boosts, weakening the yen 1.6% against the dollar and lifting gold and Bitcoin to records versus the currency. France 's Turmoil Widens Spreads: Prime minister Sebastien Lecornu's resignation and budget gridlock in a fractured parliament caused the Euro to slip 0.6% versus dollar, heightening bond risks and investor flight to alternatives. Momentum Trade Fuels Hedges : Experts at Pepperstone and JPMorgan cite self-reinforcing sentiment in precious metals and crypto, with the US dollar down 30% against Bitcoin this year. Bitcoin rocketed to a new over the weekend in London, the first peak since mid-August. Demand for a safe-haven drove $3.2 billion in ETF inflows, and skyrocketing options bets amplified the frenzy. Record ETF Inflows Surge : Investor's $3.2 billion surge into U.S. Bitcoin ETFs was the second-highest since their 2024 debut, with BlackRock's iShares trust hitting $49.8 billion in open interest. Options Market Explodes : Combined open interest on Deribit and BlackRock's ETF neared $80 billion--tenfold from early 2024--fueled by bullish call options comprising over 60% of activity in the past six months. Shutdown Sparks Debasement : The October 1 U.S. shutdown disrupted payroll data, driving the "debasement trade" that lifted gold past $3,900/oz alongside Bitcoin's rally, while Ether held at $4,560 and XRP at $3.03. Volatility Looms Ahead : Experts eye $135,000 as Bitcoin's next resistance price level and $150,000 as its next potential price target, but FalconX analysts warn options dynamics could spark liquidation cascades if leverage-fueled momentum falters. Miami has big plans for the future as it gears up for World Cup 2026 Miami is buzzing with anticipation as for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosting seven matches at Hard Rock Stadium from June 11 to July 19 building on lessons from recent mega-events to cement a global legacy. | | ---|---|--- Economic Boom Projected : Officials forecast a staggering $1.5 billion infusion from direct spending and long-term tourism gains, positioning the event as a catalyst for attracting new businesses and residents to the booming metropolis. Security Lessons Applied : Drawing from Copa America experiences, preparations include Super Bowl-level enhancements in fire rescue and policing, backed by millions in city contributions to handle the unprecedented crowds safely. Up to one million people are expected to attend. Housing Initiatives Launched : An $880 million investment targets the neighborhood of West Little River for 2,500 affordable units aimed at providing essential workers like teachers, firefighters and law enforcement housing, addressing growth pains amid rapid urbanization. Inclusivity Measures Ensured : There are plans for FanFests and local pricing strategies, including $12 cocktails without covers, with the aim to connect everyday Miamians to the festivities, fostering community ties in a "Central Park"-style central hub. * Thanks for reading The Capitalist! This post is public so feel free to share it. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matthew Miller 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1011&refcode=email-20251006_v&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

News reports just exposed that the anti-Mamdani super PACs have joined
forces, assembling a mega-coalition with one goal – stopping Zohran
Mamdani from becoming Mayor of NYC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33692?source=email-20251006&t=1060&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]Headline: Several super PACs that oppose Zohran Mamdani's candidacy for
mayor of New York City have banded together to coordinate attack ads

Their latest plan? Flood NYC neighborhoods with ads and Cuomo-branded paid
canvassers, blitzing voters with glossy attack ads and flyers.

We know these tactics work. In the primary, Our Revolution knocked on
doors, flipped undecided voters, and helped deliver a stunning victory for
progressive change. Now the billionaire-backed establishment is copying
that playbook, hoping their money can buy what we’re building.

If we’re going to win, we have to out-organize them in every ZIP code in
NYC. That means urgently raising $100,000 to fund three critical voter
contacts for every person on our list. Political scientists are clear: it
takes hearing something THREE TIMES before it truly clicks. With new
anti-Mamdani ads dropping every day, we cannot afford to fall behind.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251006nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]Will you donate $27 – or whatever you can – right now to help us ramp up
three phone banks each week and turn out more organizers to make sure the
anti-Mamdani super PACs don’t have a chance to drown us out?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This isn’t just a numbers game – it’s people persuading people. Just last
week, one of our canvassers met a voter who was deeply concerned about
healthcare. After a real conversation about Mamdani’s plan to make sure
families can stay on their plans and afford coverage, that voter switched
from “undecided” to “YES.” That’s the power of organizing, not
advertising.

We’re not afraid of the opposition’s deep pockets because our engine runs
on real grassroots organizing. That means local teams leading volunteer
canvassers, not paid operatives sneaking attack ads onto doorsteps.

But here’s the truth: these anti-Mamdani mega-PACs can outspend us at any
moment. If we don’t hit our $100,000 goal, we won’t be able to reach every
voter three times – with authentic Our Revolution voices – before Election
Day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251006nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9465%2E5885482%2EwSs2hm ]Now is the moment to show that grassroots organizing can overcome
billionaire spending. Please donate now – $27, $50, or whatever you can –
to fuel our teams and make sure that when voters open their doors or
answer their phones, it’s our organizers out there fighting for the
working class, not Cuomo’s paid shills fighting for the status quo.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Amy McGrath
subject: Today, I’m announcing my campaign for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I can’t sit on the sidelines with what’s going on
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ec81c60-6150-45ee-b529-29db97356db2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, We’re at an inflection point in our country’s history. Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That’s still my North Star. And every day, we’re watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends. And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears. I’m announcing that I’m running for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who won’t be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country’s foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don’t scare me. As you know, I’ve run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn’t go our way. But in my line of work, you don’t quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country. Just like you, I’m sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they’re throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn’t know a backbone if it hit them in the face. That’s why I’m running. Because we deserve leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. That’s what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Blue Amp Action, I’m not alone. Look, I know this race won’t be easy. But here’s the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we’re brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn’t had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell. And I intend to win it. [But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. Will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a439341-4a1e-4b5b-a34b-f38406de96f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251006_mcgrath-launch_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e38cabf-53a2-47a3-9180-56f037830285/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: I can’t sit on the sidelines with what’s going on | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, We’re at an inflection point in our country’s history. Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That’s still my North Star. And every day, we’re watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends. And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears. I’m announcing that I’m running for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who won’t be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country’s foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don’t scare me. As you know, I’ve run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn’t go our way. But in my line of work, you don’t quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country. Just like you, I’m sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they’re throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn’t know a backbone if it hit them in the face. That’s why I’m running. Because we deserve leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. That’s what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Blue Amp Action, I’m not alone. Look, I know this race won’t be easy. But here’s the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we’re brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn’t had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell. And I intend to win it. | | | | | | | | | | | | For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you. Amy | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Their shutdown
body:
Republicans shut down the government because they refused to stop your health care costs from rising.

Peter —
President Trump and Congressional Republicans shut down the government because they refused to stop your health care costs from rising.
Let me be clear: Republicans are in charge of the White House, House, and Senate.
**This is their shutdown.**
It is Project 2025 in action.
We are not going to aid and abet this president’s agenda.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/3086?t=1&akid=750%2E2563979%2EZywDlI)
We have to stand up. We have to be the guardrails against this tyrant.
Thank you for staying engaged in these critical times.
Kamala

* * *

**🇺🇸 Wait! Team Kamala has an important ask before you click away...**
The presidential campaign is over, but the fight continues. If you understand the importance of Kamala Harris' voice and action on this issue and others like it, she's asking for your help.

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Free webinar series on energy costs and more
body:
Why are Pennsylvania costs so high?
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4060095/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

Here in Pennsylvania, electricity prices have been spiking for families across the Commonwealth.

And now—thanks to Trump and Republicans in Congress—those costs are about to soar even higher. All to protect tax breaks for ultra-rich billionaires.

If you’re concerned about rising energy prices and want to learn more about how we got here and what assistance is available, **our friends at the Pennsylvania Utility Law Project (PULP) are hosting a free fall webinar series starting tomorrow to help.**

Webinar topics are listed below, along with the link to register for each. You can sign up for as many as you’d like! |
---
| **▶️ Can You Really Save Money by Switching Electric and Gas Suppliers? It’s Complicated.**_Tuesday, October 7, 1:00-2:00 p.m._
Presented by Elizabeth Marx (PULP) and Ria Pereira (PULP)
[**Learn more and register here.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4060096/87SdQ4wZ)
▶️ **LIHEAP 2025-2026 Program Review** _Friday, October 31, 10:00-11:30 a.m._
Presented by Lauren Berman (PULP), Tue Ho (Community Legal Services), and Brian Whorl (PA Dept. of Human Services)
[**Learn more and register here.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4060097/87SdQ4wZ)
▶️ **Rising Energy Costs: What’s Causing Them and What Can I Do?**_Monday, November 17, 1:00-2:00 p.m._
Presented by Patrick Cicero (PULP)
[**Learn more and register here.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4060098/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| If you’re interested but unable to attend these webinars, be sure to register anyway to receive a recording of the presentation, as well as the presentation slides and other materials, in your email inbox afterwards. |
---
| In solidarity,

Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: I won’t sugar coat it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOU GOTTA BELIEVE PAC
body:
This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaekuegshtrpvg63v4c7p9ocnnnu6taqds5cfboo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4stgeep32c9h2bs)

| | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans.
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu7r1f14q485u9put9lou3t6d4sk4tqhui9nt748_rp22sh2s8i6epb4stgeep32c9h2bs)
---
George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. **This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress.**
---
[ STOP NEWSOM'S REDISTRICTING POWER GRAB ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdasqsrej2drltosqut8dan6vemke6b043eog9go_rp22sh2s8i6epb4stgeep32c9h2bs)
---
The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will:
---
* Flip the house next year
* Impeach President Trump
* Reverse the Trump agenda

---
Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my _**You Gotta Believe PAC**_ is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. [But with the October deadline looming, we need your help to make it happen.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb8uhj985m8vhngd53vbo60dkh0j009i884rrn98_rp22sh2s8i6epb4stgeep32c9h2bs) Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. name: Team Sharice
subject: Need your eyes on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
The timeline is set. The battle lines are drawn. And the stakes couldn’t be any higher.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116733113/574251885/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGNjMGRlYy1kY2EyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jVlIP7W4iVB5uKnwKx7kGrlY18kwfrD_R4Jx1XhEFE=) We know there’s a lot going on in Washington right now under the National GOP’s government shutdown, but things are moving _very_ quickly here in Kansas, and we need your eyes on this: _**Sunflower State Journal: “Lawmakers shooting for special session in early November”**_ The timeline is set. The battle lines are drawn. And the stakes couldn’t be any higher. We know what we’re up against. **Now, we need to get prepared.** The countdown is on, and what we’re able to accomplish in the upcoming weeks could be the difference between keeping Sharice in office — or allowing Donald Trump to silence the voices of thousands of Kansans. clean_body: All to spite President Trump Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, Democrats threw ANOTHER tantrum, and they just shut down your government! They can't stand to see Republicans and Donald Trump winning for the American people, so they put YOUR livelihood at risk. Make no mistake, if they take back the Senate majority, this is their gameplan: They will block, block, block, no matter the implications on the American people. We CANNOT let them take back the Senate majority. Anyone who puts political emotions over the success of our country does not deserve to be in leadership. Sincerely, John Thune | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: counterpunch
subject: The Cinderella comeback for Dems in PA
body:
We’re up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch. But he didn’t see this coming.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RO4v9LurO3W_YTcJtI-Cs8cl2y1TMHh82aaBRswzUQ6flG0qq78DdspELhgVxdha74MSS2ZS0ylbMzY4NIIZ8MGO8hUw4ZqfetIFholCqGWTxCniPCN71gAHw3AG-yRyUCl-w3z4R2nJlp-Lf4TPxTaKuLq_CPnqgOi_fVJ_rfdOMTFvTuiK7MbkcxPEodnzsJfxrIHEfGApGRiKGMsgE9U3J3Ik0OFFN70QJGpoXzw=&c=UiDAHEztwbUpZUz7486ZqmEhdQsrCjlZk3gcyfjG8ipb9OTsHzeUAw==&ch=FXZu1QHwFPDp_Su_UWN6v3dObcUBWm_o_CWhCLiJR5VqH7olhmQDLQ==)
---
| Friend,
With MAGA control of the White House, House, Senate, and Supreme Court, MAGA has backed Democrats into the corner--delivering one cheap shot after another.
The Supreme Court is giving Trump free reign. Soldiers are in our streets. Mass arrests. Suppression of freedom of speech. Corporations and news networks bending their knee to the administration.
We're up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch.
On November 4th, the fate of our Democracy will be decided in an obscure State Supreme Court election in Pennsylvania.
If Trump topples the court's three vote liberal majority next month, he takes control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state for the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democratic ballots from being counted, and may even ban Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RO4v9LurO3W_YTcJtI-Cs8cl2y1TMHh82aaBRswzUQ6flG0qq78DdspELhgVxdha74MSS2ZS0ylbMzY4NIIZ8MGO8hUw4ZqfetIFholCqGWTxCniPCN71gAHw3AG-yRyUCl-w3z4R2nJlp-Lf4TPxTaKuLq_CPnqgOi_fVJ_rfdOMTFvTuiK7MbkcxPEodnzsJfxrIHEfGApGRiKGMsgE9U3J3Ik0OFFBhhbRbSlPeA=&c=UiDAHEztwbUpZUz7486ZqmEhdQsrCjlZk3gcyfjG8ipb9OTsHzeUAw==&ch=FXZu1QHwFPDp_Su_UWN6v3dObcUBWm_o_CWhCLiJR5VqH7olhmQDLQ==)
---
| Trump has MAGA billionaires in his corner for this fight. Only days ago, MAGA dark money PAC's appeared seemingly out of nowhere in PA, suddenly flooding the airwaves and mailboxes with tens of millions of dollars in advertisements.
And these billionaires aren't fighting fair either. They are sending PA Democrats intentionally deceptive mailers to try and trick them into voting to oust the Democratic justices by saying that voting no (the MAGA position) will "protect women's rights" and that the Justices "protect pedophiles."
Trump and MAGA billionaires are throwing their haymaker, fully expecting it to land and Democracy to fall. But they didn't see this coming.
Defend Our Courts has rallied democrats from across the nation to come to PA's aid. Having now raised nearly 2.5 million dollars via 100,000 small dollar contributions from 50,000 unique donors, we have caught MAGA completely off-guard and are delivering crushing counterpunches in PA--proving that Democrats aren't out of the fight yet.
But with only 29 days left in the election, there are only a few rounds left and we're down on the scorecards. If the election were held today, Trump would win. But with you in our corner, we can make a historic comeback:
[Can I count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even $10 to help Defend Our Courts save Democracy and win this critical Supreme Court fight?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RO4v9LurO3W_YTcJtI-Cs8cl2y1TMHh82aaBRswzUQ6flG0qq78DdspELhgVxdha74MSS2ZS0ylbMzY4NIIZ8MGO8hUw4ZqfetIFholCqGWTxCniPCN71gAHw3AG-yRyUCl-w3z4R2nJlp-Lf4TPxTaKuLq_CPnqgOi_fVJ_rfdOMTFvTuiK7MbkcxPEodnzsJfxrIHEfGApGRiKGMsgE9U3J3Ik0OFFSs2thbU2W50=&c=UiDAHEztwbUpZUz7486ZqmEhdQsrCjlZk3gcyfjG8ipb9OTsHzeUAw==&ch=FXZu1QHwFPDp_Su_UWN6v3dObcUBWm_o_CWhCLiJR5VqH7olhmQDLQ==)

clean_body: We’re up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch. But he didn’t see this coming. | | | | | == | Friend, With MAGA control of the White House, House, Senate, and Supreme Court, MAGA has backed Democrats into the corner--delivering one cheap shot after another. The Supreme Court is giving Trump free reign. Soldiers are in our streets. Mass arrests. Suppression of freedom of speech. Corporations and news networks bending their knee to the administration. We're up against the ropes, fascism on our doorstep. And Trump is going for the knockout punch. On November 4th, the fate of our Democracy will be decided in an obscure State Supreme Court election in Pennsylvania. If Trump topples the court's three vote liberal majority next month, he takes control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state for the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. He will outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democratic ballots from being counted, and may even ban Democrats from appearing on ballots altogether. | | == | Trump has MAGA billionaires in his corner for this fight. Only days ago, MAGA dark money PAC's appeared seemingly out of nowhere in PA, suddenly flooding the airwaves and mailboxes with tens of millions of dollars in advertisements. And these billionaires aren't fighting fair either. They are sending PA Democrats intentionally deceptive mailers to try and trick them into voting to oust the Democratic justices by saying that voting no (the MAGA position) will "protect women's rights" and that the Justices "protect pedophiles." Trump and MAGA billionaires are throwing their haymaker, fully expecting it to land and Democracy to fall. But they didn't see this coming. Defend Our Courts has rallied democrats from across the nation to come to PA's aid. Having now raised nearly 2.5 million dollars via 100,000 small dollar contributions from 50,000 unique donors, we have caught MAGA completely off-guard and are delivering crushing counterpunches in PA--proving that Democrats aren't out of the fight yet. But with only 29 days left in the election, there are only a few rounds left and we're down on the scorecards. If the election were held today, Trump would win. But with you in our corner, we can make a historic comeback: == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Only 29 days left, but the bell hasn't rung yet.
