name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by God.

| | |
---
Friend,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---

| Lieutenant Governor Leslie Rutledge is calling for accountability after a UA Little Rock law professor reportedly celebrated the assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk on social media. In her letter to the Dean of the William H. Bowen School of Law, Rutledge condemned the post as a disgraceful endorsement of political violence, stressing that such rhetoric has no place in Arkansas classrooms or institutions of higher learning.

In her letter to the Dean of the William H. Bowen School of Law, Rutledge condemned the post as a disgraceful endorsement of political violence, stressing that such rhetoric has no place in Arkansas classrooms or institutions of higher learning. | "READ THE LETTER" | | | | Achieving for Arkansas | | Lt. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | It’s Nancy Mace. First, thank you for opening this message. I know your time is limited, so I’ll be blunt: If we don’t catch up NOW , it’ll cripple my campaign for Governor. Every day, they’re sending RADICAL operatives to chase me around South Carolina and scare me into submission. But they don’t scare me, Peter. What does? Losing our country to the Demonic Trans Perverts who want my head on a stick. And that’s exactly what will happen if we don’t PUNCH BACK. The Democrats are raising MILLIONS to destroy me.I’m up against the wall. $1 from EVERY patriot like you —the truckers, teachers, waitresses, cops, firefighters, and everyone else working their asses off just to make ends meet— could save my campaign. Every dollar fuels our movement, whether it’s spreading new yard signs across the state or buying pizza and water for my grassroots volunteers. I’m begging you, Peter: Time is running out. Thank you for standing with me. Hold The Line. — Nancy Mace | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |

subject: Let's help out my friend Ruwa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
Bold progressives need to stick together
---
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/FB4ujD0dnc1d)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/j3ItgWit0pXP)
---
Friend, I want to introduce you to a Democrat (with a spine) and a good friend of mine, Ruwa Romman. Do you remember when the Uncommitted movement gave the names of three Palestinian Americans that they wanted to speak on stage at the DNC in 2024, and one of their speeches leaked? Yeah, that was Ruwa, and she's the real deal. **Ruwa is running for governor of Georgia to do more than the "bare minimum," actually stand up to Trump, and fight to give working people a better future.** We're both young, progressive, Palestinian Americans who will never support the brutal assault on Gaza no matter how much money groups try to give us or spend against us. We've also both been attacked by MAGA ghoul Laura Loomer online. I spoke with Ruwa the other day, and she wanted me to share two ways you could help.
**FIRST:** Ruwa is hoping you'll sign up for her email list. She promised me that she won't share your information with anyone else, and you'll always be able to unsubscribe if it becomes too much.****[**Even if you never donate, just opening and reading her emails does so much to help another progressive.**](https://ka4il.us/l/fH1n6V0T3GKA) Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/RfgkQNi5ti57)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/ODoJcOXNDXvD)

---

Democrats and Republicans have designed a system that benefits a wealthy few, and it can make it really difficult to fundraise outside of the establishment. [**Ruwa has pledged to not take a single cent from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or special interests, which makes your grassroots support that much more important. name: Sunny the Banana Slug
subject: Banana Slug Socks Are BACK!
body:
https://savetheredwoods.org [https://savetheredwoods.org]
Hey Peter,
Your favorite forest friend here, Sunny the Slug! I just had to slide into your inbox with some news that’ll knock your socks off (and hopefully replace them with even better ones).
Save the Redwoods League is bringing back the (iconic, beloved, often imitated but never replicated) banana slug socks! Become an Evergreen Member to claim your pair and wear a little piece of redwood magic with you wherever you go. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
Trust me, these are the kind of socks that will get a reaction. Walk through the park or down the street and you’ll be stopped by people saying “Woah, I love banana slugs! Is it really true that they move just 3.25 inches per hour?” or “Wait, those aren’t bananas?” or “Tell me more about the redwoods!”
It can’t get any better than that, can it? Oh, but it can!
CLAIM YOUR SOCKS [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
A generous League Councilor, Peggy Light, is MATCHING all new Evergreen Memberships, up to $100,000. Your new monthly gifts will immediately unlock $250 in matching funds. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
You definitely want to take advantage of this opportunity. Join now while your Evergreen Membership will go even further to help me and my towering redwood friends!
With love and slime,
Sunny the Banana Slug 🐌
P.S. Don’t drag your feet—leave that to me. Become an Evergreen Member and unlock $250 in matching funds, along with your stylish new socks! [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
Help restore and protect the redwoods
DONATE NOW [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/evergreen-match]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
Save the Redwoods League
111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94104
United States

## A Biblical Episode Of Jerry Springer
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25590951.13178.1.c8d9fd24f26322b8d50347beed530162)
---
This last Sunday, we began a _brand new series_ at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25590951.13179.1.2ed56e2a8a04ac25d1630f93ae004c03) over the Gospel of Matthew. **Matthew 1:1-18** is what I describe as a [Biblical Episode of Jerry Springer](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=25590951.13180.1.089d2ee3083adf0fd966da75b9008245)... The feedback that I received from this message was amazing. I believe it will bless you as well! body:
“They” think we’re backward - I’m a former Navy SEAL hellbent on proving them wrong | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=72f0a17e852d4e9997e460cfdc5c18f8&_e=qNSNyI7hLfv1kFtPmDI6zRdM4LPC7RUoR-Th9OfzaTRrxKMl-F8_tJ_bG56GM3Ij0jNmyTvaMu6JPZ8nvPJJvb-T2KplNuPFsfdOVzMWXk39I7lnv3t-nHgiV_YnYP_uwvBj7iwOjRSQ2mBaoV_NCJFtJcd6O3ti7heeweDmL59b2HjacmGXtx5WNzSEo_wFtSDtc3YO0HcaK29Xmtei7gB8DcIyX8__S5-H4bRpJuyKc4qYpx7gl61xoO9z2clD61rEu1EzwfPu6Y_YVAaZJYoCyz5Z3oU7xp1dPTCGXRjnycGk1njD03qAJWnfoiJfAwuvaFRRXTahm67I9CBjn1Nz_n8qOoqMtjXEi4StANdE-K5nhOK9bYkscC_YetxaHEK76g3si_o-I3DU7CqIr9uN0ODG8xv1D1NXyHOVLSeRJLkrVLtO2_E1m3XElIMVchpO-UzL_B0XhPmUGCFt39QrsVwLUsv9tqgf6m6m296oTei-e-XkqnbkKMHiALLfuFBwqYevMQIoA0uD4VtLVwgWHH4-pRSqiiRHATCqX3a6NRCuCYz3Y0awCcN7sOLLk1wMJY5-t_TOpoI0vnBMz2bxYnXpVRP1TxRPvY5Xr7vtBpOXeHJOmNTR-AL8eY2sm9jdxKSphY35_PW64Xzk5npi_HfmpLN0OiasHpI5idBDdYPDa4C7jI0ug-YGOMxHSr3_NMO0Q-KCTIP1jeFVc62zOmWZYxH9kbb_qUcQblNL5OdrTMGX2dDmwuiZW4ehLP2i6xOw_K2wpVuuGJnmvMl4KVlrieY6nHs59pNqjGcrkbfPy7LAUtWidzyWKw6Q)

---

Fellow Conservative,

They’re calling us **_“backward,” “extreme,”_** and worse — labels meant to dismiss and divide. Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right.

They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you.

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment.

I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. _**While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.**_****

I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high.

Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. **[With your support, we can turn this seat red and send a message to Washington](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=72f0a17e852d4e9997e460cfdc5c18f8&_e=qNSNyI7hLfv1kFtPmDI6zRdM4LPC7RUoR-Th9OfzaTRrxKMl-F8_tJ_bG56GM3Ij0jNmyTvaMu6JPZ8nvPJJvb-T2KplNuPFsfdOVzMWXk39I7lnv3t-nHgiV_YnYP_uwvBj7iwOjRSQ2mBaoV_NCJFtJcd6O3ti7heeweDmL59b2HjacmGXtx5WNzSEo_wFtSDtc3YO0HcaK29Xmtei7gB8DcIyX8__S5-H4bRpJuyKc4qYpx7gl61xoO9z2clD61rEu1EzwfPu6Y_YVAaZJYoCyz5Z3oU7xp1dPTCGXRjUdvgrAYSVShcvOUlYPySqGEKKBjEQcp8pE2Sz8Tw4sosESdoyaS-u_s_3Cj2SSL5yagaCyEv-m7P2M7rvs4nDRoG_808q67u2pRQ1Kb3FeehGajhN_JfEjQn6Dy9goQ0ebtq3_xlrH_vFjZD4jxMjyp3mrkXNfipC70SxHMJw6tMzp5t6EmkOe8icpOoX16r_Cfza4qYm8xpYKzeky_ksoq6g_5HM7X14vFrFdcHezrNFdAsh17CQjZ_yeuOt0FpyA4DDdjzrzasiXp3iyd60fcZy0npxXG3KLz2_JUZ7reEXGOQarZg9cXv_rk08KzKmraPuWrIh_QeKiorg5R2gW6cash8MTpL3LaGAO86CLq3k-1RvWGVYYr5ah_b83MyUd6MTd_Oc0fsZqzDAsbZGBZfTjGateCL7GGLplwQ5YlY_9KVjMBuEpOQcoAdGnWbLGYwCS52joG0cyyd_RtG93pm9eQYzdi_SHdMf-GWXgY469qkGdcoTlQtgHlWpOMpYb8vlcT0FnZlFzCVlbXF_)**.

_**You have a choice.**_

You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. **[Will you contribute $1, $5, or $50 to help us win this fight?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=72f0a17e852d4e9997e460cfdc5c18f8&_e=qNSNyI7hLfv1kFtPmDI6zRdM4LPC7RUoR-Th9OfzaTRrxKMl-F8_tJ_bG56GM3Ij0jNmyTvaMu6JPZ8nvPJJvb-T2KplNuPFsfdOVzMWXk39I7lnv3t-nHgiV_YnYP_uwvBj7iwOjRSQ2mBaoV_NCJFtJcd6O3ti7heeweDmL59b2HjacmGXtx5WNzSEo_wFtSDtc3YO0HcaK29Xmtei7gB8DcIyX8__S5-H4bRpJuyKc4qYpx7gl61xoO9z2clD61rEu1EzwfPu6Y_YVAaZJYoCyz5Z3oU7xp1dPTCGXRjUKBzKyZXX1cI-2oNv-Jr1KaQya6N-K_qLuMaMkxuHheyn0LILEaBvCz2iuF8Or5t8iBODvz-dpEa-NmTLKGXe8iBWpW4wYSFyTaX8u5s192Y2FEbygjINEAf5oekKPIByHgqAgLy7x4hRwpvdY4esjWgWHYzvSD3W0oLjXaEaQVi2AdJBWsPlWs9V_DCyyoIwlPuDaeQhPYIz9dn--UORXoHxKu4UbutF10qQIP59bUbQcbyUzt-nxZvqNIvBX8HwhRMNYfhzvnuxtzBDIlbeFdQjppjtApUdDdzijaavED4S3p0MYjN7ZI4e3jWY8ohZLSFAp6ihNtpLzyYuHp77Q21etkOwYgdf9ZRM-DBKYODqba3gPEpIMMhQQvHWR2q3TPxP0z7OJELYA4Xd8FhIMx2M3oRVNaHq54JbbDWkBg39xEvb3t1HoawxOyav9B8dtunW_Yh9I2J2mxrbpt3EAOKujKwPaoCETjWlVzDyGWhsL-YLKwMllY2ONIxspF-6JTb_9BSx4JntKo8MYdtX)**

[**MAKE A GIFT RIGHT NOW
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=72f0a17e852d4e9997e460cfdc5c18f8&_e=qNSNyI7hLfv1kFtPmDI6zRdM4LPC7RUoR-Th9OfzaTRrxKMl-F8_tJ_bG56GM3Ij0jNmyTvaMu6JPZ8nvPJJvb-T2KplNuPFsfdOVzMWXk39I7lnv3t-nHgiV_YnYP_uwvBj7iwOjRSQ2mBaoV_NCJFtJcd6O3ti7heeweDmL59b2HjacmGXtx5WNzSEo_wFtSDtc3YO0HcaK29Xmtei7gB8DcIyX8__S5-H4bRpJuyKc4qYpx7gl61xoO9z2clD61rEu1EzwfPu6Y_YVAaZJYoCyz5Z3oU7xp1dPTCGXRhF7IHZR-69b0BJ5DZFJcnPyMzyZP5qfcd0IVm-unH5J1jGYw47Fhe0a_oUPHG1zHHDnuUQevrJ-K5zqnnIlSJrJOPQML0V253gDjQbKk7DgPBbeB_Kmr3AVuTuvgVowpkPsrGy9o6QfsEb0rQYvg8kHjslFIWAL_3Yf6qamRGdlgTAQPRNksfZYO0PrV_qs2yz1ZS_kDDOAgOMY75KPMDSRIxfLyyJpdeZra-Ce_tm30Ds2BsC9_l_diW3YQB1ACMQ3F9aXjkZ_mjn9QzAZLXOGAI2AAmifR_yXZH4VDKobnQY8ZMboxRfc6zE62bYxTa7OqHSzuWPtghpAZv9HoHYgEdntEEPTysAdlNH2ESuFQ3lZmTwE0AWtawFc11raTIcsAuSGe0s8fV1soewYr9S2oYO4acxa9Gnof4RxDsQLwrxi5SGv7QfDjZDwruABpPP0RKwBO0gHeA_Gv8AsUz2ybSM2f61E6wyb9VTohEmEjDTwB_QJRQq0Gs474w0H_m0iVIAhrTCBE9lKRcfdWga)
I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass —** I’m asking for your partnership. **

Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of.

With gratitude,
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

Rep. Jasmine Crockett’s harsh words about President Trump aren’t just about him. They’re aimed at you, me, and anyone who cherishes America’s values, respects our nation’s heritage, or believes in standing firm for what’s right. They think we’re obstacles to their agenda. They believe we’ll stay silent. But I know better — and so do you. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I’ve served in over 70 countries, led teams through high-stakes missions, and faced challenges that tested my resolve. Through it all, I learned that disciplined action and quiet strength always prevail. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — to fight for our state with focus, humility, and unwavering commitment. I never imagined a career in politics. But returning home from deployments, I saw a Minnesota drifting from the values that shaped me. My opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, and a radical transgender activist, pushes a far-left vision that’s out of touch with our communities. While chaos gripped our streets in 2020, she criticized those working to restore order, leaving businesses and families to bear the cost.** I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks and enlisted in the Marine Corps at 18, weeks after 9/11. Service has always been my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. This is a different kind of fight, but the stakes are just as high. Minnesota hasn’t backed a Republican for president since 1976, and this Senate race is an uphill climb. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. . You have a choice. You can set this email aside, or you can join me in sending a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone forged in service, ready for the challenge, and driven by principle, not pride. I’ve earned degrees from Harvard and Johns Hopkins and trained in high-stakes fields like nuclear deterrence. I’ve built coalitions across cultures and led through crises. But the greatest challenge is earning your trust and building a movement to reclaim our state. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Our country is worth defending. Respect, integrity, and action still matter. Together, we can show Minnesota — and America — what we’re made of. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota - FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Fellow Conservative,

When our voters stay at home, we lose critically essential races.

All year, my colleagues in the Senate and I have been raising the alarm bells about what would happen if our supporters stayed home during pivotal races.

_**A couple of weeks ago, we found out.**_****

I put together a campaign memo on how to avoid future disasters like the one that recently unfolded.

Please take a moment to read it today.

[**READ MY MEMO →** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=bdcdab6ba20f4209b4f9eed1439d14e7&_e=fgZ90v91uEdwWIykHqvu-7ed29Aoi5DFt2xM5iLJxXtIbrcot7ObcHqqwFIAcLHb4ZKP3YHih3odnbvudG5eP-Fw2x0XcdZz6gEpddLUCsiqQ-uSi-ejjQDxEeJGHE51R4DLvmUJqCYK6VFxedaZreU_MWbP-KllDOSSFTctfxE3RfmAE5KAKzjZzWaLmJ-TiCqkz0Qrrq13Mt1P0uxlsWF9DalUWnJSWjyjDrEiCGIiJuyd7yADT7gOF1jLqgGGPqVV6wu57zSuZFttBDX4mjJydTfCRvW1yo8e4k-Jenkn3vULsk6QCXWOK3I1743fGtYgNNHlb_HTtn9nPLs1RNVQvY-FWcuEM9P-FU9wvLH9K4nXbIS4naBFCRBpaD9LT1S_H5L3Z1BkGw7csLDn8rVSozNYkT71LRhFQj2hrLahwLpUTHSZmYGZZ3Ii_Lj9mOrL1Vr-vGAlnYyvIir0ClfdjxcHqVflDRELuYpMk46FmP-l1Hudr0jwu7aWdojQo4E61okYwfiamaOGcZurBZI6gckbmEOFW1aS4aKBH1GNtaGEaAWdXD_qPxan446iK2B5fBwTTcpPLYJ_mshcGwCoKjUkp5UnWyH_mONtI_fIAt83MAOz4je0QBVK6ecT4R5GB_0ASHQlClckak_l4MUKmdWlk9UIsytmmwLs7EFhRsXAM4TBpd4UV9hHe-gQNiLFR2leg9QC-OG7LiNap2yIlL03TK-Ww4xM2NS2L27euqvbHdAxnkN_0LWiDRgxnSaKC_bSVe7n-Zu_grum4O6To18XVrijsqBqyYPDKgk%3D)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: The plain truth about the Republican-manufactured government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’ll keep updating you as this unfolds.
#
We’re now six days into the Republican-manufactured government shutdown.
**And here’s the plain truth: The majority party in Congress shut it down because they are committed to cutting health care.**
Congressional Republicans shut down the government to protect Donald Trump’s cruel Medicaid cuts and let health care premiums spike for working families. They’re refusing to work with Democrats to reverse the damage they created — all to keep the billionaire donors fueling Trump’s corrupt hold on power happy.
There is absolutely no reason they can’t do their jobs and come to the table to negotiate a deal.
**Democrats are ready._We’ve been ready._ And every day, we’re holding the line to defend people’s health care and reopen the government. **But while we fight to protect care, House Republicans are more interested in political spin and partisan games. I won’t let them get away with it.
My neighbors in Delaware are already being furloughed. People who rely on ACA coverage are staring down massive premium hikes. And if this shutdown drags on, food assistance that families rely on to feed their children will lapse, and veterans will lose services. And it’s all a direct result of political choices made by Republicans in power.
I didn’t come to Congress to watch this kind of cruelty play out in silence. I came here to fight for working families — and I’m staying in this fight until the government is back open and care is protected because lives depend on it.
Thanks for being in this with me. I’ll keep updating you as this unfolds.
— Sarah
P.S. I know many are facing economic uncertainty. I completely understand if you’re unable to donate. Please know that I’m so grateful for everything you do to support our campaign. [**However, if you can, please consider making a small donation to help fuel our fight to reclaim the House next year and stop this chaos.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20251006-1?refcode=em20251006-2388&refcode2=2388_21716_JKjfVB&akid=2388%2E21716%2EJKjfVB)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251006-1&t=1&refcode2=2388_21716_JKjfVB&akid=2388%2E21716%2EJKjfVB)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2388%2E21716%2EJKjfVB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2388%2E21716%2EJKjfVB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2388%2E21716%2EJKjfVB)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

body:

Always faithful.

Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. Hey folks,
I sat down with my friend and powerhouse progressive Stephanie Miller for a conversation that hits just about everything: ICE terrorizing Chicago, the moral rot behind the government shutdown, and why Democrats _must_ hold the line right now. If you're feeling overwhelmed or angry--watch this:
* **[00:01:07]** Stephanie lights into Trump's chaos week--shutdown threats, foreign policy disasters, and why "fuckery" is the word of the day
* **[00:02:28]** I break down ICE's dystopian actions in Chicago, including masked agents, fake reports, and zip-tying kids
* **[00:04:04]** Stephanie calls out the moral Rubicon we've crossed and why it's deliberate--this is about provoking martial law
* **[00:08:09]** We talk about what Democrats are really up against, and why we _can 't_ afford to lose the shutdown fight
* **[00:18:28]** Why mainstream media is failing, and why you should ignore the despair and keep showing up

**[If you want more of this work--raw, honest, and unfiltered--please consider becoming a paid subscriber. It helps us build the studio, pay staff a living wage, and keep the momentum going.](https://substack.com/redirect/425a620a-bcc8-4a58-a6b8-12563e23cdd9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Deb Haaland HQ
subject: We have a large gap to close
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
There are just a few hours left.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)
Hey,
There are just a few hours left until tonight’s public fundraising deadline. **Here’s where we stand:**
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_2_progress?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4886&refcode2=4886_400544_ZV3knd&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)
**This is the biggest moment for our campaign yet, and we have a large gap to close.**
**[Can you rush a $5 donation right now to raise the $32,500 we need to cross the finish line before midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_2_progress?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4886&refcode2=4886_400544_ZV3knd&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_2_progress?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4886&refcode2=4886_400544_ZV3knd&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)**
Deb has never had the kind of money to self-fund a campaign, and she doesn’t come from wealth. **_That means National Republicans and our opponents will be scrutinizing our fundraising totals to determine if we have the massive grassroots support we need to stay competitive._**
Because of supporters like you, we’re building a FIERCE grassroots campaign to make life more affordable, improve our schools, make healthcare available and accessible, and make our communities safer. Our average online contribution of just $23 is proof of that.
**But this race is officially heating up, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.** One of our self-funding opponents is airing TV ads, Trump allies are gearing up to spend big to attack Deb, and the election year is right around the corner.
**If we post a weak report, it makes Deb and our campaign vulnerable — and we can’t afford that.[So if you’re able, can we count on you to make a contribution of $5 to this email to help us close the gap before midnight? We can’t do it without you!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251006_2_progress?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-4886&refcode2=4886_400544_ZV3knd&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)**
Thank you in advance for pitching in today!
— Team Deb
P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand.
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251006-2&t=2&refcode2=4886_400544_ZV3knd&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4886%2E400544%2EZV3knd)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116738072/574269812/1006262291?refcode=WUEFHJ05_20251006_VASplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1057172&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTBhZjY1Ni1lYmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbf-2Ic7XrtWZGctju0ez42djIpB5GZUpA654vP3nVw=) A LOT is on the line in the Commonwealth this November, Peter.

Virginia's 2025 elections will set the tone for Democrats heading into 2026, as well as determine whether Virginians' fundamental freedoms will be protected for years to come.

Right now, Democrats have a slim _one-seat_ majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. It might not sound like much, but that one seat has successfully prevented MAGA Gov. Glenn Youngkin from passing his far-reaching and dangerous agenda. We urgently need to expand this majority to continue making progress in Virginia.

[**EMILYs List know the stakes in Virginia this year, which is why we've endorsed ten incredible women to flip House of Delegate seats in November. Today, we're asking you to invest in Virginia's future and split a donation between EMILYs List and Virginia's Democratic House caucus. clean_body: Let's do something special | = A LOT is on the line in the Commonwealth this November, Peter. Virginia's 2025 elections will set the tone for Democrats heading into 2026, as well as determine whether Virginians' fundamental freedoms will be protected for years to come. Right now, Democrats have a slim one-seat majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. It might not sound like much, but that one seat has successfully prevented MAGA Gov. Glenn Youngkin from passing his far-reaching and dangerous agenda. We urgently need to expand this majority to continue making progress in Virginia. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Virginia's elections this year will be a litmus test for 2026. Women will be at the center of governing power in the Commonwealth, but we need your help in these critical last few weeks. Voters are already voting, and what happens this month will absolutely determine the outcome on election night. = = Thank you for stepping up, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: It's Kevin Kiley's shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall, and the United States government has now been shut down for the SIXTH day in a row.
And this is a shutdown that Republicans like Kevin Kiley need to take full accountability for.
Because House Speaker Mike Johnson and Kevin Kiley like to lie so much about why this is happening, let me set the record straight:
REPUBLICANS are cutting Medicaid and throwing 15 million people off of their healthcare because they want to make tax breaks for the wealthy permanent.
They are taking money from the poor to give it to the rich.
People who are already struggling to make ends meet and people who can't afford an increase of almost double to their insurance premiums are having their lives put on the line so that billionaires can buy another yacht (or attend another Napa Valley fundraiser with Kiley).
This is going to destroy rural hospitals and hurt working people.
Friend, Trump's lapdog, Kevin Kiley, is throwing us under the bus by not breaking with Republicans to save working people's healthcare. Will you chip in what you can to our people-powered campaign today and help us flip this key seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251006_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable. Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 SUPPORT HEIDI [] PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS Heidi Hall for Congress PO Box 729 Grass Valley, CA 95945 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m pumped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re proud to announce four new endorsements.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251006-1&t=1&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)
Peter, this is a difficult moment for our country. There is no way around that. But there is a solution:
**Electing a new generation of bold progressives, young leaders who aren’t afraid to fight back and do the work of building a better future for all of us.**
**[We’re ready to elect the leaders we deserve, but we need your support. Before we share our newest round of endorsements, will you pitch in $5?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251006_1_endorsements?refcode=em20251006-2720&amount=5&refcode2=2720_587540_TFUUKl&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)**
Today, Leaders We Deserve is proud to announce four new endorsements:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251006_1_endorsements?amount=5&refcode=em20251006-2720&refcode2=2720_587540_TFUUKl&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)
**Akbar Ali (GA HD-106 – Atlanta)**
_Akbar Ali, 21, is a small business owner, KSU graduate, and First Vice Chair of the Gwinnett County Democratic Party running for Georgia’s 106th State House District. A lifelong community leader, he’s organized student marches, served on the Citizens Transit Advisory Board, and stayed active with PTAs, the Gwinnett NAACP, and grassroots groups. Akbar’s campaign focuses on lowering costs for families, protecting public schools, and defending constitutional rights. Endorsed by outgoing Rep. Shelly Hutchinson and others, he would be the youngest member of the Georgia General Assembly if elected._
**Donavan McKinney (MI-13 – Detroit)**
_Donavan McKinney is a lifelong Detroiter, husband, and father of two who rose from poverty in northeast Detroit to become the first in his family to graduate college. Now serving in the Michigan State House, he has championed clean water, affordable utilities, and free pre-K, while leading efforts to secure hundreds of millions for schools, rec centers, and lead pipe replacement. A longtime advocate for environmental justice, he played a key role on Governor Whitmer’s Environmental Justice Council and helped launch the state’s first community violence intervention program. McKinney is committed to bold progressive change, from criminal justice reform to strengthening workers’ rights, always centering the needs of Michigan’s poorest district._
**Christian Menefee (TX-18 – Houston)**
_Christian Menefee, the son of two military parents and a product of Houston public schools, made history in 2020 as the youngest and first Black person elected Harris County Attorney. He has taken on Donald Trump and Governor Greg Abbott in court — and won — defending voting rights, reproductive freedom, healthcare, and clean air and water. Leading a 300-person public law office in the nation’s third-largest county, Menefee has proven himself a fighter for working families and democracy. Now, he’s ready to bring that same record of bold leadership and results to Congress._
**Randy Villegas (CA-22 – Bakersfield)**
_Randy Villegas is running for Congress in California’s 22nd Congressional District. An educator, auto repair shop owner, and a proud son of Mexican immigrants, Randy is running to serve his home — California's Central Valley. He grew up on Medicaid, food assistance, and school lunches; the very programs Republicans like David Valadao have gutted. While his opponents are raking in big money from the very corporations ripping us off, Randy is refusing corporate checks. His mom used to tell him, "Tell me who you're with, and I'll tell you who you are." Randy is with the people, fighting to lower costs, deliver Medicare for All, and protect the rights of his neighbors in the Valley._
Peter, I’m pumped about these candidates — and I know you will be, too, once you get to know them and what they are all about. They are the epitome of the kinds of young leaders we need fighting for us in state legislatures and Congress.
**[Will you make a split $5 contribution now to stand with us and our endorsees?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251006_1_endorsements?refcode=em20251006-2720&amount=5&refcode2=2720_587540_TFUUKl&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
P.S. We’ve got more endorsements on the way! **[Donate $5 to help us keep supporting candidates across the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251006_1_endorsements?refcode=em20251006-2720&amount=5&refcode2=2720_587540_TFUUKl&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251006-1&t=3&refcode2=2720_587540_TFUUKl&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2720%2E587540%2ETFUUKl)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: Donald Trump's attacks on Virginia's economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I have a plan to get Virginia's economy back on track, and I'm ready to go anywhere and everywhere to talk about it.
Peter, I joined Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to discuss my campaign for Governor of Virginia and the state of our economy, and I'd like to tell you about it.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96363?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV)
But first, as the Democratic nominee in the biggest election of Donald Trump's second term, I'm counting on grassroots donations to win big, to send a message to this White House, and to set an example for the entire nation.
**[So, will you contribute $10 or more today to our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us contact undecided voters across Virginia? Early voting is underway, and we need more donations to fund our organizing program.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96363?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96364?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96363?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV)
---
Now, I didn't hold back in my interview with Lawrence, and I won't with you either.
**Donald Trump has devastated Virginia's economy, but my opponent won't stop cheering him on.**
Winsome Earle-Sears has said Trump's tax law does "so many great things."
The data is clear: 350,000 Virginians are projected to lose healthcare coverage and rural hospitals are set to close due to the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill." Everyday goods are skyrocketing due to Trump's tariffs, and thousands of our civil servants are now unemployed due to DOGE.
_The Bureau of Labor Statistics just announced that Virginia lost more than 43,000 jobs earlier this year._ And our unemployment rate has ticked up for seven straight months. _(The last time that happened was the 2008 financial crisis.)_
Now, I have a plan to get Virginia's economy back on track, and I'm ready to go anywhere and everywhere to talk about it. Yes, that means more interviews, more events, and more TV ads.
But all this campaigning is expensive, and the donations from these emails go a _long way_ toward funding our work.
**[So, are you with me, Peter? I'm asking you to split $10 or even more today with Heartland Patriots to help us spread the word about our "Growing Virginia Plan" and stand up to Donald Trump's attacks.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96363?refcode=em20251006-9529&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9529%2E614464%2EiRxSKV)**

clean_body: | Peter — with everything going on, we want to make sure you didn’t miss this headline: = Over the last week, Governor Kotek stood up to Donald Trump’s illegal plan to send troops into Portland, Oregon. She beat back misinformation and quickly coordinated with Attorney General Dan Rayfield, local city leaders, and other Governors around the country to successfully block Trump’s unlawful actions. But this fight doesn’t end here. Donald Trump still wants to occupy and provoke chaos in our cities — he’s even trying to send in troops from other states. name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: ✂️ First rate cut of the year. Here's what to know.
body:
| Hi Peter, The Federal Reserve just trimmed interest rates for the first time this year. It's only a quarter-point cut, but even a small adjustment hints that the Fed is taking a more cautious view of where the economy is heading. Hiring has cooled. Growth is losing steam. Inflation is still hanging around. So what is the Fed trying to do, and what does it mean for your money? Let's break it down... Think of the Federal Reserve as a traffic cop standing in the middle of a busy intersection. The economy is the flow of cars, trucks, and buses moving in every direction. Interest rates are the signals the Fed uses to help manage traffic. When everything's racing ahead too quickly (like when the economy is booming), the Fed may throw up a stop sign to help prevent a pile-up. But when traffic begins to crawl, it waves cars ahead to keep things moving. The recent quarter-point rate cut was the equivalent of the Fed giving a cautious "green light."1 Lowering rates is meant to get businesses borrowing, consumers spending, and investment flowing again... the financial equivalent to letting more cars roll through a slower intersection. So why is the Fed even doing this now? Job growth has slowed, consumer spending is softer, and inflation still hasn't fully returned to normal levels. The worry isn't that the economy is crashing, but that it could lose momentum. "The balance of risks has shifted," Fed Chair Jerome Powell explained last week.2 **Translation** : Inflation was the Fed's top worry for much of the past two years, but now Powell is signaling that jobs are looking shakier. The Fed is effectively pivoting its attention from "prices are too high" to "growth is too slow." But even a tiny rate cut can set big things in motion. Lower interest rates are designed to get money moving. Businesses may borrow more to expand. Consumers might feel more confident making large purchases. Investors could shift strategies. And yes, even the stock market tends to pay attention. Historically, lower interest rates also tend to reduce the value of the U.S. dollar against other currencies. That makes American-made goods more competitive abroad, but could potentially push prices up at home. In other words, the Fed's move isn't just technical. It can influence how people spend, save, and invest. But what does this mean for _you_?
* **If you're carrying debt:** You might see a slight drop in interest on credit cards or adjustable loans. It's not huge, but over time, a lower rate can ease some pressure.
* **If you're shopping for a home:** Mortgage rates could tick down slightly. Still, one small rate cut won't transform the housing market overnight.
* **If you're saving or investing:** Lower rates can affect how different assets perform. Stocks usually respond positively. Bond yields might adjust. CDs will likely come with stingier yields.
* **If retirement is on your mind:** Changes like this can shift market expectations and income planning. Whether you're already retired or still building your nest egg, it's worth checking if your plan is still on track.
* **If you're planning a trip overseas:** You might have to pay a little more to purchase Yen, Euros, and Pesos abroad.

But again, this rate cut isn't a dramatic shift in direction. It's more of a minor adjustment. A subtle signal that the Fed sees a few cracks forming and wants to stay ahead of them. It's not a reason to panic or pivot. But it _is_ a good reminder that the economic landscape is always evolving, and small changes can add up over time. Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjB6d05UNDhxZ1UyNmVaWiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. The Fed's move was a small adjustment, but it still means conditions are shifting. If you haven't checked your financial roadmap in a while, now's a good time. If you'd like to schedule a time to chat, I'm here.
---
Sources 1\. Federal Reserve Board of Governors, 2025 [URL: [https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20250917a.htm](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuZmVkZXJhbHJlc2VydmUuZ292XC9uZXdzZXZlbnRzXC9wcmVzc3JlbGVhc2VzXC9tb25ldGFyeTIwMjUwOTE3YS5odG0iLCJoYXNoIjoiMHp3TlQ0OHFnVTI2ZVpaIiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0)] 2\. BBC, 2025 [URL: [https://www.bbc.com/news/live/cx2xe98r4wrt](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuYmJjLmNvbVwvbmV3c1wvbGl2ZVwvY3gyeGU5OHI0d3J0Izp-OnRleHQ9U3BlYWtpbmclMjB0byUyMGpvdXJuYWxpc3RzJTJDJTIwUG93ZWxsJTIwdW5kZXJzY29yZXMsdG93YXJkJTIwaW5mbGF0aW9uJTJDJTIyJTIwaGUlMjBzYXlzIiwiaGFzaCI6IjB6d05UNDhxZ1UyNmVaWiIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)]

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

| Peter,
The 2025 Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention election -- the most important election of 2025 -- has officially begun as mail-in ballots for the upcoming election begin arriving in mailboxes for PA voters.
If Trump and MAGA seize this court, it'll be the biggest step towards Trump fulfilling his fascist takeover yet. Here's what's at stake:

* All of PA's Dem seats will be gerrymandered out of existence.

* An extreme abortion ban will be upheld.

* MAGA will have free reign to conduct voter suppression and steal the '26 and '28 elections before they even happen.

But in addition to mail in ballots something sinister is also arriving in the mailboxes of PA Democratic voters: a poisoned piece of mail.

The 2025 Pennsylvania's Supreme Court retention election -- the most important election of 2025 -- has officially begun as mail-in ballots for the upcoming election begin arriving in mailboxes for PA voters.
If Trump and MAGA seize this court, it'll be the biggest step towards Trump fulfilling his fascist takeover yet. Here's what's at stake:

* All of PA's Dem seats will be gerrymandered out of existence.
* An extreme abortion ban will be upheld.
* MAGA will have free reign to conduct voter suppression and steal the '26 and '28 elections before they even happen.

But in addition to mail in ballots something sinister is also arriving in the mailboxes of PA Democratic voters: a poisoned piece of mail.

Utilizing deceptive tactics like the mailer above MAGA is poisoning the well and tricking Democratic voters into removing their own Democratic Supreme Court Justices (the judge's party affiliation does not appear on the ballot) under the auspices of "Protecting Women" and "Defending our Democracy." The Philadelphia Inquirer reports that the group behind most of these ads, "Citizens for Term Limits" is tied to ultra-MAGA billionaire and richest man in Pennsylvania, Jeffrey Yass. Yass's backing means this group has unlimited money at their disposal to fuel their deception If we don't counter MAGA's disinformation campaign right now, we will lose this election and it will be fellow Democrats, tricked by these messages, who will be our undoing. That's where Defend Our Courts comes in. With over $1.5 million raised and an army of canvassers we're one of the only organizations positioned to counter the flood of disinformation. To do this we need to redouble our efforts before mail-in ballots start hitting mailboxes next week and it won't be cheap. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == 29 days until E-Day and everything is on the line here. We must act before it's too late. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. ## Commonsense Corner:
---
In case y’all missed it, the Democrat running for attorney general in Virginia, Jay Jones, fantasized about [killing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/0bKeU7NN75GSlJen3ozt8kZFfkpHCZOBh9qd0PIvqqxwUvrlHs8Gr4efL5-8n_Z0zyTaYljVuqR_F2XY8P5_hNckbzSepPMVsfxdfYsORpbryIWdR1WG5ku5MDv5U9czZzmSmjp9ry3piCxaVTh74i8gtQHC2L0MXIIBgu1xh45uJjnTekdvxXkuhmm1GxDrBX8McFonJhqwro2rJV0tY1Q1mY_RNRH96b9Dqw93mxKUzosYv5Hxu_Ow6jGplsWzO5KmekhxmJ3_NQEAdW-XGCGa-qdLVmhqxzd3DZvOWg1Dpk-CrOE80MykVuYrm3m3q1Mbg-bnKx3fV6Sc3nrZYpwClXUJ2-3t6K71K06jRsia_4zhlVN80gM1WUTffV44rciXjWpIba1jVgirgskz6XKMgsq8bRXS2xif-adRDSDI0K3wtYfddwQRMbhZXYLoXszba9AoB-e6OBMftAulx9aE4vjPhg9quFjsK_pGw8bFp1vOsU5PMR4ET4exWHnk0X5l8VqO_ZU3bS0DYS6F-wlap67aAZhOMYBD67wFT--3Y9gIrxiI6Pc5coh8mzZ67L67aC0u4cypShpWgdwGpnQ0GmMfcG8/pxw0SYcKsdYkjFMMt539FucDmyLlDqTb/13) a Republican lawmaker and desecrated on his grave. But it gets worse: Text messages show he even wished death on the man’s children. Now you’d think after something that vile, Democrats would do the right thing and tell this monster to drop out of the race, right? Nope. They circled the wagons and had the audacity to quote the Bible to defend their morally bankrupt candidate. A [press release](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/VvLXkQnDiW1YKgcd5GVYzz83ckmVfJfp4YdJneLXD8UJVgoCndNyfCL7A_oQRTD0PgcGyFRJHyd3nwNd70Fl0qaNcwWxJXjb3UkMsYMR5fV9ekch9KZmNlv4EuHALNKiQ7P9MLs4NiAW48ljfi8aESsQPxJk2AUY61i5jNQ7KIJ4MmxptNy1Drh_irCC2LVHwhR2XVMXYS3VJy_BiI3s7yuE57pZcbn5ryfhvlLY-aaDcZu4PTuTP9qxC1sHYJZdPpzKzGuNYubtAZyvHgIaUclxkn2R3AW5GDLFAzWKlwGDicuTy7deVUESf1V8lYi4ubwJ6BnC1cyjwnLtkNufGmXnGCK2GeB5GgbSLuqbqvZ-BpZ4FyjDUqojN82Os66uCOxzTyTdikSOj-FDOVsQOSMCXed4_t2VhCJBiDeEfMwO_6-PJYV5H3FM8v-EpUZpbjYqjAiSuV9sdoobrrC8CUlUXvyceJwtbjF73zItXIsqSuGnEhDnJ4ILD0u3R9IEzfqgDEowb6VJ3L8VPEMoTUUX6hZHWyx2UGHOvHX_G5pGK-EMvba7cAg3MSLXy3nmCa2Jn0MWct5kn1vsoTFNAiMBJ-555SK8Ag/1zjPgxumAKjgconZ_A1p664PC1bdzJjD/13) from Virginia Beach Democrats brushed the whole thing off as past mistakes, saying “Let those without sin cast the first stone.” Have these people lost their minds?! Enough of the “both sides need to lower the temperature” nonsense—Democrats are the problem. They excuse violence, fuel hatred, and then lecture the rest of us about compassion and tolerance. We knew that Trump Derangement Syndrome would rear its ugly head again, but this time it’s rotted any last shred of sound judgment they had. The Left is so desperate for power, they’re willing to wish death on anyone who stands in their way. It’s sick. It’s twisted. And it’s exactly why we have to keep fighting to save this country from a party that has clearly lost its way.
---
|
---

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: In case y’all missed it, the Democrat running for attorney general in Virginia, Jay Jones, fantasized about a Republican lawmaker and desecrated on his grave. But it gets worse: Text messages show he even wished death on the man’s children. Now you’d think after something that vile, Democrats would do the right thing and tell this monster to drop out of the race, right? Nope. They circled the wagons and had the audacity to quote the Bible to defend their morally bankrupt candidate. A from Virginia Beach Democrats brushed the whole thing off as past mistakes, saying “Let those without sin cast the first stone.” Have these people lost their minds?! Enough of the “both sides need to lower the temperature” nonsense—Democrats are the problem. They excuse violence, fuel hatred, and then lecture the rest of us about compassion and tolerance. We knew that Trump Derangement Syndrome would rear its ugly head again, but this time it’s rotted any last shred of sound judgment they had. The Left is so desperate for power, they’re willing to wish death on anyone who stands in their way. It’s sick. It’s twisted. And it’s exactly why we have to keep fighting to save this country from a party that has clearly lost its way. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you think Democrats should disavow Jay Jones and call on him to drop out of the race for Virginia Attorney General? Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General.

But **nothing** prepared me for what **Jay Jones** said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages.

Jay Jones fantasized about **shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head,** choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called **Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms.**

clean_body: Then he wished death upon young children. This is truly sick.| | | Friend, I've seen a lot of shocking things as a former prosecutor and as Virginia's Attorney General. But nothing prepared me for what Jay Jones said about Former Virginia Speaker Todd Gilbert and his young children in text messages. Jay Jones fantasized about shooting Todd Gilbert twice in the head, choosing to execute him over Hitler and Pol Pot. Then he called Gilbert's young children "little fascists" who should be killed — in their weeping mother’s arms. This isn't politics. This is the unhinged, sick fantasy of a dangerous person. Every parent in Virginia should be horrified. Jones dreams about executing his political opponents and having their children killed. No decent human being fantasizes about shooting their colleagues and killing their children. Jones is clearly disqualified — not just from being Attorney General, but from holding any office across Virginia or our country. This deranged individual cannot be trusted with a badge, let alone the power to prosecute Virginians. 🚨 — Attorney General Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

We need to know if you’ll join us in this fight.
| | Friend, last week we came to you with an URGENT call to action to PLEDGE TO ATTEND YOUR local NO KINGS PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH!

This is CRITICAL to our fight — **Donald Trump is taking us closer and closer to authoritarian rule every day.**

_But we STILL haven’t received your pledge to attend your local protest:_

[**We can’t afford for Democrats to sit this one out, so we’re bumping this email and hoping you’ll reply by tonight’s midnight deadline! We need 1,000 supporters to sign on IMMEDIATELY:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251006_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=21397%2E878179%2E-HsC_S) | [SECOND ATTEMPT: I WILL ATTEND MY LOCAL “NO KINGS” PROTEST ON OCTOBER 18TH AGAINST KING TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251006_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=21397%2E878179%2E-HsC_S)

Folks, Trump is TERRIFIED of our grassroots power. **He knows that if we ALL show up, his MAGA agenda is COOKED!**

That’s why we need EVERY Democrat in your city to step up — _including you!_

[**Please, friend: Will you pledge to show up to your local No Kings Protest on October 18th? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no-kings-protest-pledge/?source=VPP_20251006_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=21397%2E878179%2E-HsC_S)

I’ve served long enough to know one thing: When Republicans play political games, it’s always about protecting their power. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: We’re Almost There
body:
Final Push to Protect Our Vote
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/3a4g0WPnqStOFdos1HWfP2BKjk_mw86PC-XieaFePcA=425)Patriot–Tea Party Patriots Action leaders and supporters have submitted over 1,000 comments to date to the U.S. Election Assistance Commission (EAC) letting them know that documentary proof of U.S. citizenship should be required for the National Mail Voter Registration Form.However, we need to keep the momentum going and **flood the zone with comments in support of this common-sense requirement that physical proof of U.S. citizenship be required** in order to register to vote and to vote.If you have not commented, please do so as soon as possible in advance of the October 20 deadline. [_**Submit your input today**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/1/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/DBdWkdo9NzTgBKCkupiwakMBai364F4nTk8FAIqIIn4=425) to the EAC through the easy-to-use online portal we have set up.[SUBMIT COMMENT](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Feac-comment%2F/2/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/lPmP2v4ENSUcdoDvDYOM0oTzoTsE-vma9uuSKmLc15U=425)Don’t forget to spread the word throughout your network to encourage them to let their voices be heard!Radical leftists are fighting tooth and nail to defeat this rule change and continue to put tens of millions of dollars and activate their networks to pressure the EAC to defeat this rule change. Their tactics are to spread many lies including declaring that thousands of voters will be disenfranchised.We have put together [_**this fact sheet**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FOnlyCitizensVote-Myths.pdf/1/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/yd8wWGBhlzLQewlPm9kuoMqBkubtXdqVx1tZC1cA_c4=425) to help you debunk these falsehoods.So, remember: the deadline to comment is Monday, October 20th.In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/uKQWpXAXozBFJkcCsGwz15fA1kIIb-aiUvxGXLUiPTw=425) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/eWKpN6v_uthFdOHIj1FdOcYuP0Gi1tpr3JuranB7nK4=425)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/8NCRJMgLFX2Pn0oVJeHRCBty4dVeZqvt6pxJGoZu5ak=425) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000199bb421fa5-6d8fd913-32fd-4c19-99d5-5abd09d3ecec-000000/ETVGE3vrvHO6k5yFy7CFjjsiXfzQbmypcg5e07VCvNs=425).

But since those victories, Republicans have spent $10 million to try to defeat Jon.

clean_body: Remember this, Peter? In 2021, millions of Georgia voters turned out to vote for a better, more prosperous future for themselves and the entire country. But since those victories, Republicans have spent $10 million to try to defeat Jon. That means that in order to win again in 2026, we are going to have to do even more than we did in 2020 and 2021 — and Jon can’t do it alone. Republicans are going to spend hundreds of millions of dollars flooding Georgia voters with attack ads and lies to try to replace him with someone who will just vote yes on whatever Trump wants, no questions asked. name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We have a simple goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
folks,
Voter Action Project has an easy-to-understand mission: To increase voter participation across the country.
We have several goals to help guide us in accomplishing that mission -- Expanding ballot access, meeting voters where they are, driving new voters to register, and reengaging lapsed voters to bring them back to participation.
This work keeps getting harder. We're not giving up, however, and we don't think we're alone in this fight for our fundamental right to vote.
Please, pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to stand with us as we work to protect the right to vote for every American >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100625_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?express_lane=true&refcode=100625_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100625_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project started in 2020 with the simple idea that we should all be able to vote by mail during a deadly pandemic, where standing close to one another in voting lines might endanger our health.
We've evolved since then to recognize the threats to our rights and how critical the ability to vote is, whether you do it in person, by mail, early, or on Election Day.
We believe the simple truth that the more Americans who vote, the more our country represents the interests of the people and not the powerful.
Your support helps us power our grassroots efforts against the dark-money millions at work to restrict the right to vote. Chip in to help us fight back >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-infrastructure?refcode=100625_2&amount=25]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100625_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
