We have several goals to help guide us in accomplishing that mission -- Expanding ballot access, meeting voters where they are, driving new voters to register, and reengaging lapsed voters to bring them back to participation. This work keeps getting harder. We're not giving up, however, and we don't think we're alone in this fight for our fundamental right to vote. Please, pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to stand with us as we work to protect the right to vote for every American >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Voter Action Project started in 2020 with the simple idea that we should all be able to vote by mail during a deadly pandemic, where standing close to one another in voting lines might endanger our health. We've evolved since then to recognize the threats to our rights and how critical the ability to vote is, whether you do it in person, by mail, early, or on Election Day. We believe the simple truth that the more Americans who vote, the more our country represents the interests of the people and not the powerful. Your support helps us power our grassroots efforts against the dark-money millions at work to restrict the right to vote. Chip in to help us fight back >> [] Thank you, Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

Peter,

Earlier this week, our government was shut down by Republican inaction. Democrats, like Kim, showed up to work, ready to make a deal that would keep our country open and lower our healthcare prices. **Republicans stayed home.**

Nearly 80,000 federal workers reside in Washington State. That's 80,000 workers who will have their paychecks delayed and so much more.

But Kim knows it's not just these workers who suffer when the government shuts down—though they face the brunt of it. Families across the state must now deal with delayed benefit checks from SNAP or WIC. Regional VA offices could close, delaying help for local families. Students applying for federal loans or who need help with current loans will see drastic delays. **And this is only a small portion of what's to come.**

The best way for Kim to fight for you and your families is to know exactly how this shutdown is affecting each and every one of you. That's why we're launching this quick survey—because your voice deserves to be heard during this difficult time.

[**Will you take a few moments to send in your response? name: Amy McGrath
subject: I just made this official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116742344/574283944/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.06_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGYyMTVmZC1mOGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BK91VB5ob3u2uTCFVnYbgTcORQCMvG5mMMAQ09Ebmw0=) Folks,

We're at an inflection point in our country's history.

Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends.

And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering.

Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears.

**I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate.** We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me.

As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country.

Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face.

That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. **That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone.**

Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell.

And I intend to win it.

**But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. _[Will you split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan to kickstart this campaign and help us wage a real fight for the future of our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116742345/574283945/-895354081?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.06_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGYyMTVmZC1mOGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BK91VB5ob3u2uTCFVnYbgTcORQCMvG5mMMAQ09Ebmw0=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116742346/574283946/-895354081?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.06_Amy-McGrath-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGYyMTVmZC1mOGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BK91VB5ob3u2uTCFVnYbgTcORQCMvG5mMMAQ09Ebmw0=)

clean_body: = Folks, We're at an inflection point in our country's history. Throughout my career as a Marine, I took an oath to defend the Constitution. That's still my North Star. And every day, we're watching the very principles America was founded on — basic liberties, the rule of law — come under direct attack. Republicans in power are using their authority to further empower and enrich themselves and their friends. And as a result, people across Kentucky — and across the nation — are suffering. Well, I refuse to sit back and watch this happen. That oath I took is ringing in my ears. I'm announcing that I'm running for U.S. Senate. We need leaders who won't be bullied by an administration that destroys our institutions and betrays our country's foundations. I served as a Marine for 20 years — these guys don't scare me. As you know, I've run for this seat once before. It was a tough election that didn't go our way. But in my line of work, you don't quit when you get knocked down. At a moment like this, each of us needs to do everything we can to get back up and fight for our country. Just like you, I'm sick and tired of politicians who care only about themselves. And they're throwing hard-working people under the bus — all across the country, and especially here in Kentucky. These people are selfish cowards who wouldn't know a backbone if it hit them in the face. That's why I'm running. Because we deserve leaders who aren't afraid to stand up for what they believe in, even when — especially when — times are tough. That's what this country is worth to me, and I know that like Maggie Hassan, I'm not alone. Look, I know this race won't be easy. But here's the thing: Democrats can win — yes, even in red states — when we're brave enough to stand up for what we believe in. This is an open Senate seat — something Kentucky hasn't had in 15 years, thanks to Mitch McConnell. And I intend to win it. But I can’t do it without a lot of help from people like you, so I need to ask directly. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy McGrath and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = For that and for everything to come in this campaign, thank you. Amy If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can .** Click here to . name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: We are in a crisis of the Republican Party’s making.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Friend,

I want to thank you for your support these last few weeks and months. With your help, we exceeded our online end-of-quarter fundraising goal – and are building the momentum we need to keep IL-13 blue.

Right now, I’m laser-focused on the devastating impacts of the government shutdown. Instead of working with Democrats to lower healthcare costs for millions of Americans, and despite controlling the House, Senate, and presidency, national Republicans left town to let the shutdown happen.

Make no mistake: We are in a crisis of the Republican Party’s making. This is a dramatic escalation, and their refusal to reach a deal that funds the government, extends ACA premium tax credits, and reverses devastating Medicaid cuts in the Big Ugly Bill is unacceptable.

I joined CBS to discuss how the shutdown will impact thousands of working families in IL-13 and beyond.

Click here to watch my remarks in full: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rgGt2vTtF0Q&t=2s

I’m not standing idly by while Illinoisans suffer from the decisions of this administration. Something has to give, and I won’t stop until this manufactured healthcare crisis is resolved.

Thank you,

Nikki

https://www.facebook.com/NikkiforCongress/?
https://www.instagram.com/nikkibudzinski/?
https://twitter.com/NikkiBudzinski?

Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. Chip in to Nikki's campaign today.

To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: NikkiForCongress.com [https://nikkiforcongress.com/?]
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to unsubscribe: https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/p/e8jmxCqJNkS72mawkeDcaA2?unsubscribedata=UWHWZi2JZOjslPqeBQ9X37NlF9HOPUGNeJuOf3itrsaop3hZlHort7jKE4zePx4V34DHyhW0YJXeXa%2FUQxgTcWi%2FidZH7vyO0B%2FEPBX5RegMtBJPuEQtLnl8mzPlzcQhA6tJvAx4vUFpWiZZ%2BbhF8ALdFIElFuj5MuQldBkgRpP7%2BpEgQ0RssJgCCZFVuHUStzrik711f2bkgjdE1MkFUQpkANsx%2Bn%2B0dJfpu4WllP7FhiDDEyzFeR7qErhq4cKEPEkxCDdApwEQQr9dDTben%2FQ2tV5EkglFFScI2snV9dlJ73sj7M%2FtXfHMhbPIBOH%2FW8klbDnh5WjD2NMq977P6BTzmqddK7A0AFZ6Wl6wuapylWanuhOQXjXaZExBUCJPlZflJz7GuCqyoB9uYoh4qqU%2FQ6vtiCSd2z1tjb5gbwtPjmKGOkjhrMtOayy8xNII .

After that, every candidate, including me, will be required to publicly report our fundraising totals. This is HUGE -- our last chance this year to show the strength of this grassroots campaign.

When Washington abandons people, governors are the first line of defense -- and we're seeing that now more than ever. With a Republican government shutdown, costs rising, rural hospitals on the brink, and thousands at risk of losing coverage -- state governments are on the front lines. New Mexicans deserve a leader who truly understands their struggles and will fight fiercely to protect them. **I 'm ready to fight and deliver every day for New Mexicans. ** My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crime so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. I am ready to bring the bold solutions we need. _But to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve, I can 't do it without supporters like you._**_ _** **Unfortunately, we 're facing a crowded and expensive race. One of my self-funding opponents is already airing TV ads, and Republicans are closely watching our campaign. ****And right now, we 're racing against the clock to prove we can raise what it takes to win. **
With the government shut down and affordability more uncertain than ever, I completely understand if now's not the right time to make a donation.** **[**But if your budget allows for it, can you split a generous contribution of $10 or anything you can today between Jonathan Nez and me to help us reach our $250,000 goal?**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/ckRuofZ-s6hIMSeprRv-iQ~~/AAPPABA~/amAvbHIVNty_tyAAqnctDptpr7fe2DeHxfk0GzK9-M9VdXZfANwJHY3tR-ONvu53NNF-KrgS1zgt2O3GxaoU6LWVDRXhp-AIYdSxlcyqI4zfauMJ0YSCfZwRoamhGPULkYHja-2KR1XdeBpPoLb8ktLtT2UnR53Ybcs9Z4mYh7h_5gP1ysd3Nwedouzvvg0B6bWFLKEu6lRQV8aFwTo53NE9xNdQPm1S_P75FX1KxOR6KNHAbquEDE_Y36RH3R-JzH1eBMAfcWTaS9citF2loXhpPZFYA3py4YIWKArGxMNOYDuiLgw6uBKrFb3Cl_WIOCyM5BRCVfAnGV0NtGePLa6aSvifzdDtM6Q30BFILFa5-91INzYoBvTscGVkdWOu8wAAx895Ql-izMovlOJlSA~~)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Files Reply Brief to Supreme Court in Historic Illinois Election Integrity Case
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a reply brief to the Supreme Court of the United States in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep.Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)).

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 6, 2025

| RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL _"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch"_ **\- Sean Hannity**

However, the dispute before the justices will not be over whether the law is constitutional, but if the candidate has standing to sue over it. name: Shannon Watts
subject: we need you 🫵
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
We need to do whatever it takes to fight back against Donald Trump and his barbaric agenda. For 20 years, Emerge has been at the forefront of recruiting, training, and supporting Democratic women up and down the ballot.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116743262/574286917/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-10-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNGU1YzdlLWZjYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orbnE-B9X4ohurj-YIcseMYEvgikjGVatdu50IhD9sg=)
---
| Hi Peter, it's Shannon Watts here.

Before the Sandy Hook tragedy, I was a stay-at-home mom of five, trying to make sense of the world. After the tragedy, I realized there wouldn’t be any meaningful change in our gun laws until ordinary people stood up and took action. That’s why I founded Moms Demand Action.

That experience taught me the power of ordinary people stepping into leadership. It’s also why I serve on Emerge’s national board — to help train and support women who are ready to run for office, fight for their communities, and make their voices heard.

_Will you be one of them?_

Applications are open for Emerge’s 2026 National Virtual Trainings. These are fully online programs that inspire Democratic women and non-binary leaders to run and give them the tools to win.
---
| | **January Virtual Boot Camp**
For candidates on the ballot in 2026. Kickstart your campaign, sharpen your skills, connect with influential leaders and Emerge alums.
Boot Camp runs online from January 22 – February 1, 2026.
---
| [APPLY NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116743263/574286918/1127875010?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNGU1YzdlLWZjYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orbnE-B9X4ohurj-YIcseMYEvgikjGVatdu50IhD9sg=&emci=5c565500-cda2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=eb4e5c7e-fca2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=920818)
---
| | **National Virtual Signature Training Program**
Not ready for this election? This six-month, 70-hour program prepares women planning to run in the next few years. Learn campaign strategy, messaging, and how to build a winning network. Runs February – June 2026.
---
| [APPLY NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116743264/574286919/1474869696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNGU1YzdlLWZjYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orbnE-B9X4ohurj-YIcseMYEvgikjGVatdu50IhD9sg=&emci=5c565500-cda2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=eb4e5c7e-fca2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=920818)
---
The truth is, we need more women running at all levels of government. Women only hold about 30.25% of the 520,000 elected positions in America. We need to do whatever it takes to fight back against Donald Trump and his barbaric agenda. For 20 years, Emerge has been at the forefront of recruiting, training, and supporting Democratic women up and down the ballot.

Emerge women are already proving what’s possible. They’re on the frontlines of Congress, state legislatures, and local offices — driving change, winning elections, and showing the power of a new generation of leaders. **Your time to step up is now.**

Gratefully,

Shannon Watts
Founder of Moms Demand Action and Author of _Fired Up_

P.S. Not ready to run? You can still make a difference by sharing this email with friends who may be interested. _Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight._

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Maria Lazar has a track record of opposing our freedoms and attacking democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251006-666&t=1&akid=667%2E294397%2EqhKD4R)
Team,
Our new opponent, Maria Lazar, has a dangerous record — and if elected, she would be one of the most extreme justices ever to sit on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
* **Lazar openly opposes reproductive freedom** and has been backed by anti-abortion groups that want to restrict fertility treatments and access to contraception — and they only endorse candidates who agree with them 100% of the time.

* **Lazar fuels election conspiracies,** even going as far as authoring a ruling that would have handed personal voter data to election deniers — a decision so extreme it was struck down by the Wisconsin Supreme Court.

* **Lazar is funded by right-wing billionaires.** The same dark money groups that tried to buy a seat on our court in the past have handpicked her to run against Judge Chris Taylor.

As you can see, we absolutely can’t risk letting Lazar take a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
**But right-wing special interests are preparing to spend tens of millions to paint a very different picture of Lazar — and to distort the truth about Judge Chris Taylor.**
That’s why we’re counting on grassroots support. Every dollar you give helps us set the record straight, get the facts to voters, and make sure people know exactly what’s at stake in April’s election.

clean_body: Team, Our new opponent, Maria Lazar, has a dangerous record — and if elected, she would be one of the most extreme justices ever to sit on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Lazar openly opposes reproductive freedom and has been backed by anti-abortion groups that want to restrict fertility treatments and access to contraception — and they only endorse candidates who agree with them 100% of the time. Lazar fuels election conspiracies, even going as far as authoring a ruling that would have handed personal voter data to election deniers — a decision so extreme it was struck down by the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Lazar is funded by right-wing billionaires. The same dark money groups that tried to buy a seat on our court in the past have handpicked her to run against Judge Chris Taylor. As you can see, we absolutely can’t risk letting Lazar take a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But right-wing special interests are preparing to spend tens of millions to paint a very different picture of Lazar — and to distort the truth about Judge Chris Taylor. That’s why we’re counting on grassroots support. Every dollar you give helps us set the record straight, get the facts to voters, and make sure people know exactly what’s at stake in April’s election. Thanks, Team Taylor

clean_body: This is our moment. Let's finish strong. | Tomorrow marks exactly 4 weeks until Election Day. That's all the time we have left to decide whether we'll elect climate leaders who will stand up to Trump and his dirty fossil fuel agenda — or oily politicians who will put profit over people. = | = = You might be thinking, "How can $4 possibly make a difference against Big Oil's millions?" Let me tell you exactly why your support right now could tip these races: Across Virginia, Pennsylvania, Colorado, Georgia, and beyond, our endorsed climate champions are in critical races that could be decided by just a handful of votes. These are leaders who will make daily decisions on pipeline approvals, clean energy investments, and whether corporate polluters answer for poisoning our communities — and Big Oil is spending whatever they can to keep them out of office. Our records show you haven't made an online donation to JanePAC yet this year. I get it. A thousand causes are competing for your attention and your hard-earned money. But this is your chance to be part of something that matters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = The next 4 weeks will decide more than an election. They’ll decide what kind of future we fight for. So let’s get out there and fight! Onward, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[clapped back at CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/77b9e854-345a-4b40-a0f5-c61742efb522?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for suggesting that the deployment of National Guard to Portland to address the threat posed by Antifa militants is unnecessary, challenging her to go see for herself.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2266d2d0-55b3-4fe9-80a9-04471944335b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* The **mounting threats** that the U.S. Dollar faces today.
* What a **possible collapse** could mean for you and your family.
* Some **little known strategies** Billionaire investors are using today.
* Plus, a **[SPECIAL OFFER](https://substack.com/redirect/2266d2d0-55b3-4fe9-80a9-04471944335b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** you can't afford to ignore that can put YOU in the driver's seat!

**Don 't wait until it's too late:**
[Get Special Report](https://substack.com/redirect/2266d2d0-55b3-4fe9-80a9-04471944335b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# "This is SICK": White House blasts Chicago Mayor for creating "ICE-free zones"
The White House **[fired back](https://substack.com/redirect/e35928e9-430d-42cf-96bb-b28af21e4a35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson signed an executive order blocking federal immigration officials from using city-owned property including school parking lots, libraries, and parks for staging operations or setting up checkpoints.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e35928e9-430d-42cf-96bb-b28af21e4a35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **White House denounces order as "sick"**: The White House Rapid Response 47 account accused Johnson of "aiding and abetting criminal illegal immigrant killers, rapists, traffickers, and gang bangers" by creating barriers to ICE enforcement activities.
* **Response to National Guard deployment** : Johnson's order came shortly after President Trump announced plans to deploy approximately 400 National Guard troops to Chicago amid ongoing clashes between anti-ICE protesters and federal agents.
* **Strategic enforcement obstruction** : The mayor's directive is designed to complicate federal immigration enforcement by preventing ICE agents from using city facilities to "load their weapons," "prepare for a raid," or conduct other operational activities on municipal property.

* * *
# Footage shows aftermath of horrific stabbing and brawl between Mark Sanchez and truck driver
Surveillance footage and witness accounts show former Jets quarterback Mark Sanchez, 38, allegedly forced his way into a grease truck, blocked the 69-year-old driver from calling his supervisor, then bodyslammed and threw the driver to the ground before **[the driver stabbed Sanchez multiple times](https://substack.com/redirect/0542fc99-7cd9-46c2-936d-aec492693ae3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in self-defense.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca8e3c1-7126-4f75-a1e4-019a64eb610b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Upgraded felony charges filed** : Sanchez now faces a Level 5 felony battery charge for causing serious injury--carrying up to six years in prison and a $10,000 fine--after initially being charged with misdemeanors, with the truck driver suffering a stab wound through his cheek into his tongue while Sanchez sustained multiple stab wounds to his chest and torso.
* **Alcohol suspected, memory claimed lost** : The truck driver reported Sanchez's breath smelled of alcohol and he was slurring words during the early Saturday morning incident in Indianapolis, while Sanchez later told police from his hospital bed he couldn't remember who attacked him or where it happened, only recalling "grabbing for a window" despite being described as "uncooperative" at the scene.

* * *

* **2020:** Benson **illegally altered election rules** at the eleventh hour. The courts ruled against her.

* **2022:** Benson’s mismanagement **disenfranchised Black voters** in Detroit.

* **2024:** Benson allowed **16 non-citizens to vote** in Michigan elections.

That’s not a “conspiracy theory.” That’s PROOF that she will do whatever it takes to rig the rules in favor of her political party. Legal or illegal. And yet Benson still pretends she’s “protecting democracy.” In reality, she’s _**rigging the rules to protect herself.**_ Michigan deserves better. I will launch investigations, restore oversight, and rebuild public trust. But I cannot take on Benson’s machine without your help. subject: This violates the Hatch Act. We need an investigation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744538/574291009/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDcwNWNkNS1mZmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td1SjM6oxWKEEYVkvg3VEovbNhj47ZaQh0K0m3pZWfA=)
Friend, This is not normal. In fact, it’s _illegal._ Multiple official federal websites – including USDA, HHS, HUD, and the State Department – are now displaying shutdown messages blaming Democrats for the funding lapse, parroting President Trump’s political rhetoric. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744539/574291010/954819167?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDcwNWNkNS1mZmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td1SjM6oxWKEEYVkvg3VEovbNhj47ZaQh0K0m3pZWfA=&emci=0d046961-c4a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=34705cd5-ffa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920) These are banners hosted on .gov domains, using your tax dollars to promote Trump’s political messaging. This is a direct violation of the Hatch Act, a federal law that prohibits the use of government resources for partisan political purposes. And now it’s happening across multiple agencies, in broad daylight. [**We’re demanding an immediate investigation into this breach of the Hatch Act, and we need your name on the petition right now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744540/574291011/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDcwNWNkNS1mZmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td1SjM6oxWKEEYVkvg3VEovbNhj47ZaQh0K0m3pZWfA=&emci=0d046961-c4a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=34705cd5-ffa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920) | | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744541/574291012/-144717237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDcwNWNkNS1mZmEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=td1SjM6oxWKEEYVkvg3VEovbNhj47ZaQh0K0m3pZWfA=&emci=0d046961-c4a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=34705cd5-ffa2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=26828920)**
---
Federal agencies are supposed to serve the American people — not push political propaganda or target political opponents.
**If we don’t speak out, this kind of authoritarian overreach becomes precedent.**
Trump and his allies are already trying to dismantle democratic norms at every level, from censoring the press to targeting election officials. Now, they’re turning the tools of government into a propaganda machine.
We won’t let this slide.

clean_body: | = Friend, This is not normal. In fact, it’s illegal. Multiple official federal websites – including USDA, HHS, HUD, and the State Department – are now displaying shutdown messages blaming Democrats for the funding lapse, parroting President Trump’s political rhetoric. These are banners hosted on .gov domains, using your tax dollars to promote Trump’s political messaging. This is a direct violation of the Hatch Act, a federal law that prohibits the use of government resources for partisan political purposes. And now it’s happening across multiple agencies, in broad daylight. | | | Federal agencies are supposed to serve the American people — not push political propaganda or target political opponents. If we don’t speak out, this kind of authoritarian overreach becomes precedent. Trump and his allies are already trying to dismantle democratic norms at every level, from censoring the press to targeting election officials. Now, they’re turning the tools of government into a propaganda machine. We won’t let this slide. This matters for everyone who believes in an independent civil service, in free speech, and in the rule of law. | | Secretaries of State around the country are working to keep our elections fair and protected, but the fight for democracy starts with calling out abuses like this one. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: INPUT REQUESTED: How I can fight for your family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Until I can be in ten places at once, this survey is the best way for me to hear from you

Howdy, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744811/574291972/-784848987?refcode=email_100625_survey&refcode2=sl2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGM4NDlmMS0wMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vHh5y6vemBt5lUOK__yGxSumfJhfJ_qvUzcXZkDCT0=&emci=2689e658-8aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20c849f1-01a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) My absolute favorite part of campaigning is meeting with folks from all over and hearing your stories directly (ideally over an ice-cold beer!). While Donald Trump and his MAGA loyalists are focused on giving tax breaks to millionaires at the expense of working families – my top priority is making sure Washington works for you and your family. I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you in person, but until I can be in two (or ten) places at once, this survey is the next best thing. My team put together a short priorities survey to help guide our strategy for the next few months that shouldn’t take you more than one minute to complete (okay, two minutes tops!). **[Can you please take a moment to share what issues matter most to you in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744814/574291977/-784848987?refcode=email_100625_survey&refcode2=sl2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGM4NDlmMS0wMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vHh5y6vemBt5lUOK__yGxSumfJhfJ_qvUzcXZkDCT0=&emci=2689e658-8aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20c849f1-01a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744815/574291978/-1833914784?refcode=email_100625_survey&refcode2=sl2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGM4NDlmMS0wMWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_vHh5y6vemBt5lUOK__yGxSumfJhfJ_qvUzcXZkDCT0=&emci=2689e658-8aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=20c849f1-01a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715)
---
Your voice really matters, so I appreciate you taking the time.
Thanks,
John

name: Tom Cole
subject: You won’t hear this on CNN or MSNBC

name: Fair Fight
subject: It’s exhaustive, and it’s meant to exhaust us, but we’re still energized by our vision for the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
A truly inclusive democracy is possible. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744855/574292113/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251006_T1_WhatWereWorkingTowards_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDM3YzcyNC0wMmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0awl_A3pzy4eRXtjysrpLEKfwf_a_ceUHaeqWZTzQQ=&emci=6937c724-02a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6d37c724-02a3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1037277)

| | The Trump Regime and the GOP have been exhaustive in their attempts to erode our democracy and march our country toward an autocracy. The truth is, it’s meant to exhaust us. They wish that they could overwhelm us and make it too difficult for us to push back against their wide array of voter suppression tactics. **But we’re energized by — and focused on — our vision of a truly inclusive democracy, where everyone is empowered to exercise their power and leaders answer to the will of the people.** Where voting is accessible, where elected officials know they need to deliver on their promises so they can win free and fair elections, and where we are each free to help steer the direction of our nation. Protecting independent elections is critical to pushing back on the Trump Regime's efforts to drag America into autocracy. If we elect representatives who respect democracy, they can hold the Regime accountable for their abuses of power. That’s why we won’t give up, no matter what, as the GOP hurls every trick in the book to disenfranchise Black, Latino, Native American, young, rural, and low-income voters before the 2026 midterms. Fair Fight is working day and night to defend democracy from the Trump Regime's persistent threats, and we’re adding value to these national fights by flexing our grassroots muscle and countering autocratic actions directly on the ground in our local communities throughout the South. We can’t do this work without you, and we’re so grateful for your support of this movement. As we head into the last few months of this year and into the midterms, we remain relentless in our push for free and fair elections. Thank you for all that you do, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116744856/574292114/1371676716?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251006_T1_WhatWereWorkingTowards_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDM3YzcyNC0wMmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v0awl_A3pzy4eRXtjysrpLEKfwf_a_ceUHaeqWZTzQQ=)

### The Democrat Approach to the Government Shutdown puts Americans in Last Place
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)
---
| Oct 6
---

Today marks the 6th day of the Government Shutdown.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff9233ad-bc8d-4ae0-82af-81cc3edbabef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Democrat Rally to "Save Healthcare" \- U.S. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) and other Democratic House members hold a press conference on the House Steps a day before a partial government shutdown is set to take effect on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., U.S., September 30, 2025. REUTERS/Annabelle Gordon_
[Pledge your support](https://substack..KBUQyBQxBIZrtYzn3ZVVqftKJdBbE0euoE8sVu02xUc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175472032)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=175472032&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1NDcyMDMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTk3ODk1NjUsImV4cCI6MTc2MjM4MTU2NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Dp1AVXdUA6EeBeX-Mb3a8GdLbuZaBGLdfqz_ZGpwSAE)
Currently, the Senate Democrats refuse to extend government operations with a short term funding bill for two principal reasons.
**1\. They demand free taxpayer Medicaid coverage for Illegal Aliens to create new dependent voters; and**
**2\. They want to continue the Obamacare (ACA) subsidies**
Both of those reasons show how the Democrats operate under the principle of Make Americans Last Again. **It is the antithesis of America First and giving these subsidies puts Americans in Last Place.**
It is beyond belief that the Democrats want to give free Medicaid (paid by taxpayers) to Illegal Aliens. They are non-citizens who have entered this country illegally but are being rewarded with free health insurance that has better coverage than what taxpaying Americans pay for.
An Illegal Alien on Medicaid gets free healthcare. **THEY HAVE NO DEDUCTIBLE AND NO CO-PAYS AND FREE MEDICATION.**
**Other Benefits for Illegal Aliens on Medicaid:**
They get to go to hospitals, Emergency Departments, urgent care, and medical offices as often as necessary without having to worry about out of pocket medical expenses, co-pays or deductibles. Better yet, no need to UBER to the hospital, they get free ambulance & ambulette services.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/08012e4d-c999-49b0-b787-c7989b87af0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [KFF ](https://substack.com/redirect/4277c3e9-8be9-4928-93f8-fe16480d159a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[2024 Employer Health Benefits Survey](https://substack.com/redirect/4277c3e9-8be9-4928-93f8-fe16480d159a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
American citizens, with employer health plans, contribute to those plans with deductions from their paycheck. They have deductibles, meaning the first portion of their healthcare is out of pocket. Once they meet their deductibles which can run into the thousands of dollars per year they then have co-pays every time that they go to a physicians office, hospital or Emergency Department. Unlike illegal Aliens their healthcare is not free.
These deductibles and co-pays discourage the use of healthcare and unlike Illegal Aliens citizens have to think twice before undergoing healthcare treatments. There is no preventative care incentive either, unlike Medicaid which also promotes preventative care. MAHA works if you are an illegal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74fe433c-84d0-4f85-b3e8-2304283fa74f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [KFF ](https://substack.com/redirect/4277c3e9-8be9-4928-93f8-fe16480d159a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[2024 Employer Health Benefits Survey](https://substack.com/redirect/4277c3e9-8be9-4928-93f8-fe16480d159a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
For example someone experiencing chest pain may think twice about calling 911. If they are having a heart attack and time is of the essence a delay in care can be fatal.
**Obamacare Subsidies**
The Democrats in favor of the shutdown are in support of continuing Obamacare subsidies instead of coming up with an alternative. This results in Making Americans Sicker Again (MASA)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b52b7e06-b257-436f-a9cb-3b5726551634?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Real Life Obamacare Examples**
An unsubsidized Bronze plan under the ACA would cost $2,203-$2,227 per month with an out of pocket max per household of between $14,000-$18,400 per family, a $6,000-$7,000 per person deductible up to the maximum family out of pocket max per household. Between the premiums and the deductibles you would be spending over $33,000 out of pocket for your healthcare before you would receive any insurance coverage for your costs.
This is a poorly designed healthcare plan. Preventative Care is not rewarded. With such high out of pocket expenses, patients with diabetes, heart disease and cancer would cannot seek preventative care that would lead to early diagnosis and early intervention as it is cost prohibited.
_**Chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease and asthma will progress before diagnosis and treatment. The opportunity for preventive care, and early intervention with better outcomes would be lost. The early diagnosis and life saving benefits of catching cancer would be lost. Patients would suffer unnecessarily and often die because Obamacare plans discourage early diagnosis and treatment.**_
Rather than come up with a better healthcare plan that encourages early diagnosis and treatment of chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease and asthma. A better plan should prioritize early detection and treatment of cancer.
_**Instead the Democrats want to perpetuate this poorly designed healthcare plan because they own it.**_
Neither one of these two reasons are justification for shutting the government down. Instead Democrats need to start to realize that when it comes to healthcare American Citizens come first; Illegal aliens should take a back seat to our American citizens.
**A more cost effective prevention base healthcare plan must replace Obamacare.**
The fact that the Democrats are supporting such folly tell you they are approving an America Last agenda as the Make Americans Last (place) Again.
**Obamacare is only the tip of the iceberg regarding healthcare costs**
Healthcare costs for Americans have risen dramatically, including copays, employee contributions, deductibles and total premium costs.
According to the KFF healthcare cost study:
* Average Annual Premiums for Family Coverage have risen from $5,791 dollars in 1999 to $25,572 in 2024.
* The Percentage of Covered Workers with Annual Deductibles of $2,000 or more have risen from 7% in 2009 to 32% in 2024
* Average Annual Worker Contribution to Healthcare Plans have risen from $1,619 in 2000 to $6,286 in 2024
* Average Annual Employer Contribution has risen from $4,819 in 2000 to $19,276 in 2024

These are astronomical changes which government actions have played a significant contributory role.
Yet the Democrats are silent on this issue.
**Private Health Insurance vs. ObamaCare -**_**Same Price but Private Sector has better benefits.**_
It is interesting that employer health insurance costs are similar to Obamacare costs, however _**employer plans are substantially better with lower deductibles, and better coverage**_. Why is it that employers can provide better coverage for the same costs as the government can provide under Obamacare. _**It does make you wonder why Americans who have to buy Obamacare are getting ripped off.**_
This is just another example of a bad Democrat policy by supporting Obamacare.
**Time to Put Americans First**
| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. clean_body: The Democrat Approach to the Government Shutdown puts Americans in Last Place | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com The Democrat Approach to the Government Shutdown puts Americans in Last Place | | and | Oct 6 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Today marks the 6th day of the Government Shutdown. | | ---|---|--- Democrat Rally to "Save Healthcare" \- U.S. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) and other Democratic House members hold a press conference on the House Steps a day before a partial government shutdown is set to take effect on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., U.S., September 30, 2025. REUTERS/Annabelle Gordon Currently, the Senate Democrats refuse to extend government operations with a short term funding bill for two principal reasons. 1\. They demand free taxpayer Medicaid coverage for Illegal Aliens to create new dependent voters; and 2\. They want to continue the Obamacare (ACA) subsidies Both of those reasons show how the Democrats operate under the principle of Make Americans Last Again. It is the antithesis of America First and giving these subsidies puts Americans in Last Place. It is beyond belief that the Democrats want to give free Medicaid (paid by taxpayers) to Illegal Aliens. They are non-citizens who have entered this country illegally but are being rewarded with free health insurance that has better coverage than what taxpaying Americans pay for. An Illegal Alien on Medicaid gets free healthcare. THEY HAVE NO DEDUCTIBLE AND NO CO-PAYS AND FREE MEDICATION. Other Benefits for Illegal Aliens on Medicaid: They get to go to hospitals, Emergency Departments, urgent care, and medical offices as often as necessary without having to worry about out of pocket medical expenses, co-pays or deductibles. Better yet, no need to UBER to the hospital, they get free ambulance & ambulette services. | | ---|---|--- Source: American citizens, with employer health plans, contribute to those plans with deductions from their paycheck. They have deductibles, meaning the first portion of their healthcare is out of pocket. Once they meet their deductibles which can run into the thousands of dollars per year they then have co-pays every time that they go to a physicians office, hospital or Emergency Department. Unlike illegal Aliens their healthcare is not free. These deductibles and co-pays discourage the use of healthcare and unlike Illegal Aliens citizens have to think twice before undergoing healthcare treatments. There is no preventative care incentive either, unlike Medicaid which also promotes preventative care. MAHA works if you are an illegal. | | ---|---|--- Source: For example someone experiencing chest pain may think twice about calling 911. If they are having a heart attack and time is of the essence a delay in care can be fatal. Obamacare Subsidies The Democrats in favor of the shutdown are in support of continuing Obamacare subsidies instead of coming up with an alternative. This results in Making Americans Sicker Again (MASA) | | ---|---|--- Real Life Obamacare Examples An unsubsidized Bronze plan under the ACA would cost $2,203-$2,227 per month with an out of pocket max per household of between $14,000-$18,400 per family, a $6,000-$7,000 per person deductible up to the maximum family out of pocket max per household. Between the premiums and the deductibles you would be spending over $33,000 out of pocket for your healthcare before you would receive any insurance coverage for your costs. This is a poorly designed healthcare plan. Preventative Care is not rewarded. With such high out of pocket expenses, patients with diabetes, heart disease and cancer would cannot seek preventative care that would lead to early diagnosis and early intervention as it is cost prohibited. Chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease and asthma will progress before diagnosis and treatment. The opportunity for preventive care, and early intervention with better outcomes would be lost. The early diagnosis and life saving benefits of catching cancer would be lost. Patients would suffer unnecessarily and often die because Obamacare plans discourage early diagnosis and treatment. Rather than come up with a better healthcare plan that encourages early diagnosis and treatment of chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease and asthma. A better plan should prioritize early detection and treatment of cancer. Instead the Democrats want to perpetuate this poorly designed healthcare plan because they own it. Neither one of these two reasons are justification for shutting the government down. Instead Democrats need to start to realize that when it comes to healthcare American Citizens come first; Illegal aliens should take a back seat to our American citizens. A more cost effective prevention base healthcare plan must replace Obamacare. The fact that the Democrats are supporting such folly tell you they are approving an America Last agenda as the Make Americans Last (place) Again. Obamacare is only the tip of the iceberg regarding healthcare costs Healthcare costs for Americans have risen dramatically, including copays, employee contributions, deductibles and total premium costs. According to the KFF healthcare cost study: Average Annual Premiums for Family Coverage have risen from $5,791 dollars in 1999 to $25,572 in 2024. The Percentage of Covered Workers with Annual Deductibles of $2,000 or more have risen from 7% in 2009 to 32% in 2024 Average Annual Worker Contribution to Healthcare Plans have risen from $1,619 in 2000 to $6,286 in 2024 Average Annual Employer Contribution has risen from $4,819 in 2000 to $19,276 in 2024 These are astronomical changes which government actions have played a significant contributory role. Yet the Democrats are silent on this issue. Private Health Insurance vs. ObamaCare -Same Price but Private Sector has better benefits. It is interesting that employer health insurance costs are similar to Obamacare costs, however employer plans are substantially better with lower deductibles, and better coverage. Why is it that employers can provide better coverage for the same costs as the government can provide under Obamacare. It does make you wonder why Americans who have to buy Obamacare are getting ripped off. This is just another example of a bad Democrat policy by supporting Obamacare. Time to Put Americans First** | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. name: Wes Moore
subject: More comfortable in cargo shorts
body:
Thanks to your support, I can be my authentic self.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)
Peter, I’ve got to be honest.
This is the first office I was ever elected to, and frankly, it takes some getting used to! I’m more comfortable in cargo shorts than a suit. And while I can’t meet everyone who **[donates to this campaign,](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251006-1?refcode=em-20251006-1&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)** I wanted to share a bit more about myself.
As you may know, I first got my start by serving in the Army.
I was sent to military school when I was twelve. At the time, it was the absolute last place I wanted to be. But getting my start in the military taught me humility, teamwork, and the importance of serving others. And even as I started my life of public service, **I had no idea I would grow up to be Maryland’s first Black governor.**
Now, a lot has changed, but the important things have remained the same: service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of everything I do.
These principles are what keep me grounded as governor, and they’re the foundation of everything we’re doing for Marylanders.
**[If you agree with this type of leadership, can I count on you to chip in $5 or any amount today? Your support will be crucial.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251006-1?refcode=em-20251006-1&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251006-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251006-1&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)**
**Now, I’m fighting for every Marylander to succeed and thrive.** It may feel like an uphill battle right now, but I know we can do this together.
To succeed I need support from folks like you who believe in our mission. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you make a donation of any amount to help us out?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251006-1?refcode=em-20251006-1&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251006-1?refcode=em-20251006-1&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251006-1&t=2&refcode2=719_1086043_jyVfI9&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=719%2E1086043%2EjyVfI9)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69015aca-73aa-48d0-8e3d-92e8f2ba700b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Over the past few days, a July Facebook post resurfaced in which Stephen Miller's cousin, Alisa Kasmer--who hails from the non-goose-stepping wing of the Miller family--disowned him.
**Were it only as simple for America to do the same.**
In no way do I belittle Kasmer's suffering. In fact, I truly feel for her, especially her "guilt" for the horrors Cousin Fester has visited upon the most vulnerable among us, especially immigrants.
I hope she's found some peace in the intervening months--there's nothing she could've ever done to "fix" this monster.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7828d6f3-faf3-4235-9db8-52c4db6b8dcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Kasmer rightly describes Miller as "hollow," "cruel." She even discusses her panic attacks, depression, and other ills brought on from watching a cousin she once loved, and whom she babysat, become...well, I'll put it in my words: a virulent, shit-house rat genetically spliced with Japanese Murder Hornets and suffering from more than a mild case of The Rage Virus from _28 Days Later_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d258d01-e319-4122-911f-bc8907967d4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Miller, quite simply, is a Nazi. And that's not an ad hominem. It's a descriptor.
His jihad is responsible for when 300 ICE terrorists attacked a five-story Chicago apartment complex last Tuesday night, with crying children, some almost naked, being yanked out of their apartments and away from their parents, and left in a hall, crying hysterically.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NyV9ZDWTo97vdgVeYy1ayDjURL4vdownyJQ9XR99_7g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175452878)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28bcb9bc-126c-4764-8f30-d596e4a83b1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Folks, we 're living in a time when one bad decision --or unhinged man--could end everything. That's why **Keeping a Finger on the Button** isn't just a book; it's a damn warning label for our democracy. Rebecca Lubot, an outsanding writer, digs into the 25th Amendment like no one else, exposing how fragile our system really is when power and sanity collide. If you care about whether we survive the next crisis, this is required reading. Get this book! --Cliff_
_Available for pre-order right here![https://a.co/d/9t5Kee4](https://substack.com/redirect/738fb054-1a91-429c-b3a2-12256d533bd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
* * *
With one agent, reportedly, walking by and seeing these terrified, sobbing babies and saying, "fuck them kids."
Oh, if there's a hell, it'll be the only proper place to house these cruel, cerebrally-hammered, fecal-corn-fed motherf*kers who take pleasure in cruelty to children. These walking dung beetles causing the kind of emotional wounds that'll stay with these little ones for the rest of their lives.
And, sadly, this doesn't even begin to describe Miller and ICE's many other abuses.
The countless number of U.S. citizens, police, elected officials, and others they've beaten. Those shot and killed at the Dallas ICE facility. Fifty percent of those once housed at the cretinous and inane "Alligator Alcatraz"--50%!--now missing, their families with no idea where they are.
As Kasmer said about Miller--which can also be applied to all the MAGA corruptibles and shock troops--they are a "curse" on our nation and its democracy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ab10535-8746-495d-9695-c44d0fd60139?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the case of Miller & Co., this curse is all in the name of white supremacy, a club in which Miller, no matter how many times this chirping, rage-headed choad belts out "Horst-Wessel-Lied," _will never be allowed to join_.
Sorry, Steve-o, champ, but being the longtime champion of the masturbators doesn't make you the master race.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/170269cf-8f77-4174-a9a9-31ac429b4dc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And if Miller's long-term plan with his equally termagant-esque pals were to succeed, he doesn't grasp that at some point his services will no longer be needed. He can deny it 'til the cows come home--or 'til wifey someday returns from eloping with Elon--but he is, indeed, Jewish.
They've noticed, Steve. And you'll be quite dispensable.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62a7ca61-2d85-47de-8755-e92d6bf67205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As if all this weren't bad enough, Miller has led the charge to try and incite violence against anyone who has disagreed with his Ferdinand-Franco-approach to governing.
[Give Me 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/551d75b8-c04e-4fae-80af-412449672696?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This especially includes judges--most of whom have been appointed by Republicans--doing their jobs. Most recently, he posted this about a judge rightfully rejecting President Adult Diaper With Tang-For-A-Face's[ attempt to take over Portland's National Guard](https://substack.com/redirect/ebc4cac2-ad6a-4625-a84f-2e138f8f6d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6079f04e-b479-4d0d-93ed-b9db76ae3ca6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rich, coming from the guy who helped inspire a real insurrection on Jan 6th (thanks again, Merrick). And who since has done his best to inspire violence.
Rep. Dan Goldman--a Democrat who doesn't shrink from these insecure cowards, messages and fights for our democracy by always seeking to hold MAGA accountable, responded in the manner that every Democrat should.
He rightly took the kind of rhetoric shared by Miller and his half-wit allies of the Lollipop Guild to task. Especially after the alleged arson at Circuit Court Judge Diane Goodstein's home on Edisto Island in South Carolina.
The Judge committed the crime of refusing to just turn over South Carolina's voting data to Trump's Fuhrerprinzip when he demanded it. [For this, she received the usual round of MAGA death threats](https://substack.com/redirect/5a48342f-295a-41b5-a843-e4194cf2b349?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And, on Saturday, her house was set ablaze, and her 80-year-old husband and son were injured. Her husband, a former State Senator, had to jump from a floor up and broke several bones.
Here's Goldman:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cea5ab5b-aead-41cd-8616-612a5257f2e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NyV9ZDWTo97vdgVeYy1ayDjURL4vdownyJQ9XR99_7g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175452878)
So, my friends, this is where we are.
And, yes, it's scary. But as others have said, when you ask yourself what you would've done in 1930s Germany, the answer is you're doing it now.
[Democratic Leadership still needs a kick in the ass](https://substack.com/redirect/dc1b8d1b-2329-47a0-82d1-c2054e9a5c27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But Democrats like Goldman are showing no fear, and their numbers are growing. Courage is contagious. Family members like Miller's cousin, Kasmer, have continued to speak out against her cousin and his henchmen's evil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f8b9814-ed19-4aee-b0dc-50d70d185686?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In twelve days we have another **No Kings March**. Let's make it undeniable this time that the 3.5% of any population needed--per social scientists--for resistance to succeed are out in the streets.
Judges from Portland to South Carolina, even with the threats they've received, are standing up for our democracy and ruling against Trump. Republicans from MTG to Massie are turning on the elephantine rotter.
And we at Blue Amp have built a juggernaut with**over half a million** **subscribers** , so we know there are many of you out there who feel as we do--[so we ask you to keep us fighting the disease of authoritarianism by becoming a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/545fa32e-bd13-4c96-9f26-84c83fb2b618?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
It is a scary time. But we are the heroes we've been waiting for.
And when this is over and we've defeated this challenge and re-established an even stronger democracy than the one decaying, even before Trump came to power, we'll know there is no challenge too difficult for us to conquer.
Nothing we can't overcome--to give our children a better future.
* * *

name: Office of U.S. Senator Raphael Warnock
subject: Have you looked into your 2026 health care premiums?
body:
|
---
Neighbor,

Georgians who get their health care from Georgia Access are now able to log on to see their monthly premium rate for 2026. Unfortunately, because of Washington Republicans' refusal to fund health care in their One Big Beautiful Bill Act, these Georgians will see their 2026 monthly health care premiums **double** on average.

**If you get your health care through Georgia Access** (Georgia's Affordable Care Act Marketplace), **[CLICK HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16916.22584943.8388243.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fenroll.georgiaaccess.gov%2fhix%2f&redir_log=5852461103259) to view your 2026 rates. **This does not apply if you get your health care through Medicare, Medicaid, or through your employer.

The devastating health care cuts allowed by DC Republicans' tax and spending bills are driving up monthly health insurance premiums and causing hospitals to cut services across our state. I've championed legislation to make health care more affordable, but my colleagues refuse to come to the table.

Unfortunately, Republicans in Washington have chosen to shut down the government rather than restore funding for middle-class health care tax credits.

Let me be clear: I do not support a government shutdown. That is why I continue to vote for a budget that will reopen the government AND stop these catastrophic premium hikes. I will always put the needs of Georgians above partisan games, and I will continue to fight for your health care in Washington.

While my office is operating with limited capacity, we remain open to hear from Georgians and can still provide limited assistance on urgent federal matters. For help, please contact me [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16916.22584943.8388243.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435). For more information on how government services are affected, please visit my website [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16916.22584943.8388243.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fshutdown%2f&redir_log=238456227254284).
Keep the faith,
U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock

| This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16916.22584943.8388243.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f&redir_log=51402161759365).
If you need help with a federal agency, please click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenWarnock&crop=16916.22584943.8388243.14245539&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.warnock.senate.gov%2fcontact%2fcontact-form%2f%3fpath%3dhelp&redir_log=904232600857435).

PRIVACY POLICY: Your e-mail address will not be shared with anyone else or sold in any way.

clean_body: | Neighbor, Georgians who get their health care from Georgia Access are now able to log on to see their monthly premium rate for 2026. Unfortunately, because of Washington Republicans' refusal to fund health care in their One Big Beautiful Bill Act, these Georgians will see their 2026 monthly health care premiums double on average. If you get your health care through Georgia Access (Georgia's Affordable Care Act Marketplace), to view your 2026 rates. This does not apply if you get your health care through Medicare, Medicaid, or through your employer. The devastating health care cuts allowed by DC Republicans' tax and spending bills are driving up monthly health insurance premiums and causing hospitals to cut services across our state. I've championed legislation to make health care more affordable, but my colleagues refuse to come to the table. Unfortunately, Republicans in Washington have chosen to shut down the government rather than restore funding for middle-class health care tax credits. Let me be clear: I do not support a government shutdown. That is why I continue to vote for a budget that will reopen the government AND stop these catastrophic premium hikes. I will always put the needs of Georgians above partisan games, and I will continue to fight for your health care in Washington. While my office is operating with limited capacity, we remain open to hear from Georgians and can still provide limited assistance on urgent federal matters. For help, please contact me . For more information on how government services are affected, please visit my website . Keep the faith, U.S. Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock | This is official correspondence from the Office of Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock. If you have any questions, please contact our office . If you need help with a federal agency, please click .

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Release the List
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Adelita Grijalva said that the first thing she’ll do in office is sign the discharge petition to force a vote on the release of the Epstein Files.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251006-5503-footer&t=1&akid=5503%2E420207%2EsSotg-)
Peter,
Two weeks ago, Representative-elect Adelita Grijalva won the special election for the open seat in Arizona’s 7th Congressional District.
She’s said that the first thing she’ll do in office is sign the discharge petition to force a vote on the release of the Epstein Files — and because she would be the 218th signer, the petition would immediately succeed.
**But so far, Republican Speaker Mike Johnson is refusing to swear her in.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20251006?source=em20251006-5503&akid=5503%2E420207%2EsSotg-)
Republicans spent the entire 2024 campaign calling for the release of the Epstein files. But now that they’re actually in a position to make it happen, they’re bending over backwards to keep them secret.
They're even willing to deny an entire congressional district representation in order to protect powerful people who could be named in the files. Refusing to swear Adelita in isn’t just stopping her from signing the discharge petition — it’s also stopping her from providing critical constituent services to her community.
**We need Republicans to know they can’t continue to protect the powerful and deny justice to victims.[That’s why I’m asking you to sign on to my petition demanding Republicans allow Adelita Grijalva to be sworn in and release the Epstein Files immediately.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20251006?source=em20251006-5503&akid=5503%2E420207%2EsSotg-)**
**[Sign The Petition](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20251006?source=em20251006-5503&akid=5503%2E420207%2EsSotg-)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251006-5503-footer&t=2&refcode2=5503_420207_sSotg-&akid=5503%2E420207%2EsSotg-)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Reasons to retain Justice Wecht this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter — let’s talk about **PA Supreme Court Justice David Wecht** :
* Justice Wecht has always **stood firm in defending our rights**. He helped strike down the Republican-gerrymandered map in 2018, a map that was unfairly drawn to give one party an advantage, even facing impeachment calls by the GOP for his protection of our voting rights.

* Before being elected to PA’s Supreme Court, Justice Wecht served in the Fifth Judicial District’s Family Division, where he **designed and implemented several reforms — including the United Family Court and the local rule on parenting coordination**.

* He helped flip the Supreme Court in 2015 and has been instrumental in rulings to protect women’s rights, voting rights, public health, and our other freedoms.

This isn’t the first time Republicans have tried to get Justice Wecht off the bench. Billionaires like Jeffrey Yass are flooding the race, spreading lies about Justice Wecht’s work on the PA Supreme Court.

**_[Contributing today helps us build up our war chest and fight back. clean_body: | | Hi Peter — let’s talk about PA Supreme Court Justice David Wecht : Justice Wecht has always stood firm in defending our rights. He helped strike down the Republican-gerrymandered map in 2018, a map that was unfairly drawn to give one party an advantage, even facing impeachment calls by the GOP for his protection of our voting rights. Before being elected to PA’s Supreme Court, Justice Wecht served in the Fifth Judicial District’s Family Division, where he designed and implemented several reforms — including the United Family Court and the local rule on parenting coordination. He helped flip the Supreme Court in 2015 and has been instrumental in rulings to protect women’s rights, voting rights, public health, and our other freedoms. This isn’t the first time Republicans have tried to get Justice Wecht off the bench. Billionaires like Jeffrey Yass are flooding the race, spreading lies about Justice Wecht’s work on the PA Supreme Court. = | | = There’s no doubt about it: Justice David Wecht must be retained. The urgency of this task cannot be overstated. Help us make it clear to all Pennsylvanian voters that Justice Wecht is the right choice. – Pennsylvania Democratic Party = | Follow us on , , , and ! name: Cori Bush
subject: This campaign is bigger than me, it’s all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
In case you missed it, I have big news: I’m running for Congress.
But before I say more, I want you to see it for yourself: My new campaign launch video tells the story of why I’m stepping up again and what our movement is all about. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
After you watch the video, can you make a donation today to help us launch on the best foot possible? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
WATCH THE VIDEO & CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
I’m running for Congress because St. Louis deserves leadership that doesn’t flinch when the stakes are high, leadership that shows up, speaks truth to power, and fights for families.
We’re living in a moment where our democracy is under attack. Trump and his allies are trying to rewrite our history, roll back our rights, and strip away everything we’ve fought for. The threats are real. But we’ve got us. We know what happens when we show up.
When I first ran, I did it for my community. For the families too often left out. For the people who needed someone to be their fighter in Washington. And we proved what’s possible: billions in funding for St. Louis, disaster relief, and a movement that cannot be bought or broken.
Now I’m stepping up again, because we quite literally have to. We’ve got no choice. Because if we don’t fight now, everything we hold dear is at risk.
Watch my launch video and join me. Let’s show them we’re still here, we’re still fighting, and we’re stronger than ever. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
