In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-launchvideo?refcode=x_251006_corilaunchvideo_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]

body:
Will you help Haley Stevens keep Michigan blue?

null, Republicans poured nearly $80 MILLION into last year’s Senate race in Michigan – and MAGA Mike Rogers came within just 0.34% of winning.
Thankfully, he didn’t. But Rogers is running again, and **Republicans are ready to spend EVEN MORE to finally flip Michigan red.**
That means every single vote, and every single dollar, is going to matter in this race – and we need to build up our grassroots resources ASAP if we’re going to take on the GOP’s billionaire buddies and win.
**That’s why it’s so important to reach our daily fundraising goals.[With experts predicting that Michigan will decide Senate control, will you chip in $5 or more now to keep this must-win battleground blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6516?t=3&akid=1003%2E49239%2ESBmCWS)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6517?t=4&akid=1003%2E49239%2ESBmCWS)

Thank you for stepping up in this crucial moment,

Haley Stevens for Senate HQ
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6499?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1003%2E49239%2ESBmCWS) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6473?t=9&akid=1003%2E49239%2ESBmCWS)

Thank you,
Haley

Peter ,
This weekend, the courts did what they were meant to do – they stopped Trump from overstepping his power and trying to deploy the National Guard into U.S. cities.
It was a reminder that our courts are still one of the strongest checks on authoritarian abuse, but it only stays that way if we protect it.
This November, Pennsylvania voters will decide the balance of the state’s Supreme Court – one of the most important in the country. It’s the same court that has defended voting rights, reproductive freedom, and fair maps when everything else felt uncertain.
If we lose it, Trump’s allies will have one less barrier to their agenda, and that's why GOTV PAC is all-in on protecting Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court this fall – mobilizing voters, pushing back against right-wing money, and defending the last line of defense for democracy itself.
Can you chip in $15 right now to help us save the courts that just stopped Trump? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10062025]

name: 2025 Battle Ground

Always faithful.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=00c32ce33a3e4129bea83a151439d498&_e=9iXXDSFLCohgO97SP-N_oYi9ZXS9oODhoZsMf2Z-0smXwx8Ea2wq0bI1UnvQ4Nl6x3J8R-EF8zo7Kuw0yb7r3WZ4o-zVzC4gawuHyJVxOjsH4rxYYPDoHqhHgu7PBmvChoBF8J2mh4TfQ7NM5gGfBRKEPow4XzPN2NiHHIBYx0tO_wJGHtlX8xCSsnUy8Bgb80LKak_Xe9-ON9b9miw0JP9Hg0S-VmzsLJU-3kjQ5T4GsVYaFgxFoprrlMRigK-uia3uLAbiyyUb9sJGK4ylQ7Y-2gN1DDgzNwMaTrsWMWD9UMPcC6gS2XuPcUBHbimsO7rJmtB1_8bFS1LZ7LWE-bmhOoEuVXH63xiTyXMqZHl1pNyKjxvlnpVXZAlqXd1Via9F1wQ71VHiTCGwNp3wEwjXBVSehEvoxN_ecEPuBglVd_97LM9FaudPfs0-kjlt-vCbeHIgoneDs9SUjUTnCR_yzT-XloDv6lkkH5dWgu06rgQFXOezZjdGCfD39PNd000NzWfEgx3o4vUBO0fMqiUNrC16HAgqCcFWbjfiPY9p0bbc6h6FHP61t1dm6bYGQ_tP0wZC7pHC-cxiIItnXNwHYdgmfIC5O4ly0aP9dyvHTtr0Ej5mPMVBjAfdmpRpwKFPEw6BE3l1kr0KnvHFAnZWz4TbHBOJhZHuNdkJ2Ye2PEZTR4_OsVZFzHJ8VTsc) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.
I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.
[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today—even if it’s just a few bucks—to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=00c32ce33a3e4129bea83a151439d498&_e=9iXXDSFLCohgO97SP-N_oYi9ZXS9oODhoZsMf2Z-0smXwx8Ea2wq0bI1UnvQ4Nl6x3J8R-EF8zo7Kuw0yb7r3WZ4o-zVzC4gawuHyJVxOjsH4rxYYPDoHqhHgu7PBmvChoBF8J2mh4TfQ7NM5gGfBRKEPow4XzPN2NiHHIBYx0tO_wJGHtlX8xCSsnUy8Bgb80LKak_Xe9-ON9b9miw0JP9Hg0S-VmzsLJU-3kjQ5T4GsVYaFgxFoprrlMRigK-uquXWI_g2LMduujjBMUQkqxNJjH4gAaR1cTBxfwgr71-JwQa05wA_CbN-XRUuHSUeO-8FhxtFjII4qewJTWqh5WQFlAyYHA_aEGVAvLazvS5fMeVfoDQdky4lPWNh98zFzYyNmdNUlqz4IcydXf-rTOKdFo3fYkizH_eJIgX8k453nHxp-vnxxk22Rmlh3hyFs6NSaWHVf6Ss9LEOVxWRgR3yoy5JnqpFavwHClgIei-wQn5j3px_f8_myPgAABYGKsqs-V07UwDw9xtKAF5qhzQWjMkWwVIr1kgfiADQpi59r8E1JnH3Y4XS6PDBXl31lhvusH8GmqrAdwpBu9lwbTeg9-xEAM_vNRaem50zSKu50GhABCUQxLSsDx1M66lg6g8k1aoV9JV5vtQLN14DLr4diFlTitjw-Q90XvbHF4Z7h-0Bg8kzrUB7nDv7PsPV) [ CHIP IN HERE >>

clean_body: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Semper Fi. Always faithful. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in? And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I'm not like the others who normally send you these messages: -I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry. I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children. Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia * I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: James Talarico
subject: Policy agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
We’re building a campaign of, by, and for the people.
A big part of that is focusing on the issues that our communities care about most.
We’re not outsourcing our policy agenda to DC think tanks or lobbyists.
As a state lawmaker, my biggest policy victories — from capping insulin costs, to funding our public schools, to bringing down the cost of housing and rent -- were rooted in my own experiences and the experiences of my neighbors.
So as we begin to shape our policy agenda, I want to get your input and hear your ideas.
[**Can you take two minutes to complete our issue survey to share your priorities with us? It’s important to me that we hear from as many people as possible.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251006-1-ak&refcode2=95.1347274.lMCrbl&t=1&akid=95%2E1347274%2ElMCrbl)
[ TAKE OUR SURVEY ](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251006-1-ak&refcode2=95.1347274.lMCrbl&t=2&akid=95%2E1347274%2ElMCrbl)
I’m going everywhere and having conversations with anyone willing to have a dialogue about what our families and communities need.
But even if you can’t make it to one of our events, I want to make sure you have a voice in this campaign.
[**If you have two minutes, take our issues survey today to make your voice heard. My team and I will review the results soon.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-oct25?source=em251006-1-ak&refcode2=95.1347274.lMCrbl&t=3&akid=95%2E1347274%2ElMCrbl)

James

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: we need a solution.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Team,

Families in New Jersey are struggling with higher child care, food, and energy bills. And if we don’t take action against proposed cuts, 22 million Americans, and more than 454,000 people in New Jersey, will see higher health insurance premiums, and nearly 200,000 will lose their health care because they can’t afford it.

For weeks, far-right extremists in Congress have refused to work in a bipartisan way to responsibly fund the government. **And now, instead of working across the aisle to lower health care costs and protect Jersey families, the far-right in Congress has chosen to shut down the government.**

This is reckless, plain and simple. Now, service members will work without pay, veterans will lose access to critical assistance, seniors will lose access to Meals on Wheels, travelers will face delays, and mothers and infants will lose access to food. And because of this shutdown, funding for the Gateway tunnel project has been frozen, directly inflicting pain on our economy and commuters.

Jersey families deserve certainty and affordable health care – not chaos and higher premiums. We need a solution, and the far-right extremists need to come to the table and work with us to reopen the government, protect critical health care credits, and support hardworking commuters.

While the Trump Administration is attacking critical funding for the Gateway Project, slashing Medicaid, and threatening affordable health care for hundreds of thousands of Jersey families — all while gutting protections for workers and union jobs — I’m working around the clock to reopen the government and stand up for the workers who build our great country.

I will never stop fighting as a Problem Solver to bring everyone together and get this done for our families.

Thank you,

Josh Gottheimer
---
|
---

* * *
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. Patriot,

I'm asking you to hear me out for a few minutes... Can I be honest with you?

When I left the service, I thought I had done the hardest thing I would ever have to do in my entire life. Being a Green Beret was no joke.

Being a father proved otherwise, and being a politician sometimes makes me wish I were back in basic training.

There are a few things that come hand-in-hand with politics that are unbearable; one of them is fundraising.

My parents didn't raise me to ask others for handouts, but fundraising is one of those things that I have to do; otherwise, my campaign would be dead in its tracks.

**If you 're still reading this email, I need your help. I have an upcoming fundraising deadline, and my team is telling me we need to raise $5,000 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

If you could lend me a hand and make a donation below, I'd be forever grateful.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: it's Day 6 of Trump's shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
It's Monday, and Republicans are still refusing to negotiate with Democrats.
| | |
---
It's Monday, and Republicans are still refusing to negotiate with Democrats.
Since Trump and the Republican majorities in both chambers of Congress would rather let "your" health premiums skyrocket than work with Democrats to get the government back open, we're now on **day six** of the shutdown.
While the Republican House of Representatives is at home, **hundreds of thousands of federal employees and service members still aren't getting paid. **
**Republican inaction won't stop 24 million Americans from getting a letter in the mail about how their premiums are set to _double_ in January.** **Working with Democrats to chart a path forward _will_ , **so I'm holding the line until we get this done.
I'm running for governor to uphold my commitment to doing everything in my power to protect Coloradans' access to health care from Trump's attacks and Republicans' broken political games.
But more than that, I'm running because **_we_ can** protect access to contraceptives and reproductive health care.

**_We_ can** become a national model for providing quality health and mental health care while also cutting costs and reducing premium rate increases.

**_We_ can** expand access to care across the state by growing the health and mental health care workforce and ensuring the sustainability of rural hospitals.
But since I'm not taking a cent from big for-profit health insurers, I can't make any of those lifesaving measures happen without your support to win this race.
[**So if you're able, will you pitch in $5, $25 or anything you can spare toward my campaign? With your help, I know that we can build a brighter, healthier future for every Coloradan – not just the wealthy few.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116747294/574299878/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk943-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2YzNTAwNi0wYmEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QnOqKJsbXiukoDQApMyDa3WjnZeTrKhHqTLS1uCrOSY=)

clean_body: It's Monday, and Republicans are still refusing to negotiate with Democrats. | | | It's Monday, and Republicans are still refusing to negotiate with Democrats. Since Trump and the Republican majorities in both chambers of Congress would rather let "your" health premiums skyrocket than work with Democrats to get the government back open, we're now on day six of the shutdown. While the Republican House of Representatives is at home, hundreds of thousands of federal employees and service members still aren't getting paid. Republican inaction won't stop 24 million Americans from getting a letter in the mail about how their premiums are set to double in January. Working with Democrats to chart a path forward will , so I'm holding the line until we get this done. I'm running for governor to uphold my commitment to doing everything in my power to protect Coloradans' access to health care from Trump's attacks and Republicans' broken political games. But more than that, I'm running because we can protect access to contraceptives and reproductive health care. We can become a national model for providing quality health and mental health care while also cutting costs and reducing premium rate increases. We can expand access to care across the state by growing the health and mental health care workforce and ensuring the sustainability of rural hospitals. But since I'm not taking a cent from big for-profit health insurers, I can't make any of those lifesaving measures happen without your support to win this race. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for everything, friend. I hope you have a great day. Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. body:
A new Gallup poll exposed how Americans really feel about the Supreme Court. | |
---
Peter, A new Gallup poll just found that a record high number of Americans believe the Supreme Court is too conservative.1 What do _you_ think? **Is the Supreme Court too conservative?** | | | [VOTE YES](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe67gZkaOtfLu02419DJjolIxnObZ9RMFf8f0vP2obw7dAfu2my7XRAtDqNy4nWWqkSeMBt8KM9nfdE0cqQTYwH4lVDE0hjpQVnebugXtUY2s53i4P0sCJsr0HMp8hFmdsSSfY0ulp6BpMxWxhPEEqDqiIpblkOt83GfUjQnUOo0HVMbaGRSTiOoEFX3QcattsYMY2mvvLlckiWdlx1o8pwpgsFqEqsvcxFHiybKpX9b-1LLlbulLnU_aT4M-pzj4Nc/4ki/IKpg7W6tQUa8ZSmCN2lH9A/h0/h001.Vg-n520JzDBk6nZtsuQopPMV6h6B39J8lOiN4uJ2zfk)

---
Just 17% of Americans say the Court is too liberal. They’re right—Trump has stacked the Court with MAGA extremists, and the corrupt justices have steered the judicial branch sharply to the right.
The Supreme Court’s job approval also remains at a record low—just 42% of Americans approve of the job they’re doing.**In fact, less than a majority of Americans trust the judicial branch for the fourth straight year.**
**This should be a serious wake-up call for the MAGA justices.**
You can’t crown a king in America, strip rights from vulnerable groups, give the green light to authoritarianism, and crumple up our Constitution without We the People deeming you the most unpopular court in history.
**Our democracy doesn’t belong to Donald Trump. And it doesn’t belong to corrupt MAGA justices. It belongs to us, and it’s time we take it back.**

clean_body: A new Gallup poll exposed how Americans really feel about the Supreme Court. | | Peter, A new Gallup poll just found that a record high number of Americans believe the Supreme Court is too conservative.1 What do you think? Is the Supreme Court too conservative? | | | | Just 17% of Americans say the Court is too liberal. They’re right—Trump has stacked the Court with MAGA extremists, and the corrupt justices have steered the judicial branch sharply to the right. The Supreme Court’s job approval also remains at a record low—just 42% of Americans approve of the job they’re doing.In fact, less than a majority of Americans trust the judicial branch for the fourth straight year. This should be a serious wake-up call for the MAGA justices. You can’t crown a king in America, strip rights from vulnerable groups, give the green light to authoritarianism, and crumple up our Constitution without We the People deeming you the most unpopular court in history. Our democracy doesn’t belong to Donald Trump. And it doesn’t belong to corrupt MAGA justices. It belongs to us, and it’s time we take it back. 43% of Americans think this Court is too conservative, and 42% are unhappy with them. Let’s join them in standing up and speaking out. Sound off now! Is the Supreme Court too conservative? | | | Thank you for standing up for our democracy, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy 1 Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . Instead of working together to fund the government and support our communities, Republicans are holding the process hostage—threatening programs that keep families healthy and safe. They hold the House, the Senate, and the White House. I don’t accept this BS Republican shutdown. REJECT THE BS REPUBLICAN SHUTDOWN [] While they delay, families lose vital benefits, veterans go without pay, and small businesses suffer. This is not leadership, it’s dysfunction. I’m standing up for truth. I’m fighting for accountability, for honest government, and for the values Americans share. If we don’t fight back, we risk letting chaos win. I need your help. subject: Stephen Miller ...

body:
Wake up, America.

**Did you see this from Stephen Miller?
**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4783?t=1&akid=2643%2E4767699%2EucThgz)
Wake up, America.
The reaction from folks like Stephen Miller isn't about crime and safety, it's about dismantling our democratic institutions.
Stephen Miller has already publicly labeled the Democratic Party as a terrorist organization. Did you see this?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4784?t=2&akid=2643%2E4767699%2EucThgz)
We cannot allow acts of political violence to be weaponized and used to threaten tens of millions of Americans.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251006-2&refcode2=2643_4767699_ucThgz&akid=2643%2E4767699%2EucThgz)

Representation in Congress is still overwhelmingly skewed toward white men, while women, immigrants, and communities of color are left without a seat at the table when critical decisions are being made. This campaign is about changing that. It’s why organizations like EMILYs List, BOLD PAC, and Latino Victory Fund, as well as local leaders, have endorsed Carol – because they believe in our fight to bring new perspectives and lived experiences to Washington. We have a tough road ahead. Candidates like Carol don’t get the insider money that her opponents rely on. We have to build this campaign from the ground up. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = | = – Team Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

_My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough._ But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. **Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter?** It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.**_People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out._** Long story short, we heard _every single lie_ the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear._**But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT.**_ I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — _she thrived_. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the **YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER** of the Georgia House.

clean_body: | | | Peter, My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough. But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter? It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out. Long story short, we heard every single lie the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear.But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT. I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — she thrived. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER of the Georgia House. And now, she’s running against a well-funded Democrat backed by the political establishment in Atlanta. And she’s not doing it for power, but to PROTECT the values she lives every single day. I’ll be the first to tell you, the Left can’t stand Lauren. They’re ATTACKING her for being a bold, unapologetic, America-First mom who puts families and faith above everything else. They HATE that she’s living proof that conservative, pro-life women are strong, capable, and ready to lead. The truth is, they’re trying to shut Lauren down because she’s fighting for your God-given rights – the same way she fought for the God-given right for our son to live. If they FLIP Georgia blue, they’ll ERASE pro-life protections, DISMANTLE family-first policies, and REPLACE them with their radical, woke agenda. They haven’t succeeded yet — but they’re getting close. That’s why Lauren needs we can give her. Because if we don’t draw the line right now, we risk losing everything we’ve fought so hard to preserve. Lauren’s ready to fight. I’ve seen it in her since day one.The only question is... For faith, family, and freedom,Zak Daniel | | Paid for by Daniel for Georgia. PO Box 5, Forsyth, GA, 31029

subject: Abigail and Mikie have what it takes to deliver for their states

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9049%2E5257348%2E2UGyZX ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — In case
you haven’t been paying attention, there are two incredibly important,
competitive elections happening in less than one month.

I want to tell you about my friends Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill,
who are running for governor of Virginia and New Jersey, respectively.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs_em_sherrill_spanberger2025.l12nmb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TAN_AC90_20251006_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=9049%2E5257348%2E2UGyZX ]But first, will you split a contribution between their campaigns and my
work to elect Democrats across the country this year and beyond?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs_em_sherrill_spanberger2025.l12nmb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TAN_AC90_20251006_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9049%2E5257348%2E2UGyZX ]SPLIT A DONATION

I served alongside Mikie and Abigail in the House of Representatives,
where I saw them stand up for our democracy and our freedoms. They are
total badasses.

I know they both have what it takes to deliver for the people they
represent. They’re dedicated to building an economy that works for
everyone, protecting our democracy, and fighting for what's right as we
face the most corrupt presidential administration in history.

Their elections are approaching quickly,
Derek, and I’m proud to support
them during this final sprint to the ballot box.

These are some of the highest-profile elections since Donald Trump’s
second administration started. I know I want to send a powerful message to
Trump and his MAGA acolytes: voters are sick and tired of the chaos. The
deliberate cruelty. The hate and fear-mongering.

Electing Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger as governors of New Jersey
and Virginia will send a resounding message.

But to prove they can win their high-stakes races and defeat the GOP, we
need to have their backs.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs_em_sherrill_spanberger2025.l12nmb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_TAN_AC90_20251006_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=9049%2E5257348%2E2UGyZX ]Derek,
will you split a contribution between my campaign, Abigail Spanberger, and
Mikie Sherrill ahead of their upcoming elections? Let’s send a resounding
message to Trump on Election Day.

---
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too. But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers. There’s only one explanation for this: **_Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy._** **So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.** [**But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116747692/574301374/-569431239?refcode=251006em-ob2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTIwZTBhNy0wZWEzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_kAu0wKGIzn2Cfmq8_o27ESh__wl-JjK2YNDU2jlOro=)
---

Oregon Secretary of State

clean_body: | | | = | | = Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too. But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers. There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy. So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters. = = Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support. Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: I would love to see you in person, Derek

body:
---
Derek, it's Sarah McBride. I’m honored to represent Delaware in the House of Representatives. Look, it’s no secret that this year has been difficult. This moment is particularly dangerous for a lot of vulnerable people in this country. In moments like these, MAGA Republicans are counting on apathy. They want all of us to tune out and let them pass their agenda with no opposition. But people like you aren’t doing that. You’re showing up — in your community, at protests, and at the ballot box. We want to say thank you in person. **Right now, the DNC is hosting a contest where _five_ winners will be chosen to attend our annual leadership conference this fall.** You’ll have the opportunity to hear from Democratic leaders in person. Your donation today will automatically enter you into the contest and fund the DNC’s efforts as we take on the challenges ahead: [**You can use this link to make a contribution and be automatically entered.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-forum-sweepstakes-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251006_4764_fr&refcode2=4775_22930333_liBbLB&akid=4775%2E22930333%2EliBbLB) There is a lot of work ahead of us to win back Congress, and we are experiencing a time of unprecedented fear and division. In moments like these, it’s important to remember who we are and the future we are working to build. Our values are stronger than the forces that seek to divide us, and I cannot express enough how grateful I am for your support. name: Justice Democrats
subject: BREAKING: Judge blocks Trump from sending troops to Portland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump is sending ICE and the National Guard to invade blue cities
across the country, terrorizing our communities and violating our rights.

In the last few weeks, we’ve witnessed masked agents breaking windows to
pull people out of their cars, rounding up and zip-tying children in the
middle of the night, destroying people’s homes and personal property,
violently assaulting and arresting immigrants and protesters, and
detaining people (including those with documentation and even U.S.
citizenship) for hours on end.

The fascist in chief has already militarized Los Angeles, Washington, and
Chicago, and is trying to deploy troops to Memphis and Portland as we
speak — all under the guise of cracking down on crime and fighting
so-called “domestic terrorism.”

But a federal judge just blocked Trump from sending the military to
Portland for the second time, after he tried defying the original order by
directing California and Texas to federalize and deploy their National
Guard members there.

As Justice Democrats’ Rep. Pramila Jayapal, said:
